items.title: KMS ver. 1.2.413 – MapleStory’s 23rd Anniversary: Maple Attack!
items.summary: MapleStory’s 23rd anniversary: Maple Attack has begun! This patch contains a ton of gameplay improvements to leveling up, boss patterns, skill rings, enhan...

kmsBreakdown.summary: MapleStory’s 23rd anniversary: Maple Attack has begun! This patch contains a ton of gameplay improvements to leveling up, boss patterns, skill rings, enhancing, and boss rewards, as well as the new Training Grounds system to test out your damage rotation and help the MapleStory team in future balancing.
highlights: The main event is themed around Maple Island, the real-life MapleStory theme park opening in Seoul in April. There’s also the new Change Burning: Lucid event where you can transform into and play as Lucid, and the Jin’s Mysterious Garden event where you can get crazy growth rewards from BTS Jin!

March 19 Gameplay Reorganizations Level 200~260 experience required halved. Boss pattern reorganization Special Skill Ring reorganization Auto Enchant system Economy Reorganization Enhancement reorganization Boss reward reorganization Training Ground World Archive – Arcane River
Growth Path Reorganization
In the level 210~259 section, the amount of experience required to level up has been decreased.
Level 210~214 Section: ~8% decrease.
※ For characters with more experience than the changed amount required to level up, their current experience will be adjusted by the amount required to level up at their current level.

details.value: Growth Path Reorganization
In the level 210~259 section, the amount of experience required to level up has been decreased.

items: Level 210~214 Section: ~8% decrease.
Level 215~219 Section: ~15% decrease.
Level 220~224 Section: ~21% decrease.
Level 225~229 Section: ~27% decrease.
Level 230~234 Section: ~33% decrease.
Level 235~239 Section: ~38% decrease.
Level 240~244 Section: ~43% decrease.
Level 245~249 Section: ~47% decrease.
Level 250~259 Section: ~58% decrease.

details.value: ※ For characters with more experience than the changed amount required to level up, their current experience will be adjusted by the amount required to level up at their current level.
The number of Arcane Symbols acquired from daily quest rewards has been increased from 20 to 40.
The number of Arcane Symbols acquired from weekly content rewards has been increased from 40 to 80.
The number of Authentic Symbols acquired from daily quest rewards has been increased from 10 to 15 (20 to 30 for Cernium).
[Back to Overview]
Enhancement Reorganization
The Star Force Enhancement and Trace Transfer systems have been reorganized.

items: The Star Catch system has been removed. The increased success rate when the Star Catch was completed will now be applied by default.
Star Catch related achievements have been moved to the Memory tab and can no longer be completed.

When Star Force enhancing an item and it is destroyed, the Trace item’s Star Force value will be set to the number of stars it was at before it was boomed. However, when enhancing items at 23 stars or higher, if they are destroyed the Trace will be set at 22 stars.

details.value: ※ For Superior equipment items, this change will not be applied and they will be maintained at 0 stars.
※ For Trace items acquired before the March 19, 2026 maintenance, this change will not be applied.

items: When using the Trace Transfer feature, you can now pay a certain amount of mesos and number of equipment items based on the Trace item’s required level and Star Force value to fully restore the Trace at that number of stars.
You can still choose to restore the Trace to 12 stars by just paying one of the same equipment item (like before).

details.value: ※ When restoring Zero’s weapons Lapis and Lazuli Trace items, it will only require 1 equipment item. However, for Type 8 or higher that require specific Essences, you will need an additional number of those Essences. (19~20 Stars: 1, 21 Stars: 2, 22 Stars: 3).

※ When restoring Astra Subweapon Trace items, it will only require 1 equipment item. However, you will need to pay additional mesos after the base restore cost. (19~20 Stars: 1b mesos, 21 Stars: 2b mesos, 22 Stars: 3b mesos).

※ When restoring Destiny 2nd Transcendence Weapon Trace items, it will only require 1 equipment item. However, for Zero’s weapons Destiny Lapis and Lazuli, you will need an additional number of Destiny Essences. For all other weapons, you will need to pay additional mesos after the base restore cost. (19~20 Stars: 1 Destiny Essence or 10b mesos, 21 Stars: 2 Destiny Essences or 20b mesos, 22 Stars: 3 Destiny Essences or 30b mesos).
The Bonus Stats related systems have been reorganized.

items: The ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’ has been added that lets you reset bonus stats using mesos. You can use it through the unified enhancement UI’s ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’. When using the ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’, you can choose between the Before or After roll. The ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’s stat appearance rates are applied the same as Black Rebirth Flames. The bonus stats reset cost is 3m mesos.
You can use it through the unified enhancement UI’s ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’.
When using the ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’, you can choose between the Before or After roll.
The ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’s stat appearance rates are applied the same as Black Rebirth Flames.
The bonus stats reset cost is 3m mesos.
A new Rebirth Flame, the ‘Blazing Rebirth Flame’ has been added. The stat appearance rates are applied the same as Powerful Rebirth Flames, but you can choose between the Before or After roll.
The stat appearance rates are applied the same as Powerful Rebirth Flames, but you can choose between the Before or After roll.

Boss monsters, Elite Monsters, and Elite Champions will no longer drop the following items. Powerful Rebirth Flame Eternal Rebirth Flame Black Rebirth Flame Unquenchable Flame Eternal Unquenchable Flame Eternal Unquenchable Black Flame Rebirth Fragment
Powerful Rebirth Flame
Eternal Rebirth Flame
Black Rebirth Flame
Unquenchable Flame
Eternal Unquenchable Flame
Eternal Unquenchable Black Flame
Rebirth Fragment
The Maple Union Coin Shop will no longer sell Powerful Rebirth Flames, Karma Powerful Rebirth Flames, or Karma Eternal Rebirth Flames.
The Maple Union Coin Shop will now sell Blazing Rebirth Flames and Karma Blazing Rebirth Flames.
The Maple Union Coin Shop’s purchase limit of Karma Black Rebirth Flames has been increased from 40 to 60.
Monster Collection exploration rewards will no longer include Powerful Rebirth Flames or Eternal Rebirth Flames.

details.value: New Potential and Additional Potential related items have been added.

items: The new ‘Gold Cube’, ‘Silver Cube’, and ‘Bronze Additional Cube’ items have been added. Gold Cube: The stat appearance and tier up rates are the same as Meister Cubes, but you can choose between the Before or After roll. Silver Cube: The stat appearance and tier up rates are the same as Craftsman Cubes, but you can choose between the Before or After roll. Bronze Additional Cube: The stat appearance and tier up rates are the same as Strange Additional Cubes, but you can choose between the Before or After roll.

items: The new enhancement item prefix ‘Memento’ has been added. If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item, that equipment will become ‘Memento Engraved’ and untradeable for 30 days, regardless of its tradeability. You cannot use Platinum Karma Scissors, Karma Scissors, Silver Karma Scissors, or the Share Name Tag on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’. You cannot use the Equipment Transfer system on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’. If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item that is already ‘Memento Engraved’, the untradeable period will be reset to 30 days from when the enhancement item was used on it.
If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item, that equipment will become ‘Memento Engraved’ and untradeable for 30 days, regardless of its tradeability.
You cannot use Platinum Karma Scissors, Karma Scissors, Silver Karma Scissors, or the Share Name Tag on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’.
You cannot use the Equipment Transfer system on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’.

If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item that is already ‘Memento Engraved’, the untradeable period will be reset to 30 days from when the enhancement item was used on it.
When you defeat certain boss monsters, they will now be guaranteed to drop the following cube rewards.

details.value: ※ The number of cube rewards is fixed regardless of your drop rate.
※ However, for Black Mage (Hard), the rewards will be added starting from April 1, 2026.
The Auto Enchant system has been added.

items: You can use the Auto Enchant system through the unified enhancement UI’s Star Force, Bonus Stats, Potential, and Additional Potential tabs.
You can press the Auto Enchant button at the bottom right of the unified enhancement UI to set your target stages.
After setting your target stages, you can click the Auto Enchant button to proceed with automatic enchanting.
The Auto Enchant will stop when it meets your target, consumes all enhancement material, or the equipment is destroyed.
For Auto Enchant of potential and additional potential, it will stop when the sum of the reset potential values is higher than the sum of the target potential values.
For Auto Enchant of bonus stats, it will stop when the reset bonus stats satisfy all of the target bonus stat values.

You can use the ‘Stop Reset on Combat Power Increase’ option to stop the Auto Enchant if the reset bonus stats, potential, or additional potential results in a Combat Power increase, regardless of your target values.

details.value: ※ You can stop the Auto Enchant by pressing Space Bar, ESC, Enter, or by clicking the Cancel Enchant button.
※ Potential and Additional Potential Auto Enchant can only be used on Legendary tier items.
※ All Stats % from potential stats is calculated by being added to STR %, DEX %, INT %, and LUK %.

※ For Bonus Stats, you can set the maximum target up to rank 6. However, for STR/DEX/INT/LUK stats, you can set the maximum target as the sum of four combinations of rank 6 stats that include each of them.
※ The Auto Enchant feature cannot be used when Star Forcing with Miraculous Equipment enhancement Scrolls, Advanced Equipment Enhancement Scrolls, or Equipment Enhancement Scrolls.
※ The Auto Enchant feature cannot be used in the Guild Castle’s Enhancement Altar map.
※ The ‘Stop Reset on Combat Power Increase’ option can only be used on items that you can equip.
※ The ‘Stop Reset on Combat Power Increase’ option can only be used on flames and cubes that let you choose between Before and After.

sections.summary: The main event is themed around Maple Island, the real-life MapleStory theme park opening in Seoul in April. There’s also the new Change Burning: Lucid event where you can transform into and play as Lucid, and the Jin’s Mysterious Garden event where you can get crazy growth rewards from BTS Jin!

items: The Kalos’ Will aiming line will no longer be affected by character actions. (This is the NPC Chat skill, the aiming line will no longer go crazy if your character does any rotating actions when using skills.)
Easy and Normal Mode’s Death Count has been increased from 5 to 8.
Easy Mode’s Structure Interference time has been increased from 60 seconds to 80 seconds. (This is the time interval for when a new structure is activated.)

Easy Mode’s Eye of Penitence and Eye of the Abyss structures’ number of hits required to deactivate has been decreased from 3 per party member to 2 per party member. (These are the left and right structures.)

Easy Mode’s Bombardment Aircraft and Odium’s Sphere structures’ number of hits required to deactivate has been decreased from 2 per party member to 1 per party member. (These are the top and bottom structures.)
Normal Mode’s Structure Interference time has been increased from 60 seconds to 70 seconds. (This is the time interval for when a new structure is activated.)

Normal Mode’s Eye of Penitence and Eye of the Abyss structures’ number of hits required to deactivate has been decreased from 3 per party member to 2 per party member. (These are the left and right structures.)

Normal Mode’s Bombardment Aircraft and Odium’s Sphere structures’ number of hits required to deactivate has been decreased from 2 per party member to 1 per party member. (These are the top and bottom structures.)
If the Eye of Penitence is deactivated while casting, the attack will now stop. (This is the left structure.)

sections.title: UI

details.value: The ‘Maple Coin Exchange’ menu has been removed from the Quick Move menu.
A feature has been added where you can automatically combine the claimed Symbols from completing daily/weekly quests into your currently equipped Symbol.
The map teleport cooldown through the Maple Guide UI has been changed to 3 seconds.
The Meisterville teleport cooldown through the Profession UI has been changed to 3 seconds.
In the Maple Scheduler UI, you can now move to boss entry waiting maps for bosses you have already completed.
In the Maple Scheduler UI, you can now move to the Dimensional Battlefield.
In the Boss UI, the Auto Matching button and Move to Dimensional Battlefield button images have been changed.
In the unified enhancement UI, certain enhancement cutscene speeds have been increased.
In the unified enhancement UI, the enhancement text cutscene display location has been changed to be based on the enhancement UI.
In the unified enhancement UI, when you succeed at Star Force and scroll enhancements, the text cutscene and icon cutscene will now be displayed at the same time.
In the unified enhancement UI, when you successfully Star Force enhance an item multiple times at once, the icon cutscene will now be displayed all at once.

In the unified enhancement UI, a UI where you can check item information has been added during full screen enhancement cutscenes when using potential, additional potential, bonus stats, and scroll enhancements with Return Scrolls.
In Boss Practice Mode and Foggy Forest Training Center, the VIP Buff (Stats), Sweet Taiyaki Sprinkle, and MVP Superpower Buff have been added.
A guide message will now be displayed when acquiring V Points through Core Gemstones.
When the Champion’s Blessing UI is opened, the selected stats will no longer be reset.
You can no longer delete characters without claiming the mesos after World Leaping.
The speed of switching from windowed mode to full screen has been increased.
Capture Mode will now display external chat’s details.
A feature to reset the Guild Castle guild honor statue has been added.
You can now unregister items in the Guild Castle item display case UI using the Reset button.
Skill cooldowns will now be displayed even when they are below 5 seconds.
The ‘Skill Cooldown and Buff Duration Display Method’ option has been added tot he Game Settings’ UI tab.

items: Default: Displays in seconds for durations less than 1 minute, and in minutes for durations 1 minute or higher.
Seconds: Displays in seconds for durations less than 10 minutes.
Minutes + Seconds: Displays in minute:second format for durations between 1 minute and 10 minutes.

details.value: When talking to the NPC Adobis at the ‘Gate to Zakum’, the ‘Receive Offerings to Zakum’ option has been removed.
The ‘Prioritize Displaying my Character and Monsters in Boss Content’ option has been added to the Game Settings’ Laboratory tab.

items: You can enable this option through the checkbox. When enabled, your character and monsters’ images will be displayed on top of effects.
You can set the transparency of the displayed images by using the transparency slider.

When enabled, certain monster debuff effects displayed above the character’s head and character skill debuff icons displayed above the monsters’ heads will be displayed on top of effects and character/monster images. However, these icons will not be affected by transparency settings.

details.value: In the Maple Auction sales tab, the ‘Receive Previous Auction Items’ feature has been removed.
The enter key will no longer function in the delivery box’s delivery removal confirmation window.
The Pocket item slot usage conditions have been removed.
When using the Luna Illusion, a guide message will now be displayed when trying to combine the appearance of a pet that cannot equip pet equipment.
When using an Illusion Ring, the standing action will no longer switch to a different standing action.
The Maple X Frieren and First-Class Magician medals can now be registered in the Medal Collection.
The direction the character is facing in default chat windows will now be based on the character display location.
The Zero scenario exclusive dialogue window image has been changed.
A guide popup will now appear when an item disappears due to MVP rank changing.
When logging off, a guide message will now be displayed if you have remaining MVP daily Quick Pass usages on a character that can use them.
When logging off on a Wednesday, a guide message will now be displayed if you have remaining MVP weekly Quick Pass usages available.
When logging off on a Wednesday, a guide message will now be displayed if you have remaining MVP items that can be claimed which are refreshed weekly.
When selecting the guild member with the earliest join date in the Guild Honor Statue, if there are multiple guild members that joined before August 2020, one of them will be displayed randomly.
A guide message will now be displayed that states if an item’s number of trades will change when depositing or withdrawing in the Guild Warehouse.
A guide message will now be displayed after completing a Guild Mission.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: The ‘Maple Coin Exchange’ menu has been removed from the Quick Move menu.

sections.title: Events

details.value: You can now go to the Cash Shop, Maple Auction, or change channels in the VIP Sauna Room.
When you click on a folder in the Event List, it will now instantly display the entire expanded area.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: You can now go to the Cash Shop, Maple Auction, or change channels in the VIP Sauna Room.

sections.title: Custom Illustrations

details.value: The Weekly Illustration Request Ticket Sale event has been changed to a permanent sale system.

items: You can buy up to 7 Illustration Request Tickets per week per Maple ID. The purchase limit is reset every Thursday at midnight.

details.value: The Custom Illustration main UI can now be opened through major towns’ Quick Move menu.
The Custom Illustration Shop, where you can buy Illustration Request Tickets, can now be accessed through the Custom Illustration main UI.
The custom illustration request results have been improved to better represent the avatar appearance’s colours and certain facial features.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: The Weekly Illustration Request Ticket Sale event has been changed to a permanent sale system.

sections.title: Discord Account Link

details.value: When your Discord account is linked, you can use the ‘Invite Discord Friend’ feature.

items: If a friend is logged into the game while you are using the Discord app, you can launch the game by accepting the invitation.

details.value: When your Discord account is linked, things like the server, channel, and map name you are on will be displayed on your Discord app’s profile. However, this information will not be displayed if you are offline.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: When your Discord account is linked, you can use the ‘Invite Discord Friend’ feature.

sections.title: Story Content

details.value: ‘Geardrak’ has been added to the Maple Chronicle: Book of Grandis.

items: The content will be unlocked if you have at least 1 character in your account that has completed the ‘Result of Imperfect Alchemy’ achievement.
After unlocking the content, level 100 or higher characters that have completed the ‘[Dimensional Library] Visit the Dimensional Library’ quest can enter the content.
You can access the Dimensional Library through the Maple Guide or Dimensional Mirror.

details.value: The Geardrak video has been added to the Dimensional Library Projector.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: ‘Geardrak’ has been added to the Maple Chronicle: Book of Grandis.

details.value: The Rune of Destruction has been changed.

items: When the Rune of Destruction is used, it will now activate a skill that deals 1000% damage 28 times consecutively on up to 15 enemies.

sections.title: Hyper Burning Booster Giveaway!

details.value: Giving away a Hyper Burning Booster to commemorate the 23rd anniversary! Receive the 1+4 storm level up benefit until level 260 together with growth support gifts!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: All characters.

details.value: ※ Zero characters must complete Chapter 2 to participate in the event.
Event Period:

items: March 19, 2026 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Hyper Burning Booster Giveaway’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to claim a Hyper Burning Booster (once per Maple ID).
Hyper Burning Booster Usage Requirements:

items: A level 10~258 character that is not currently a Hyper Burning character or a level 100~258 Zero character.

details.value: Hyper Burning Booster Usage Effects:

items: When you use the Hyper Burning Booster, the 1+4 level up Burning effect will be applied.
The effect will be applied from level 10~260, until June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
When used on a character that is receiving the Tera Burning or Mega Burning effects, that character’s Tera Burning/Mega Burning effect will disappear.
If you delete a character that is receiving the Hyper Burning Booster effect, it will disappear.

details.value: Hyper Burning Booster Character Benefits
When you use the Hyper Burning Booster on an existing character, you will only receive the rewards for the levels you reach after you used the Hyper Burning Booster.
Hyper Burning Booster characters will receive the following rewards through the Hyper Burning Booster UI when they reach certain conditions.
※ All items claimed from this event UI are untradeable.
※ All reward items can only be acquired 1 time per character. After claiming a reward, even if you delete and recreate the character, you cannot receive the reward again.

※ The Eternal Flame Title Voucher, Core Gemstones, and Infinite Flame Title Voucher rewards can only be claimed by characters who have completed the 5th job advancement and the ‘Another Power, Arcane Force’ quest.
※ Each area’s Arcane Symbol reward can be claimed after completing that area’s quest that rewards the Arcane Symbol.
※ The Level 5 Authentic Symbol: Cernium reward can be claimed after completing the ‘Another Power, Authentic Force’ quest.
※ When using the Selective Arcane/Authentic Symbol Vouchers, you can only acquire Symbols from areas in which you have completed the Arcane River/Grandis story quests.
※ You can acquire the ‘Authentic Symbol: Cernium, Arcs, Odium, Shangri-La, Carcion’ or ‘Grand Authentic Symbol: Tallahart’ from the Selective Authentic Symbol Vouchers.
※ Existing characters who already have an Eternal Flame Ring cannot acquire a duplicate Eternal Flame Ring with the Eternal Flame Ring Voucher.
※ Zero will not receive the Black Weapon Box, Black Secondary Weapon Box, or the 15 Star Time-Limited Fafnir Weapon Box.
※ For Zero characters, they cannot use the Absolabs weapon so they will only receive the Dominator Pendant when they reach level 220.

※ If you are using Arcane Catalyst to move Symbols, you must first stabilize the Unstable Symbol and then receive the Level 7 Arcane Symbols from the level achievement awards to enhance them normally.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: Giving away a Hyper Burning Booster to commemorate the 23rd anniversary! Receive the 1+4 storm level up benefit until level 260 together with growth support gifts!

details.value: Funny Days of Maple Island
A strange phenomenon has been discovered in Friends World?! Listen to Elwin’s story to check what happened.
Event Participation Requirements

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period

items: March 19, 2026 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Maple Attack!’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. The ‘Maple Attack’ event provides the ‘Simplified Event Start’ feature.
[Back to Overview]
[Attendance Check Event] Mascot Parade

Elwin has discovered Maple World’s mushrooms in the amusement park’s ‘Mascot Parade’. Join the Mascot Parade with the mushrooms, fulfill Elwin’s request to find out more information about the strange phenomenon, and receive various gifts!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Maple Attack!’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: March 19, 2026 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Maple Attack!’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event at the same time as the other Maple Attack! related events.
After you start the event, you can select the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Mascot Parade’ event in the Event List to check your progress.
※ The <[Attendance Check Event] Mascot Parade> participation records are shared between all characters in the Maple ID.
Participation
You can open the Mascot Parade event UI through the Event List and click the [Participate] button once per day to accumulate the following rewards.

items: 3 3x Experience Coupons (30 Minutes)
800 Gift Tickets
1 Mascot Power

details.value: You can claim your desired amount of accumulated 3x Experience Coupons by pressing the ‘Receive’ button in the UI. You can also exchange 15 3x Experience Coupons for 1 4x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes).
You can participate up to 5 times per week. You can complete it up to 60 times over the event period.

You can click the Parade Pass <Use> button at the bottom left corner of the UI to use 3,000 Maple Points to complete 1 participation that you did not complete previously. The <Parade Pass> can be used up to the number of times you did not complete the participations as of the previous week.
Participation Rewards
You can acquire the following rewards each time you complete a daily collection.
※ The daily participation rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
※ However, the Petite Orange/Green/Blue Mushroom Set Vouchers can only be claimed 1 time per person.
※ All reward items can only be put into storage.
※ All reward items can be claimed until June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM, and will expire on June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ However, the VIP Sauna Entry Tickets will expire on June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
※ You can acquire the ‘Authentic Symbol: Cernium, Arcs, Odium, Shangri-La, Carcion’ or ‘Grand Authentic Symbol: Tallahart’ from the Selective Authentic Symbol Vouchers.
※ When you use the Mascot Parade Commemoration Box, you will acquire 20 Karma White Additional Cubes and the Maple Attack Medal Voucher.
※ The Sol Erda can only by used by characters level 260 or higher that have completed the 6th job advancement. It cannot be used if you hold 20 Sol Erda.

※ The pets acquired from the Petite Mascot Mushroom Set Vouchers are untradeable and their magic time will run out on June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM (cannot be extended). You cannot use the Luna Illusion, Pet Skill Scroll, or Pet Name Tag on them.
※ The Petite Mascot Mushroom set pets have the Auto Buff Skill, Auto Loot, Meso Loot, Item Loot, Auto HP, Auto MP, and Pet Training.

※ When you equip the Petite Mascot Mushroom Set pets, you will receive the <Amusement Park’s Mascots> skill. It will be enhanced up to stage 3 based on the number of Petite Mascot Mushroom Set pets equipped (Luna Petite set buff skill).
※ The Petite Mascot Mushroom Set pets are multipets that can be summoned with other pets (up to 3).
※ The Petite Mascot Mushroom Set pets receive the power of moonlight and can loot items from a further range.
※ The pet equipment acquired from the Petite Mascot Mushroom Set Vouchers are untradeable and cannot be enhanced. They will expire on June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
Special Mission
You can acquire a ‘Special Gift’ if you collect 60 ‘Mascot Power’ and complete the ‘Parade Mission’.
You can acquire 1 ‘Mascot Power’ for every day you complete the daily participation.

You can complete the ‘Parade Mission’ by defeating 100,000 monsters within your level range. Every week, the limit of the number of monsters within your level range that you can defeat for the mission will be increased by 10,000. It will be increased up to 100,000 over the event period.
You can check this week’s limit by hovering your mouse over the ‘Parade Mission’ section of the event UI.
※ The mission will only progress if you defeat monsters within your level range while in a party of 1 or not in a party.
Special Gift

When you complete the Special Mission, after the ‘Mascot Parade’ event ends, from June 18, 2026 after the maintenance until July 1, 2026 at 11:59 PM, you can click the ‘Mascot Parade Special Gift’ event in the Event List to acquire the ‘Special Gift’.
※ The Selective Petite Mascot Mushroom Pet Voucher can only be claimed 1 time per person.
※ All reward items can only be put into storage.
※ All reward items can be claimed until July 1, 2026 at 11:59 PM, and will expire on July 2, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ When you use the Selective Petite Mascot Mushroom Pet Voucher, you will receive 1 of the following Petite Mascot Mushroom Set Vouchers and 8 Karma Premium Pet Equipment Scroll Vouchers.

items: Petite Orange Mushroom Set Voucher
Petite Green Mushroom Set Voucher
Petite Blue Mushroom Set Voucher

details.value: ※ The Petite Mascot Mushroom pet acquired from the Voucher is untradeable and its magic time will run out in 90 days (can be extended).
※ The Petite Mascot Mushroom set pets have the Auto Buff Skill, Auto Loot, Meso Loot, and Item Loot.
※ The pet equipment acquired from the Petite Mascot Mushroom Set Vouchers are untradeable and permanent.

※ If you use the Selective Karma Premium Pet Equipment Scroll Voucher, you can choose between the 100% Karma Premium Pet Equipment Attack Scroll and 100% Karma Premium Pet Equipment Magic Attack Scroll.
※ The selected Karma Premium Pet Equipment Scroll can only be put into storage, and will expire after 7 days.
[Back to Overview]
[Event Skill] Maple Sweets
You can’t miss out on the snacks at an amusement park! Taste the menu prepared by the Maple Sweets waiters and acquire powerful stats!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Maple Attack!’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: March 19, 2026 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: ※ The acquired skill can be enhanced until June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM. The skill effects will be applied until June 24, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
You can select the ‘Maple Attack!’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event at the same time as the other Maple Attack! related events.
After you start the event, you can select the ‘[Event Skill] Maple Sweets’ event in the Event List to check your progress.
Collection Mission
Every week, you can defeat 10,000 monsters within your level range to complete the collection mission.
For every 2,000 monsters you defeat, you can click the [Collect] button to acquire 5 Pink Bean Coupons and 5 Orange Mushroom Coupons. You can acquire up to 25 of each per week.

You can click the Collection Mission Pass <Use> button at the bottom left corner of the UI to use 3,000 Maple Points to complete 1 collection mission that you did not complete previously. The <Collection Mission Pass> can be used up to the number of times you did not complete the collection mission as of the previous week.
※ The <Collection Mission> participation records are shared between all characters in the Maple ID.
Ordering Sweet Drinks and Sweet Snacks
You can open the Maple Sweets event UI through the Event List to use your Pink Bean Coupons and Orange Mushroom Coupons to enhance your stats by ordering Sweet Drinks and Sweet Snacks.
Sweet Drinks will enhance the character’s stats, and Sweet Snacks will enhance content participation rewards.
Buying Coupons
You can also click the [Buy] button to buy your desired amount of selected coupons. It costs 1,000 Maple Points per coupon.
※ When the event starts, you can buy 5 ‘Pink Bean Coupons’ and ‘Orange Mushroom Coupons’. Every Thursday at 12:00, 5 more will become available for purchase.
※ The available quantity will accumulate over the event period.
Sweet Drinks
Sweet Snacks
※ ‘Sol Erda Energy’ will drop when you defeat the reward map’s reward monster if you survived after defeating boss monsters of Suu (Hard) or higher.
※ The ‘increased Monster Collection registration rate’ and ‘additional coins from the Union Weekly Mission’ benefits cannot be activated in Challengers World.
※ The ‘Arcane River/Grandis daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional Symbol benefit is applied once per day per character per region.

※ The ‘Arcane River/Grandis daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional experience benefit is applied once per day per world per region. You can choose if you want to apply the benefit when you complete a daily quest.
※ When completing Tenebris area daily quests, only the ‘Arcane River daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional experience benefit is applied.
※ You cannot receive additional rewards for daily quests that were already completed before activating the skill effects.
※ The ‘additional coins from the Union Weekly Mission’ benefit does not apply to the ‘[Maple Union] PC Room Weekly Dragon Hunting’ mission.
※ The additional Union Coins acquired from the ‘additional coins from the Union Weekly Mission’ benefit are not reflected in related achievements.
[Back to Overview]
[Event Shop] Gift Ticket Shop
A shop filled with enhancement and growth items! Participate in the Mascot Parade and use the Gift Tickets you acquire to exchange for various items!

sections.title: Change Burning: Lucid

details.value: Enjoy a dreamlike time where you can transform into Lucid!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 200 or higher character that has completed the ‘Another Power, Arcane Force’ quest.
You can only participate on 1 character per person.
You can participate on Burning characters and in Challengers World.

details.value: Event Period:

items: March 19, 2026 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Change Burning: Lucid’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to the NPC Lucid in <Seokchon Lake> to start this event.
Change Lucid
You can check the ‘Change: Lucid’ skill in the Beginner skill tab of the character designated as Change Burning. You can use this skill to transform into Lucid.
Lucid Transformation Conditions:

items: There are no conditions in towns, you can transform at all times.

You can transform into Lucid in Arcane River/Grandis maps with monsters within your level range. If you reach 0 defeatable Dream Eaters, the transformation will be cancelled and you can no longer transform.

details.value: ※ Dream Eaters are special monsters for Change Lucid that appear in the Nightmare Control event.
※ However, if the Nightmare Control event’s Nightmare Erosion is taking place, the transformation will not be cancelled even if you reach 0 defeatable Dream Eaters.
※ Every Thursday at 12:00 AM, an additional 25,000 monsters will be added to the defeatable Dream Eater limit.
CHANGE Status

items: When transforming into Lucid, a UI will appear that lets you check the level and experience of the character designated as Change Burning.
You can cancel the Lucid transformation by pressing the Cancel Transformation button.
You can check the number of defeatable Dream Eaters and the Nightmare Erosion gauge.

details.value: Change Lucid Exclusive Skills
When you transform into Lucid with the ‘Change: Lucid’ skill, you can use Lucid exclusive skills.
The Lucid exclusive skills use a separate damage calculation method different from regular skills.

items: In the Dreamy Trials and Nightmare Forest, the damage is dealt based on the exclusive stats.
In other situations, the damage is dealt based on the character’s Combat Power value immediately before transforming.
When transforming into Lucid, certain stats are adjusted to fixed values.

details.value: Change Burning Management
The character designated as Change Burning can click the ‘Change Burning Management’ event in the Event List to open the Lucid inventory, Lucid skill window, and Lucid hotkey settings UIs.

※ If the character designated as Change Burning is deleted, you can participate in the Change Burning event on another character in the same Maple ID. However, Lucid’s level will start from level 1 and you cannot acquire any rewards again that you have already claimed on the Maple ID.
Lucid Growth

items: Lucid can grow up to level 100.
Lucid can gain experience by defeating the Lucid exclusive field monsters or by completing weekly/season missions.

details.value: ※ Even if Lucid reaches level 100, you can still acquire character experience through the weekly/season missions.
[Back to Overview]
Nightmare Control
Wipe out the swarming monsters trying to interrupt Lucid’s happy time, and both Lucid and your character will acquire lots of experience!
Nightmare Control
When you use the Change: Lucid skill in Arcane River/Grandis area maps with monsters within your level range, the Lucid exclusive field monsters Dream Eaters will appear.
The number of Dream Eaters that can be defeated as Lucid will not reset, and every Thursday at 12:00 AM, 25,000 monsters will be added to the limit.
※ You can check the number of defeatable Dream Eaters by clicking on ‘Lucid Dream’ in the CHANGE STATS or Event List.
※ If the number of defeatable Dream Eaters reaches 0 and Nightmare Erosion is not currently in progress, you cannot transform into Lucid in hunting grounds.
Nightmare Erosion
Every time you defeat 1,250 Dream Eaters, Nightmare Erosion will begin and the Source of Nightmares will appear.
When you defeat the Source of Nightmares, 5 waves of 40 Nightmare Minions will appear.
When you defeat all of the Nightmare Minions, Nightmare Erosion will end.
※ Dream Eaters will not appear while Nightmare Erosion is in progress.

※ If you go to a different map or cancel the Lucid transformation while Nightmare Erosion is in progress, it will be interrupted. You can resume Nightmare Erosion later if you transform into Lucid again in a hunting ground.

Lucid will acquire experience whenever she defeats Dream Eaters, Source of Nightmares, or Nightmare Minions. The character designated as Change Burning will acquire experience based on their character level.
※ Lucid does not acquire experience from defeating normal field monsters.
※ No additional experience effects will be applied to the Dream Eaters, Source of Nightmares, or Nightmare Minions.
※ Even if Lucid reaches level 100, you can still acquire character experience from Nightmare Control.
[Back to Overview]
Lucid Dream
Complete various missions as Lucid to grow both your character and Lucid, and acquire abundant rewards!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A character participating in the Change Burning: Lucid event.

details.value: My Lucid
You can click ‘Lucid Dream’ in the Event List to check Lucid’s growth status and stats in the My Lucid tab.
You can click the Level Bonus button to check the additional stats you will acquire based on Lucid’s level.
※ Lucid can reach up to level 100.
Dream Pass

You can use the Dream Pass to purchase Dream EXP equal to the Lucid EXP from weekly missions that were not completed as of the previous week. You can acquire 10,000 Dream EXP per 500 Maple Points, and you can only buy Dream EXP in units of 10,000.
The Dream EXP purchaseable with the Dream Pass is limited to the Lucid EXP from the weekly missions not completed up until the previous week, as of Thursday at 12:00 AM each week.
When you use the Dream Pass, you can acquire both the purchased Dream EXP and character experience based on your current level.
※ You can use the Dream Pass even if you have reached Lucid level 100, but you will only acquire character experience equal to the purchased Dream EXP.
Lucid Dream Missions
You can click the ‘Check Missions’ button in the Lucid Dream UI to check the weekly/season missions you can complete as Lucid.
Every time you complete a mission, you will be provided experience for Lucid and the character designated as Change Burning.

items: Weekly Missions These missions will reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM. You can acquire up to 2.1m Lucid experience per week. The character designated as Change Burning will acquire experience based on their character level when you complete missions.
These missions will reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM. You can acquire up to 2.1m Lucid experience per week.
The character designated as Change Burning will acquire experience based on their character level when you complete missions.
Season Missions These missions can be completed 1 time during the event period by the character designated as Change Burning.
These missions can be completed 1 time during the event period by the character designated as Change Burning.

details.value: Dream Gifts
You can click ‘Lucid Dream’ in the Event List to check and claim Lucid level achievement rewards in the Dream Gifts tab.
My Character Rewards
※ The ‘My Character’ rewards can only be claimed 1 time per person.
※ The Mercedes Pillow Voucher and City of Dreams and Illusions Maple Home Theme Voucher can only be used in worlds where you have completed the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’ quest.
Lucid Rewards
[Back to Overview]
Nightmare Forest
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A character participating in the Change Burning: Lucid event.

details.value: You can click ‘Nightmare Forest’ in the Event List to move to the ‘Nightmare Forest: Forest Entrance’ map. When you enter ‘Nightmare Forest’ you will be transformed into Lucid, and you cannot cancel the transformation while inside.
You can talk to the ‘Nightmare Light Cluster’ NPC or use the portal in the center of the map to open the Nightmare Forest UI. You can click the ‘Enter’ button to explore inside the forest.
You need 1 or more ‘Nightmare Dreamcatchers’ to explore the Nightmare Forest.
Nightmare Dream Catchers
‘Nightmare Dreamcatchers’ are a resource required to explore the Nightmare Forest. You can check how many you have through the Nightmare Forest UI.
You will be provided 5 ‘Nightmare Dreamcatchers’ per day, and they will be given out even on days you don’t login.

You can hold up to 30 ‘Nightmare Dreamcatchers’. If the quantity would exceed this amount, you will not be provided any more. Any undistributed ‘Nightmare Dreamcatchers’ can be purchased laster for 30m mesos each.
Nightmare Forest Exploration
When you enter Nightmare Forest, you will automatically enter the stage that matches Lucid’s level.
Nightmare Forest consists of a total of 2 stages.

In ‘Nightmare Forest: Deep Forest’, you must defeat the ‘Forest Predators’ and ‘Forest Minion’ monsters that appear. This will create a portal on the right side of the map, which you can touch with your character to move to the next stage.
※ You cannot enter the next stage until you defeat all of the monsters.
※ You can click the ‘Exit’ button on the left side of the screen to exit back to the ‘Nightmare Forest: Forest Entrance’ map.
※ If you exit partway through, your stage progress will not be saved and your number of ‘Nightmare Dreamcatchers’ will not be deducted.
In ‘Nightmare Forest: Deepest Part of the Forest’, you must defeat the ‘Source of the Forest’ monster to clear. 1 ‘Nightmare Dreamcatcher’ will be deducted at this time.

When you clear all of the stages, a portal will appear on the right side of the ‘Nightmare Forest: Deepest Part of the Forest’ map. If your character touches the portal, you can retry exploring the Nightmare Forest.
※ However, if you do not have any ‘Nightmare Dreamcatchers’, you will be returned to the ‘Forest Entrance’.
When you clear all of the stages, you can return to the ‘Forest Entrance’ by clicking the ‘Exit’ button on the left side of the screen or by talking to the ‘Nightmare Light Cluster’ NPC.
Source of the Forest and Event Rewards
The ‘Source of the Forest’ is a boss monster that appears in ‘Nightmare Forest: Deepest Part of the Forest’.
It has a total of 5 tier. When you attack the ‘Source of the Forest’, it will evolve into the next tier based on the current Nightmare Forest stage and a set probability.
The probability of reaching the final ‘Source of the Forest’ tier based on the Nightmare Forest stage is as follows.

When you defeat the ‘Source of the Forest’, you can acquire Dreamy equipment, Dreamy Crystals, and Dreamy Equipment Fragments based on a set probability. Higher tier ‘Source of the Forest’ will drop higher tier items.
※ ‘Dreamy Equipment’ are exclusive equipment that can only be used by Lucid.
※ ‘Dreamy Crystals’ are additional parts that can be equipped to ‘Dreamy Equipment’.
※ ‘Dreamy Equipment Fragments’ are materials required to enhance and craft ‘Dreamy Equipment’.
[Back to Overview]
Dreamy Equipment
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A character participating in the Change Burning: Lucid event.

details.value: Dreamy Equipment UI
You can select ‘Change Burning Management’ in the Event List then press the [Inventory] button or transform into Lucid and use the ‘Lucid Inventory’ skill to open the Lucid exclusive equipment UI.

You can manage and equip your ‘Dreamy Equipment’ and ‘Dreamy Crystals’ with the menu consisting of Equipment Enhancement, Equipment Crafting, Equipment Disassembly, Dreamy Crystal Socketing, and Dreamy Crystal Fusion.
Dreamy Equipment
Dreamy Equipment Types:
Dreamy Equipment Tiers:
Dreamy Equipment Enhancement
Dreamy equipment can be enhanced up to +12. You can succeed or fail based on set rates.
When you enhance equipment, you will use ‘Dreamy Equipment Fragments’ as material.

items: You can acquire Dreamy equipment, Dreamy Crystals, and Dreamy Equipment Fragments from clearing ‘Change Burning: Nightmare Forest’.
You can acquire Dreamy Equipment Fragments by disassembling Dreamy equipment.

details.value: ※ Normal tier equipment cannot be enhanced.
Dreamy Equipment Crafting
You can use Dreamy Equipment Fragments to craft a specific equipment type and tier of your choice.

items: The higher the crafted equipment’s tier, the more Dreamy Equipment Fragments will be consumed.
You can consume an additional amount of Dreamy Equipment Fragments to increase the crafting success rate.
You can acquire Dreamy equipment, Dreamy Crystals, and Dreamy Equipment Fragments from clearing ‘Change Burning: Nightmare Forest’.
You can acquire Dreamy Equipment Fragments by disassembling Dreamy equipment.

details.value: Equipment Disassembly
You can acquire Dreamy Equipment Fragments by disassembling Dreamy equipment.

items: You can use Dreamy Equipment Fragments to enhance and craft equipment.
The number of Dreamy Equipment Fragments acquired will be based on the equipment’s enhancement stage and tier.
If you disassemble equipment with Dreamy Crystals equipped, the Dreamy Crystals will automatically be returned to you.

details.value: Dreamy Crystals
Dreamy Crystal Stats:
Dreamy Crystal Tiers:

items: Dreamy Crystal stat values are based on the tier.
Dreamy Crystal stats are determined based on a set probability.

details.value: Dreamy Crystal Socketing
You can socket any tier of crystal on any tier of Dreamy Equipment.

items: You can socket duplicate crystals of the same tier.

details.value: Dreamy Crystal Fusion
You can combine 3 Dreamy Crystals of the same tier to craft a higher tier Dreamy Crystal.

items: The success rate is based on the tier of Dreamy Crystals being combined.
You can succeed or fail based on a set probability.
When combining Legendary tier crytals, the tier will remain the same and only the stats will change.
For Unique and Legendary tier crystals,the same stats can appear.

details.value: [Back to Overview]
Dreamy Trials
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A character participating in the Change Burning: Lucid event.

details.value: Dreamy Trials
You can select ‘Dreamy Trials’ in the Event List to check the missions.
The Dreamy Trials consist of a total of 5 missions, and you can complete them by defeating specific bosses as the Change Burning: Lucid character.
When you complete a mission, you can receive the rewards corresponding to that mission in the Dreamy Trials UI.
Boss Missions:
※ You can select the desired boss in the Dreamy Trials while in a party of 1 or not in a party to move to the entry waiting map.
※ You can freely challenge and re-challenge all of the bosses in any order.
※ The bosses that appear in the Dreamy Trials are event exclusive monsters. They do not count in the ‘weekly boss defeat limit’ and do not drop what the normal bosses drop when defeated.
※ If the character participating in the event World Leaps, the event progress will be maintained and they can proceed with the event in the world they leaped to.
※ Helena will be added in the April update.
My Character Rewards:
※ The ‘My Character’ rewards will expire on June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ The ‘My Character’ rewards can only be put into storage.
※ The ‘My Character’ rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
Lucid Rewards:
※ The ‘Lucid’ rewards will expire on June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

※ The ‘Lucid’ rewards can only be claimed 1 time per character participating in the event. If you delete the Change Burning: Lucid character then participate on another character, you can claim the Lucid rewards again.
[Back to Overview]
Dream Shard Shop
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A character participating in the Change Burning: Lucid event.

details.value: ※ The Dream Shard Shop can be used by all characters level 200 or higher on the Maple ID with a character participating in the Change Burning: Lucid event.
You can select ‘Lucid Dream’ in the Event List and click the ‘Open Shop’ button in the [Dream Gifts] tab or select ‘Dream Shard Shop’ in the Event List’s coin shop tab to use the Dream Shard Shop.
※ The Dream Shard Shop purchase limits are shared between all characters in the Maple ID.

items: Adversary’s Black Cube (25 coins) [limit of 200]
Adversary’s White Additional Cube (40 coins) [limit of 200]
Adversary’s Abyss Rebirth Flame (25 coins) [limit of 200]

※ The Adversary’s Black Cube and Adversary’s White Additional Cube are items that can only be used on Genesis/Destiny weapons and Astra subweapons.
※ The Adversary’s Abyss Rebirth Flame is an item that can only be used on Genesis/Destiny weapons.
※ The items purchased from the Dream Shard Shop will expire on June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM (except for the Sol Erda Fragments).
※ The Sol Erda can only by used by characters level 260 or higher that have completed the 6th job advancement. It cannot be used if you hold 20 Sol Erda.

sections.title: Jin’s Mysterious Garden

details.value: Roll the dice with Jin to collect Growth Fertilizer and acquire a special potion unlike anything else in the world!
Event Participation Requirements

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period
You can select the ‘Jin’s Mysterious Garden’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event.
Event Progress
You can acquire dice by clicking the [Receive Dice] button in the UI. You can use the dice you acquire to move around a board consisting of a total of 40 spaces and collect ‘Growth Fertilizer’.
You can purchase various items at the ‘Growth Fertilizer Shop’ with the ‘Growth Fertilizer’ you acquire.
You can acquire various rewards based on the cumulative number of dice you roll.
Acquiring Dice
You can receive 3 dice per day by opening the Jin’s Mysterious Garden UI through the Event List and clicking the [Receive Dice] button.
You can receive dice up to 5 times per week, and up to 40 times over the event period.
※ From March 2 at 10:00 AM until March 25 at 11:59 PM, you can only receive dice 1 time. You will be provided 15 dice all at once.
You can click the [Use Pass] button to use 3,000 Maple Points and complete 1 ‘Receive Dice’ that you did not previously complete.
※ The Dice Pass can be used up to the number of claims you did not claim as of the previous week, based on the count on Thursday at 12:00 AM.
※ However, the number of Dice Passes available for the last week is limited to the number of incomplete days based on the count at 12:00 AM of the day before.
The number of dice held is shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
Rolling the Dice
You can roll the dice by pressing the [Roll] button. You will roll 3 dice at once.

After checking the dice results, you can click the [Select] button for the die you wish to move with. An arrow will indicate which space you will arrive at. If you want to use that die, you can move by pressing the [Move] button. It will move you to the indicated space.
When you arrive at a space , you will acquire an item corresponding to the space or activate the effect written on it.
After using all 3 rolled dice to move, you can roll the dice again.
Items Acquired from Spaces

items: Growth Fertilizer When you land on a space where the Growth Fertilizer item is placed, you will acquire Growth Fertilizer equal to the number written on the space. You can use the acquired Growth Fertilizer to purchase various items at the Growth Fertilizer Shop. If you land on or pass by the START point, you will acquire an additional 400 Growth Fertilizer as a pass bonus. You cannot acquire the pass bonus if you move backwards to land on or pass by the START point.
When you land on a space where the Growth Fertilizer item is placed, you will acquire Growth Fertilizer equal to the number written on the space.
You can use the acquired Growth Fertilizer to purchase various items at the Growth Fertilizer Shop.
If you land on or pass by the START point, you will acquire an additional 400 Growth Fertilizer as a pass bonus.
You cannot acquire the pass bonus if you move backwards to land on or pass by the START point.

Special Dice When you land on a space marked with a Special Dice symbol on the board, you will acquire a Special Die. After rolling normal dice, you can roll a Special Die for each result of the normal dice. The Special Dice effect is reflected in the selected dice number or amount of Fertilizer acquired on the space you land on. Special Dice Effects:
When you land on a space marked with a Special Dice symbol on the board, you will acquire a Special Die.
After rolling normal dice, you can roll a Special Die for each result of the normal dice.
The Special Dice effect is reflected in the selected dice number or amount of Fertilizer acquired on the space you land on.
Special Dice Effects:

details.value: Space Effects
The spaces are repositioned every time you land on or pass the START point.

items: Movement Space When you land on a movement space, you will be moved forward or backward by the number of spaces indicated on the space. The movement space effect will only activate 1 time per lap. If you land on a movement space that has already been used that lap, you will acquire 100 Growth Fertilizers instead.
When you land on a movement space, you will be moved forward or backward by the number of spaces indicated on the space.
The movement space effect will only activate 1 time per lap.
If you land on a movement space that has already been used that lap, you will acquire 100 Growth Fertilizers instead.
Question Mark Space When you land on a question mark space, you can choose one of the reward options below.
When you land on a question mark space, you can choose one of the reward options below.

Monsters Gold Bee and Poison-Spraying Homunculus monsters will appear on the board. There is a set rate for Mysterious Bee monsters to appear in addition. The monsters’ locations will change every time 3 moves are completed. ※ The Mysterious Bee’s location is fixed at its initial appearance location and it will not move. If you land on a space with a monster, it will activate its effect then disappear. If a Gold Bee or Poison-Spraying Homunculus monster disappears, it will reappear when you land on or pass the START space.
Gold Bee and Poison-Spraying Homunculus monsters will appear on the board. There is a set rate for Mysterious Bee monsters to appear in addition.
The monsters’ locations will change every time 3 moves are completed.
※ The Mysterious Bee’s location is fixed at its initial appearance location and it will not move.
If you land on a space with a monster, it will activate its effect then disappear.
If a Gold Bee or Poison-Spraying Homunculus monster disappears, it will reappear when you land on or pass the START space.

details.value: Cumulative Rewards
You can acquire cumulative rewards based on the total number of dice you roll.
※ Special dice are not included in this number of dice rolled.
[Back to Overview]
Growth Fertilizer Shop
A shop filled with growth items! Participate in Jin’s Mysterious Garden and exchange the Growth Fertilizer you acquire for various items!
Event Participation Requirements

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Jin’s Mysterious Garden’ event.

details.value: Event Period
You can press the [Open Shop] button in the ‘Jin’s Mysterious Garden’ event UI or press the ‘Growth Fertilizer Shop’ in the Event List to use the shop.

items: Jin’s Hyper Growth Potion (260~284) (20k coins) [limit of 1]
Jin Extreme Growth Potion (200~259) (500 coins) [limit of 20]
100 Advanced EXP Vouchers (50 coins) [limit of 100]
4x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes) (300 coins) [limit of 20]
VIP Booster (100 coins) [limit of 50]
3x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes) (100 coins) [limit of 100]

details.value: ※ The items purchased from the Growth Fertilizer Shop will expire on May 14, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ All items can only be put into storage.
※ The Jin Hyper Growth Potion (260~284) can only be used by characters level 260 or higher.

※ When a level 260~284 character uses the Jin Hyper Growth Potion (260~284), they will level up 1 time. Level 285 or higher characters will receive the amount of experience required to level up at level 284.
※ The Jin Extreme Growth Potion (200~259) cannot be used by characters with the Burning effect active.
※ When you use the Jin Extreme Growth Potion (200~259), you will level up 1~10 times based on a set rate.
※ The Jin Extreme Growth Potion (200~259) can only be used by characters level 200 or higher. Level 260 or higher characters will receive the amount of experience required to level up at level 259.
[Back to Overview]

details.value: Growth Path Reorganization
In the level 210~259 section, the amount of experience required to level up has been decreased.

items: Level 210~214 Section: ~8% decrease.
Level 215~219 Section: ~15% decrease.
Level 220~224 Section: ~21% decrease.
Level 225~229 Section: ~27% decrease.
Level 230~234 Section: ~33% decrease.
Level 235~239 Section: ~38% decrease.
Level 240~244 Section: ~43% decrease.
Level 245~249 Section: ~47% decrease.
Level 250~259 Section: ~58% decrease.

details.value: ※ For characters with more experience than the changed amount required to level up, their current experience will be adjusted by the amount required to level up at their current level.
The number of Arcane Symbols acquired from daily quest rewards has been increased from 20 to 40.
The number of Arcane Symbols acquired from weekly content rewards has been increased from 40 to 80.
The number of Authentic Symbols acquired from daily quest rewards has been increased from 10 to 15 (20 to 30 for Cernium).
[Back to Overview]
Enhancement Reorganization
The Star Force Enhancement and Trace Transfer systems have been reorganized.

items: The Star Catch system has been removed. The increased success rate when the Star Catch was completed will now be applied by default.
Star Catch related achievements have been moved to the Memory tab and can no longer be completed.

When Star Force enhancing an item and it is destroyed, the Trace item’s Star Force value will be set to the number of stars it was at before it was boomed. However, when enhancing items at 23 stars or higher, if they are destroyed the Trace will be set at 22 stars.

details.value: ※ For Superior equipment items, this change will not be applied and they will be maintained at 0 stars.
※ For Trace items acquired before the March 19, 2026 maintenance, this change will not be applied.

items: When using the Trace Transfer feature, you can now pay a certain amount of mesos and number of equipment items based on the Trace item’s required level and Star Force value to fully restore the Trace at that number of stars.
You can still choose to restore the Trace to 12 stars by just paying one of the same equipment item (like before).

details.value: ※ When restoring Zero’s weapons Lapis and Lazuli Trace items, it will only require 1 equipment item. However, for Type 8 or higher that require specific Essences, you will need an additional number of those Essences. (19~20 Stars: 1, 21 Stars: 2, 22 Stars: 3).

※ When restoring Astra Subweapon Trace items, it will only require 1 equipment item. However, you will need to pay additional mesos after the base restore cost. (19~20 Stars: 1b mesos, 21 Stars: 2b mesos, 22 Stars: 3b mesos).

※ When restoring Destiny 2nd Transcendence Weapon Trace items, it will only require 1 equipment item. However, for Zero’s weapons Destiny Lapis and Lazuli, you will need an additional number of Destiny Essences. For all other weapons, you will need to pay additional mesos after the base restore cost. (19~20 Stars: 1 Destiny Essence or 10b mesos, 21 Stars: 2 Destiny Essences or 20b mesos, 22 Stars: 3 Destiny Essences or 30b mesos).
The Bonus Stats related systems have been reorganized.

items: The ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’ has been added that lets you reset bonus stats using mesos. You can use it through the unified enhancement UI’s ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’. When using the ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’, you can choose between the Before or After roll. The ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’s stat appearance rates are applied the same as Black Rebirth Flames. The bonus stats reset cost is 3m mesos.
You can use it through the unified enhancement UI’s ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’.
When using the ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’, you can choose between the Before or After roll.
The ‘Bonus Stats Reset System’s stat appearance rates are applied the same as Black Rebirth Flames.
The bonus stats reset cost is 3m mesos.
A new Rebirth Flame, the ‘Blazing Rebirth Flame’ has been added. The stat appearance rates are applied the same as Powerful Rebirth Flames, but you can choose between the Before or After roll.
The stat appearance rates are applied the same as Powerful Rebirth Flames, but you can choose between the Before or After roll.

Boss monsters, Elite Monsters, and Elite Champions will no longer drop the following items. Powerful Rebirth Flame Eternal Rebirth Flame Black Rebirth Flame Unquenchable Flame Eternal Unquenchable Flame Eternal Unquenchable Black Flame Rebirth Fragment

The Maple Union Coin Shop will now sell Blazing Rebirth Flames and Karma Blazing Rebirth Flames.
The Maple Union Coin Shop’s purchase limit of Karma Black Rebirth Flames has been increased from 40 to 60.
Monster Collection exploration rewards will no longer include Powerful Rebirth Flames or Eternal Rebirth Flames.

details.value: New Potential and Additional Potential related items have been added.

items: The new ‘Gold Cube’, ‘Silver Cube’, and ‘Bronze Additional Cube’ items have been added. Gold Cube: The stat appearance and tier up rates are the same as Meister Cubes, but you can choose between the Before or After roll. Silver Cube: The stat appearance and tier up rates are the same as Craftsman Cubes, but you can choose between the Before or After roll. Bronze Additional Cube: The stat appearance and tier up rates are the same as Strange Additional Cubes, but you can choose between the Before or After roll.

details.value: ※ ‘Gold Cubes’, ‘Silver Cubes’, and ‘Bronze Additional Cubes’ do not apply the tier up pity system.

items: The new enhancement item prefix ‘Memento’ has been added. If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item, that equipment will become ‘Memento Engraved’ and untradeable for 30 days, regardless of its tradeability. You cannot use Platinum Karma Scissors, Karma Scissors, Silver Karma Scissors, or the Share Name Tag on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’. You cannot use the Equipment Transfer system on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’. If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item that is already ‘Memento Engraved’, the untradeable period will be reset to 30 days from when the enhancement item was used on it.
If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item, that equipment will become ‘Memento Engraved’ and untradeable for 30 days, regardless of its tradeability.
You cannot use Platinum Karma Scissors, Karma Scissors, Silver Karma Scissors, or the Share Name Tag on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’.
You cannot use the Equipment Transfer system on equipment items that are ‘Memento Engraved’.

If you use a ‘Memento’-prefixed enhancement item on an equipment item that is already ‘Memento Engraved’, the untradeable period will be reset to 30 days from when the enhancement item was used on it.
When you defeat certain boss monsters, they will now be guaranteed to drop the following cube rewards.

details.value: ※ The number of cube rewards is fixed regardless of your drop rate.
※ However, for Black Mage (Hard), the rewards will be added starting from April 1, 2026.
The Auto Enchant system has been added.

items: You can use the Auto Enchant system through the unified enhancement UI’s Star Force, Bonus Stats, Potential, and Additional Potential tabs.
You can press the Auto Enchant button at the bottom right of the unified enhancement UI to set your target stages.
After setting your target stages, you can click the Auto Enchant button to proceed with automatic enchanting.
The Auto Enchant will stop when it meets your target, consumes all enhancement material, or the equipment is destroyed.
For Auto Enchant of potential and additional potential, it will stop when the sum of the reset potential values is higher than the sum of the target potential values.
For Auto Enchant of bonus stats, it will stop when the reset bonus stats satisfy all of the target bonus stat values.

You can use the ‘Stop Reset on Combat Power Increase’ option to stop the Auto Enchant if the reset bonus stats, potential, or additional potential results in a Combat Power increase, regardless of your target values.

details.value: ※ You can stop the Auto Enchant by pressing Space Bar, ESC, Enter, or by clicking the Cancel Enchant button.
※ Potential and Additional Potential Auto Enchant can only be used on Legendary tier items.
※ All Stats % from potential stats is calculated by being added to STR %, DEX %, INT %, and LUK %.

※ For Bonus Stats, you can set the maximum target up to rank 6. However, for STR/DEX/INT/LUK stats, you can set the maximum target as the sum of four combinations of rank 6 stats that include each of them.
※ The Auto Enchant feature cannot be used when Star Forcing with Miraculous Equipment enhancement Scrolls, Advanced Equipment Enhancement Scrolls, or Equipment Enhancement Scrolls.
※ The Auto Enchant feature cannot be used in the Guild Castle’s Enhancement Altar map.
※ The ‘Stop Reset on Combat Power Increase’ option can only be used on items that you can equip.
※ The ‘Stop Reset on Combat Power Increase’ option can only be used on flames and cubes that let you choose between Before and After.

details.value: You can use the following content in the <Crossroads of Heaven>.

items: <Hall of Refinement> When you meet certain set conditions during combat, you can register a replay in the <Hall of Afterimages>. When you register a replay, you can receive the Sigridroid through the ‘[Training Grounds] A Gift For Those Who Have Proven Themselves’ quest. Only characters with 300m Combat Power or higher can enter the <Hall of Refinement>. When you enter the <Hall of Refinement>, your skills’ cooldowns will be reset (except for certain skills), and your charge-type skills, job gauges, and Soul Weapon’s Soul will be fully charged. When you enter the <Hall of Refinement>, you can only bring and use some of your held items. The usable types of items are as follows. The ‘Maple Coin Exchange’ menu has been removed from the Quick Move menu.

In the unified enhancement UI, when you successfully Star Force enhance an item multiple times at once, the icon cutscene will now be displayed all at once.

In the unified enhancement UI, a UI where you can check item information has been added during full screen enhancement cutscenes when using potential, additional potential, bonus stats, and scroll enhancements with Return Scrolls.

You can now unregister items in the Guild Castle item display case UI using the Reset button.
Skill cooldowns will now be displayed even when they are below 5 seconds.
The ‘Skill Cooldown and Buff Duration Display Method’ option has been added tot he Game Settings’ UI tab.

items: Default: Displays in seconds for durations less than 1 minute, and in minutes for durations 1 minute or higher.
Seconds: Displays in seconds for durations less than 10 minutes.
Minutes + Seconds: Displays in minute:second format for durations between 1 minute and 10 minutes.

details.value: When talking to the NPC Adobis at the ‘Gate to Zakum’, the ‘Receive Offerings to Zakum’ option has been removed.
The ‘Prioritize Displaying my Character and Monsters in Boss Content’ option has been added to the Game Settings’ Laboratory tab.

items: You can enable this option through the checkbox. When enabled, your character and monsters’ images will be displayed on top of effects.
You can set the transparency of the displayed images by using the transparency slider.

When enabled, certain monster debuff effects displayed above the character’s head and character skill debuff icons displayed above the monsters’ heads will be displayed on top of effects and character/monster images. However, these icons will not be affected by transparency settings.

Giving away a Hyper Burning Booster to commemorate the 23rd anniversary! Receive the 1+4 storm level up benefit until level 260 together with growth support gifts!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: All characters.

details.value: ※ Zero characters must complete Chapter 2 to participate in the event.
Event Period:

items: March 19, 2026 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Hyper Burning Booster Giveaway’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to claim a Hyper Burning Booster (once per Maple ID).
Hyper Burning Booster Usage Requirements:

items: A level 10~258 character that is not currently a Hyper Burning character or a level 100~258 Zero character.

details.value: Hyper Burning Booster Usage Effects:

items: When you use the Hyper Burning Booster, the 1+4 level up Burning effect will be applied.
The effect will be applied from level 10~260, until June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
When used on a character that is receiving the Tera Burning or Mega Burning effects, that character’s Tera Burning/Mega Burning effect will disappear.
If you delete a character that is receiving the Hyper Burning Booster effect, it will disappear.

details.value: Hyper Burning Booster Character Benefits
When you use the Hyper Burning Booster on an existing character, you will only receive the rewards for the levels you reach after you used the Hyper Burning Booster.
Hyper Burning Booster characters will receive the following rewards through the Hyper Burning Booster UI when they reach certain conditions.
※ All items claimed from this event UI are untradeable.
※ All reward items can only be acquired 1 time per character. After claiming a reward, even if you delete and recreate the character, you cannot receive the reward again.

※ The Eternal Flame Title Voucher, Core Gemstones, and Infinite Flame Title Voucher rewards can only be claimed by characters who have completed the 5th job advancement and the ‘Another Power, Arcane Force’ quest.
※ Each area’s Arcane Symbol reward can be claimed after completing that area’s quest that rewards the Arcane Symbol.
※ The Level 5 Authentic Symbol: Cernium reward can be claimed after completing the ‘Another Power, Authentic Force’ quest.
※ When using the Selective Arcane/Authentic Symbol Vouchers, you can only acquire Symbols from areas in which you have completed the Arcane River/Grandis story quests.
※ You can acquire the ‘Authentic Symbol: Cernium, Arcs, Odium, Shangri-La, Carcion’ or ‘Grand Authentic Symbol: Tallahart’ from the Selective Authentic Symbol Vouchers.
※ Existing characters who already have an Eternal Flame Ring cannot acquire a duplicate Eternal Flame Ring with the Eternal Flame Ring Voucher.
※ Zero will not receive the Black Weapon Box, Black Secondary Weapon Box, or the 15 Star Time-Limited Fafnir Weapon Box.
※ For Zero characters, they cannot use the Absolabs weapon so they will only receive the Dominator Pendant when they reach level 220.

※ If you are using Arcane Catalyst to move Symbols, you must first stabilize the Unstable Symbol and then receive the Level 7 Arcane Symbols from the level achievement awards to enhance them normally.
