sections.title: VIP Sauna

details.value: Spend time in the VIP Sauna to acquire a large amount of experience!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: In the Event List’s ‘Use the VIP Sauna’ event, you can use 3,000 Maple Points to charge your VIP Sauna usage time by 1 hour. You can charge it by up to 48 hours per week in this way.
If you use a VIP Sauna Ticket, your VIP Sauna usage time will be charged by 30 minutes.
※ The charged VIP Sauna usage time is shared between all characters within the Maple ID.

While you have remaining VIP Sauna usage time, you can select the ‘Use the VIP Sauna’ event from the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to the Hotel Staff in <Sleepywood: Sleepywood Hotel Lobby> to enter <Sleepywood: VIP Sauna Room>.
While you are inside the <Sleepywood: VIP Sauna Room>, you will automatically acquire experience based on your level every 5 seconds.
※ Characters over level 294 that enter the VIP Sauna Room will receive the same amount of experience as a level 294 character.
※ When the VIP Sauna usage time runs out, you will automatically return to your original location or <Sleepywood: Sleepywood Hotel Lobby>.
※ After the event period ends, you will not be able to acquire experience even if you had remaining VIP Sauna usage time.
※ On Red PC, the VIP Sauna experience acquisition will be decreased by 50%.
You can receive Maple Home furniture items based on your cumulative VIP Sauna charge time.

※ Maple Home requires a level 260 or higher character that has completed ‘The Day After’ story within the world. You can then complete the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’ quest through the lightbulb icon to create a Maple Home.
※ Maple Home is shared between all characters within the world. The furniture acquired from the Voucher can be used by all characters within the Maple ID.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: Spend time in the VIP Sauna to acquire a large amount of experience!

sections.title: Mechaberry Farm

details.value: The Mechaberry army has attacked the strawberry farm! Help Spiegelmann stop them and get lots of experience!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 280~299 character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: When you use a ‘Mechaberry Farm Entry Ticket’, you can go to the <Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle Entrance> through the ‘Mechaberry Farm’ event in the Event List.
You can talk to Spiegelmann at the entrance to enter the ‘Strawberry Farm Battle’.
※ You can acquire ‘Mechaberry Farm Entry Tickets’ through the Momentum Pass and the event meso shop.
Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle
In ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’, you will have 30 minutes to defeat the Mechaberry army to restore the farm and acquire experience based on your level.
※ You will automatically exit when you defeat Mechaberry Psi and restore the farm to 100%.
※ You can enter Mechaberry Farm for up to 24 hours from the time you use the Entry Ticket.
※ Any additional experience effects are not applied in ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’, and Multikills will not occur.
If you leave before the farm is restored to 100%, you can freely re-enter Mechaberry Farm until your farm usage time limit ends.
※ If you leave the farm while the Fever is activated, the Fever Gauge will be reset when you re-enter.
※ You can only use another Entry Ticket when the previous farm usage time limit ends or the farm is restored to 100%.
Spiegel Burst
This is a special attacking skill that you can use by pressing the NPC Chat/Harvest key in the ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’.
When you defeat Mechaberry army troops, you will acquire Fever Points. When you acquire 3000 Points, Fever mode will be activated for 10 seconds.
※ While Fever mode is activated, you can use Spiegel Burst without any cooldowns.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: The Mechaberry army has attacked the strawberry farm! Help Spiegelmann stop them and get lots of experience!

sections.title: New Name Auction

details.value: A chance to get the name you want! Try using Mister New Name’s New Name Auction!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 10 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 24, 2025 at 10:00 AM ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: ※ You can register character names for sale until January 11, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
You can select the ‘New Name Auction’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to Mister New Name in main towns to enter the New Name Auction.
New Name Auction
After entering, you can proceed with the character name auction. The New Name Auction can be used on a per Maple ID basis, and you use Maple Points in the auction.

items: You can only sell or bid on character names on Green PCs.
You can set the sale price for 30,000~59,999,999 Maple Points.
When registering a name for sale, you can choose between 8 hours, 24 hours, and 48 hours for the auction’s duration.
You can only sell 1 character name at a time. You can only be trading up to 10 names at a time, including selling, bidding, and unclaimed completed trades.
In an auction, you can bid on a name with a price higher than a certain amount than the currently registered highest bid.
The minimum bid amount depends on the current highest bid.
The auction will end between 2 minutes before and 2 minutes after the specified auction end time. When it ends, the highest bidder will win the character name.
Completed trade details are stored until May 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM, and will be automatically deleted if the name and payment are not claimed during this period.
After the event ends, you can claim your names and payment through the NPC Mister New Name.

details.value: ※ Character names that violate the name policy are subject to sanctions, and they may be sanctioned when attempting to trade them.
※ Selling character names is only available to characters that have been created at least 90 days ago.
※ Characters who have changed names within 1 week cannot sell their names.
※ After a new name is received through the New Name Auction, that character cannot change its name through Mister New Name for 1 week.
※ Regardless of the time that the character’s name was changed, you can receive names you have won in the New Name Auction or return unsold character names.
※ Reselling character names won during the event is prohibited.
※ Selling and bidding cancellations due to changing your mind are not possible. Character names cannot be restored after a trade has concluded.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: A chance to get the name you want! Try using Mister New Name’s New Name Auction!

details.value: Move your names quickly and safely! Try using the Nickname Express!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 10 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 24, 2025 at 10:00 AM ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Nickname Express’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate.
※ Characters who have been created within the past 3 months or have changed their names within the past week cannot use the Nickname Express.
Name Extraction

You can login to the character whose name you want to extract and select the ‘Extract name’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can pay 30,000 Maple Points to extract that character’s current name.
※ When the extraction is complete, it cannot be canceled. Please make sure you are extracting the name from the right character.
Name Transfer
You can login to the character you want to apply the name to and select the ‘Apply extracted name’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can apply the extracted name.
Extracted character names can be applied to any character in your Maple ID, regardless of the world.
※ After extracting and transferring a name, you cannot list it for sale on the New Name Auction for 1 week.
[Back to Overview]

sections.title: Custom Illustration Event

details.value: [Custom Illustration] The Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations
Michelovinci, the wandering artist who draws illustrations by reading energy. Help him adapt to your energy and receive Illustration Request Tickets!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 270 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 25, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations’ event or ‘‘Wandering Artist That Reads the World’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate. You can also talk to the NPC Michelovinci and complete the corresponding quests to participate.
※ The participation is per Maple ID.
※ The event completion period is different based on the participating character’s level.
The Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations

You can complete the event by participating through the NPC Michelovinci or through the Event List during the event period matching your character’s level. The event participation periods are as follows.

When you complete the event, you will receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket. If you don’t claim it instantly, you can receive it on another level 10 or higher character within the Maple ID through the Event List or the NPC Michelovinci.
The Wandering Artist That Draws the World

You can complete the event by participating through the NPC Michelovinci or through the Event List during the event period matching your character’s level. The event participation periods are as follows.

When you complete the event, you will receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket. If you don’t claim it instantly, you can receive it on another level 10 or higher character within the Maple ID through the Event List or the NPC Michelovinci.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket is an item that lets you request a custom illustration.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket will expire 30 days after being acquired, and can only be put into storage.
※ You can participate in the ‘Wandering Artist That Reads the World’ event even if you don’t participate in the ‘Wandering Artist that Draws Illustrations’ event.
※ If you reach a certain character level during the event period, you can participate in the event period corresponding to your new level.
[Back to Overview]
[Custom Illustration] Colourful Energy
The wandering artist Michelovinci wants to understand the world by gathering the energy of various colours. Help him experience the diverse world of colours and receive Illustration Request Tickets!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: January 1, 2026 at 10:00 AM ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Colourful Energy’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate. You can also talk to the NPC Michelovinci and complete the corresponding quests to participate.
※ The participation is per Maple ID.
Colourful Energy
You will collect Colourful Energy whenever you defeat monsters within your level range on a character within the Maple ID.
When you have collected 50,000 Colourful Energy, you can complete the quest through the Event List or by talking to the NPC Michelovinci to receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket.

You can complete this quest up to 4 times per week. The completion count will refresh every Thursday at 12:00 Am. If you have completed the quest 4 times in a week, you can start it again after the weekly refresh.
The amount of collected Colourful Energy will not reset even when the quest completion count refreshes.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket is an item that lets you request a custom illustration.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket will expire 30 days after being acquired, and can only be put into storage.
※ The weekly Colourful Energy completions are calculated based on the date that you complete the quest.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: Michelovinci, the wandering artist who draws illustrations by reading energy. Help him adapt to your energy and receive Illustration Request Tickets!

For players whose character setting efficiencies have changed due to the Kinesis remaster, we are providing support to make it easy to change their HEXA Core enhancements and Ability settings.

items: Kinesis characters created before December 18, 2025 at 12:00 AM.

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

※ If the Ability rank is Unique or lower, you cannot use the Change Circulator.

The stats that can be changed and the stats after the change are as follows.
※ If you change your ‘Boss Damage’ stat, you can choose one of ‘Magic Attack’, ‘Buff Duration’, or ‘Critical Rate’ to change the stat to.

details.value: [Back to Overview]
V Matrix Reorganization
The V Matrix system has been reorganized.

items: The V Matrix system has been reorganized so that you can acquire V Points through Core Gemstones and use them to enhance your V Cores.
You can acquire V Points through Core Gemstones, and you can hold up to 9,999 V Points.
You will acquire a certain number of V Points based on the type of Core Gemstone as follows.

details.value: ※ The ‘Spider in Mirror’ core can be unlocked by using the ‘Mirror World’s Core Gemstone’ 1 time. Subsequent uses will provide V Points.
※ The ‘Crest of the Solar’ core can be unlocked by using the ‘Mitra’s Core Gemstone’ 1 time. Subsequent uses will provide V Points.

items: V Cores have been reclassified as Job Cores, Enhancement Cores, Common Cores, and Special Cores. Job Core: When activated, you can acquire skills exclusive to your job. They can be enhanced up to level 30. Enhancement Core: When activated, you can enhance 4th job and lower, and Hyper skills. They can be enhanced up to level 60. Common Core: When activated, you can acquire skills common to multiple jobs. They can be enhanced up to level 30. Special Core: When activated, you can activate specific effects when you meet special conditions in combat. You can unlock multiple Special Cores, but only 1 can be equipped at a time.
Job Core: When activated, you can acquire skills exclusive to your job. They can be enhanced up to level 30.
Enhancement Core: When activated, you can enhance 4th job and lower, and Hyper skills. They can be enhanced up to level 60.
Common Core: When activated, you can acquire skills common to multiple jobs. They can be enhanced up to level 30.
Special Core: When activated, you can activate specific effects when you meet special conditions in combat. You can unlock multiple Special Cores, but only 1 can be equipped at a time.

details.value: NOTE: If you want to see the amount of required V Points to level up skills, you can check this page on Namu Wiki.

items: Special Cores can be accessed through the button in the top right corner of the V Matrix. They cost 14 V Points to unlock. You can click on an unlocked Special Core to equip it.
You can right-click on an unlocked Special Core to extend its duration. The amount of V Points consumed will be based on the duration it is being extended (maximum 48).
You can reset your V Point allocation by spending 10m mesos.
You can convert 2 V Points into 1 Core Gemstone, which can only be put into storage.
The slot enhancement and slot expansion based on character level features have been removed.

items: Job Cores and Skill Cores Equipped Cores will be transferred to match the reorganized V Matrix levels without any separate enhancements. Unequipped Cores will be converted into V Points based on their disassembled value.
Equipped Cores will be transferred to match the reorganized V Matrix levels without any separate enhancements.
Unequipped Cores will be converted into V Points based on their disassembled value.

details.value: ※ However, for Kinesis, if all 4 Job Cores are at max level, they will be transferred to max level V Cores. If they are not maxed, they will be converted into V Points based on the number of Core Gemstones required to enhance them.

items: Enhancement Cores Equipped Cores will be converted into V Points based on the number of Core Gemstones required to enhance them. If the Enhancement Cores’ converted V Points are 444 or higher, all Enhancement Cores will be transferred as max level and the extra V Points will be provided. Unequipped Cores will be converted into V Points based on their disassembled value.

Special Cores Equipped Special Cores will maintain their expiration date and equipped status. Unequipped Special Cores will maintain their expiration date. However, if you have 2 or more of the same Core in your inventory, only the one with the longest expiration date will be maintained. The remaining Cores will be disassembled and you will receive 1.6 V Points per 1 day past 7 days of their remaining expiration date. Expired Special Cores will be converted into 3 V Points per Core.

details.value: [Back to Overview]
Buff Manager and Buff Reorganization
The Buff Manager system has been added.

items: You can click on the Buff Manager button on the Buff Sequence to open the Buff Manager UI.
You can check and buy important buff items through the Buff Manager.
You can double-click on an item icon in the Buff Manager to buy it.
Even if you don’t currently have a buff item, you can register it in a Sequence through the Buff Manager.
Items that can be purchased in the Cash Shop can only be bought using Maple Points through this UI.
You can double-click on items that can be purchased in the Maple Auction to instantly go to the Maple Auction with that item already searched for.

details.value: The Buy Buffs in Bulk feature has been added.

items: You can click the ‘Buy Buffs in Bulk’ button in the Buff Sequence to buy all buffs registered in a Sequence.
You can only buy items while clicking on a Sequence, and only the buff items in the clicked Sequence will be bought.

details.value: ※ Items that can be purchased in the Maple Auction cannot be bought through the Buy Buffs in Bulk feature.
The Buff Items tab has been added to the Maple Auction.

items: You can double-click on an icon in the Buff Items tab to instantly search for the selected item.
Double-clicking a buff icon will automatically search for the lowest price.

details.value: The Elixir of Honor has been added.

items: Characters level 200 or higher who have completed the ‘[Collector’s Request] quests can buy the Elixir of Honor from the Collector NPC.

details.value: ※ If a character within the same world has cleared the ‘[Collector’s Request]’ quests, then other characters level 200 or higher can buy the Collector’s Elixirs.
※ The Elixir of Honor can only be put into storage, and is permanent.
※ The Elixir of Honor cannot be used in certain maps, including boss battle maps, Mu Lung Dojo, Sharenian’s Underground Culvert, and event maps.
※ The Boss Practice Mode/Foggy Forest Training Centre Elixir of Honor does not have a separate duration.
The following items’ expiration dates have been removed and they have been changed into permanent items. They can now be put into storage.

Soul Collection Reorganization
The Soul List feature has been reorganized.

items: You can sort the list by selecting your desired order and conditions using the drop-down box on the left.
You can use the Favourites feature to sort your frequently accesed monsters to the top of the list.
You can now check the Soul Collection levels for each monster in the list at a glance.
You can now view the selected monster on the right side of the UI at the same time as the list.

details.value: The Detailed Information feature has been reorganized.

items: You can now check the regular and Magnificent Soul Skills’ information without any additional actions.
An indicator has been added for the currently equipped Soul Skill.

details.value: Soul Shard items will now be instantly reflected in the Soul Collection UI when acquired.

items: The Soul Shards held by a character will now be displayed in each monster’s page or the Bulk Craft UI.
All Soul Shard items previously held in bags, inventory, and the boss reward storage will be automatically reflected in the Soul Collection UI.

details.value: ※ All held Soul Shard items will be removed after being reflected in the UI.
※ You can hold up to 99,999 Soul Shards for each monster.
※ The Piggy Bar Soul Shards, Pink Mong Soul Shards, and Premium PC Room Soul Shards can be exchanged for Souls by usign the Soul Shards like before.
You can now craft Souls in the Soul Collection UI.

items: You can craft a selected monster’s Soul through the ‘Soul Craft’ button.

The ‘Bulk Soul Craft’ feature has been added. The ‘Auto Input’ feature lets you automatically input the Souls you want to craft based on the available space in your bag and inventory. You can reset the inputted Soul quantity. You can check the acquisition rate for each Soul.
The ‘Auto Input’ feature lets you automatically input the Souls you want to craft based on the available space in your bag and inventory.
You can reset the inputted Soul quantity.
You can check the acquisition rate for each Soul.

details.value: The Soul Registration feature has been reorganized.

items: You can register monsters’ Souls through the ‘Soul Register’ button or by dragging and dropping them on to the right side of the UI.

The ‘Bulk Soul Register’ feature has been added. You can click on unregistered Souls to register them at once. You can use the ‘Auto Select’ feature to select time-limited untradeable regular Souls all at once. Registration results will be displayed in the chat window, up to a maximum of 5.
You can click on unregistered Souls to register them at once.
You can use the ‘Auto Select’ feature to select time-limited untradeable regular Souls all at once.
Registration results will be displayed in the chat window, up to a maximum of 5.

details.value: ※ Magnificent Souls will not be be selected by the ‘Auto Select’ feature.
You can now extract Souls in the Soul Collection UI.

items: You can now extract permanent regular Soul items to acquire Soul Shards without having to consume any additional items.

details.value: ※ You can select Souls to extract in groups of 5, and the Soul Shards acquired from disassembly may be different from the extracted Souls.
※ You cannot extracted time-limited Souls, Magnificent Souls, and certain other Souls.
※ You can no longer acquire Soul Disassemblers from Gold Apples.
Murmur’s Soul has been added to the Soul Collection.
Cygnus’ normal illustration has been updated in the Soul Collection.
The Full Menu’s ‘Soul Weapon’ option has been changed to ‘Soul Collection’.
A Soul Collection hotkey has been added.
The Soul Weapon UI has been changed.

items: You can now open the Soul Weapon UI from the Soul Collection UI.
The Soul Weapon UI design has been changed.

details.value: Soul item tooltips will now display if they are already registered in the Soul Collection or not.
The Soul Skill tooltip will now display the Soul Skill usage command.
[Back to Overview]
Item Trade UI Reorganization
The existing ‘Regular Item Trade’ and ‘Cash Item Trade’ features have been unified into one UI that lets you trade any type of item.
The ‘Registration’ process has been added.

items: You can place the items you want to send to the other person, press the ‘Register’ button to complete the registration process, then click the ‘Trade’ button to proceed with the trade.

details.value: The ‘View Character Info’ button has been added.
[Back to Overview]
World Meso Unification
Mesos will now be shared between all characters within the same world.

items: After the update, all mesos held by each character within the world will be combined and unified.
The storage’s meso storage feature will be maintained.

When you World Leap, you can login to a character in the new world and click the ‘Receive World Leap Mesos’ notification to claim your mesos. If you have remaining mesos to claim, the notification will appear each time you login.

details.value: The maximum meso hold limit has been changed to 9,999,999,999,999 (~10t mesos).
[Back to Overview]
Voice Chat
The Voice Chat feature has been added that lets you communicate with your party members through voice.

items: You can choose to use Voice Chat or not when creating a party.
Parties using Voice Chat can access the Voice Chat settings UI through the party UI.
You can adjust microphone sensitivity, microphone and audio volumes through the Voice Chat settings UI.
The party leader can start or stop using Voice Chat through the Voice Chat settings UI.
The default audio device of the PC you are using MapleStory on will be used as the sound device.
When you use the Voice Chat for the first time, there may be delays sometimes in connecting to the sound device.
You cannot use or connect to Voice Chat in the following cases. Using a non-default audio device while using multiple PCs at the same time. Chat restriction is applied. Using MapleStory on Mac OS.
Using a non-default audio device while using multiple PCs at the same time.
Chat restriction is applied.
Using MapleStory on Mac OS.

details.value: You can link your Nexon account and Discord account.

items: You can link your Discord account by using the Options UI’s Chat & Invite tab.
If you link your Discord account, you can view your Discord friends list in-game.

details.value: [Back to Overview]
MapleStory Collection Cards
The <MapleStory Collection Cards> have been released.

items: You can collect cards featuring the stunning appearances of MapleStory classes and enjoy your personal collection in-game.
For MapleStory Collection Card sale and product information, please check the separate information page.

details.value: NOTE: You can see all 152 cards in this YouTube video.
Registering Cards

items: You can scan the QR code on the back of a Collection Card using the MapleHands+ app to register the card.

details.value: ※ You can only register 1 Collection Card of each type. You cannot register duplicate cards of the same type.
※ 1 Collection Card can only be reigstered 1 time. Already registered cards cannot be registered again.
※ Registered Collection Cards are saved per Maple ID.
※ You can only register MapleStory Collection Cards CLASS EDITION until December 31, 2026.
Checking In-Game

items: When you register a card, you can start the ‘[Collection Card] Magician Cootie’s Call’ quest.

After completing all related quests, you will acquire the ‘Collection Card Binder’ furniture. You can install it in your Maple Home and use it to open the dedicated UI where you can check your Collection Cards.
Other players can visit your home and use the ‘Collection Card Binder’ to check your collection.

details.value: ※ Quest progress is shared between all worlds, and can only be completed once per Maple ID.

※ Maple Home requires a level 260 or higher character that has completed ‘The Day After’ story within the world. You can then complete the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’ quest through the lightbulb icon to create a Maple Home.
※ The ‘Collection Card Binder’ furniture can be used by all characters within the same Maple ID.
Collection Card Rewards

items: When you register a cumulative number of cards and meet certain conditions, you can receive the following rewards.

details.value: ※ The rewards can only be claimed once per Maple ID, regardless of world.
[Back to Overview]
Custom Illustrations
Custom illustrations based on your own unique outfits! Save your illustrations and apply them you desire when viewing stories or looking at the character info window!
Custom Illustration Introduction

items: The Custom Illustration system uses generative AI to transform your character’s appearance into an illustration in MapleStory’s art style.
Custom illustrations will be operated as a beta service after the update.
To use custom illustrations, you need an ‘Illustration Request Ticket’ item. For detailed instructions on how to acquire them, please check the ‘Custom Illustration Event’ section.

Accounts with a level 270 or higher character will be entered automatically in the pre-request event. You can check the results immediately after logging in during the event period. For more information, please check the ‘Custom Illustration Pre-Request Event’ page.

details.value: How to Request an Illustration

items: After customizing your character with your desired appearance, you can click the Custom Illustration button in the character info window, use the Illustration Request Ticket, or talk to the Moving Easel NPC to open the Custom Illustration window.
If you have an Illustration Request Ticket, you can click the ‘Request an Illustration’ button to start the request.
After a certain amount of time has passed after your request, a notification will appear that opens the Custom Illustration UI where you can check your request results.
You can select all of the illustrations that you wish to save from the request results and click ‘Finish’ to complete the request.

details.value: Applying Illustrations

items: You can select and apply one of your saved illustrations from the Custom Illustration window.
You can set each illustration’s background colour to either a solid colour or a gradient.
The currently applied illustration will appear in the story dialogue windows instead of your character sprite and job illustration.

The currently applied illustration will also be displayed in the Custom Illustration window in the Character Info UI. You can change the settings to display this or not when other characters view your character’s info.
You can change the custom illustration’s application range through the Custom Illustration UI’s options. Display in Story Dialogue Share with Other Characters View Other Characters’ Illustrations
Display in Story Dialogue
Share with Other Characters
View Other Characters’ Illustrations

details.value: Notes When Requesting Illustrations

items: The following things will not be included in the requested appearance. Weapon and secondary weapon items Effect items, Cash effects, weapon effects Character’s actions, motions, and emotes Character’s mounts and chairs Transformations and Illusion Rings
Weapon and secondary weapon items
Effect items, Cash effects, weapon effects
Character’s actions, motions, and emotes
Character’s mounts and chairs
Transformations and Illusion Rings
You cannot complete a request while wearing a collaboration item, items that have poor results, or items that may have inappropriate results. Please follow the instructions when requesting.

An illustration request’s results can be viewed for about 7 days after requesting. However, if the request is not completed within that period, it will expire and can no longer be saved. Please make sure to save them within the period.
If you have an activate illustration request on another character in your account, you cannot proceed with another request on a different character at the same time.

For Zero characters, the custom illustration storage slots are separate for Alpha and Beta. The request results can only be saved on the character that submitted the request. In addition, each Alpha and Beta character is assigned a separate custom illustration, so every time the character is Tagged, the corresponding custom illustration will be applied.
Custom illustrations will not be applied in the story dialogue windows in certain Zero class stories.
For Angelic Buster characters, the illustrations can be applied to both Normal and Dress-Up Mode. The corresponding custom illustration will be applied based on the character’s Mode.
If you World Leap a character while a request is in-progress, the request resutls will disappear. Please save the request results before World Leaping.
The saved illustrations are stored per character, and if the character is deleted, the saved illustrations will also be deleted.

details.value: ※ Please understand that the list of items that cannot be included in a request may change in real time.
※ The illustration results are created using generative AI, so the quality and elements of each results may vary.

The limit on the number of items with the Colouring Prism/Colouring Prism Pro/Weapon Effect Prism applied that could be equipped has been removed.

The changed colours of items with the Colouring Prism/Colouring Prism Pro/Weapon Effect Prism applied will no longer be displayed on MapleHands+, the homepage, and certain content UI that display character appearances.
Developer Notes:

We have confirmed that it will take more time to resolve the server load issues caused by Colouring Prisms/Colouring Prism Pro/Weapon Effect Prisms, so in this update, we have changed it so that you can equip any number of items with Prisms applied with no more restrictions. However, instead of that, we have limited the display of changed colours from Prisms in certain content.
This is a temporary measure, and we will strive to resolve the root cause of the server load issue as quickly as possible to restore normal usage of Prism items.
We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused by this inability to provide a stable service.

Challengers World Benefits

All characters in Challengers World will receive the special [Challengers Beginner] skill while they are in the world. In addition, based on the Tier you reach from Challengers Missions, the skill will grow step-by-step.

In Challengers World, you can create up to 3 Tera Burning characters. You can create a Zero character if you have a level 100 or higher character in Challengers World. Characters designated as Tera Burning characters will receive the following benefits:

Event Details

You can only use one world out of Challengers, Challengers 2, Challengers 3, and Challengers 4, whichever one you first create a character on. Deleting the character will not change the world you can use. You can create up to 5 characters.

details.value: There are a few main mechanics when fighting Kai.

items: While fighting Kai, the Chrono Gauge (top half of the UI) will fill automatically. However, it will be decreased if you are hit by Kai’s attacks.

You can use the Chrono Step skill (bottom half of the UI) with the NPC Chat/Harvest key. When used, you will dash in a direction while avoiding Kai’s attacks for 0.5 seconds. You prepare 1 charge every 5 seconds and can hold up to 3 charges.

Above the UI, there will be a timer for the Time Distortion. After 1 minute, Kai will activate the Time Distortion where he uses extremely fast skills. When this happens, you can use the Chrono Break skill with the Tab key to slow down time (the duration is based on how full the Chrono Gauge was), allowing you to dodge the attacks with Chrono Step. In the Time Distortion, successfully parrying an attack with Chrono Step will instantly refund its cooldown.

As you dodge attacks in Time Distortion, there will be a score at the top of the screen. It will go up as you dodge attacks but if you die during the Time Distortion, it will freeze until you revive. If you can reach 10,000 points before the Time Distortion ends, then Kai will enter a groggy state and all of your cooldowns will be decreased by 40s.
When Kai reaches 50% HP, he will become stronger and his skills will be enhanced.

Clear Mission

First Clear Mission
You can complete the First Clear Mission by being one of the first 10 players that defeat Hard Kai during the event period.
If you complete the First Clear mission, you can acquire the following rewards through the Event List during the separate reward claiming period.

Mystic Seals have appeared in Challengers World! Help Elwin and Lily break the seals to acquire the Seal’s Cores filled with special power!

items: Level 200 or higher characters created (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) in Challengers, Challengers 2, Challengers 3, or Challengers 4 world.

Seal Control Rod
Every day at midnight, you will automatically be given 3 Seal Control Rods, regardless of if you were logged into the game or not.
※ If you have 17 or more Control Rods but less than 20, you will be given the remaining amount up to the maximum limit of 20.
※ If you have 20 Seal Control Rods, you will not receive any additional Rods.
Breaking the Seal

You can break the Seal 1 time using 1 Seal Control Rod, or as many times as the total number of Seal Control Rods you have. When you break the Seal, you can acquire one of 5 rarity Seal’s Cores based on a set probability.
The Seals that you can break will change based on your Challengers World Tier. The Seal’s Core appearance probability will also change based on this.
Seal’s Core Appearance Probability per Seal Stage
Seal’s Core
When you equip a Seal’s Core, you can acquire stats that match the Seal’s Core’s rarity and your job.
If you have a Seal’s Core equipped, you can use the Seal’s Core Summon skill to summon the Seal’s Core.

When you equip a Seal’s Core with a higher rarity than the one you currently have equipped, the currently equipped Seal’s Core will be extracted and you will receive Seal Energy based on its rarity and enhancement level.
※ The stats acquired from equipping a Seal’s Core will not be applied when you leap to another world from Challengers World.
Seal Energy Extraction
You can acquire Seal Energy by extracting unused Seal’s Cores.
Seal’s Core Enhancement
You can use Seal Energy to enhance your currently equipped Seal’s Core. Enhancing will increase the Seal’s Core’s stats. A Seal’s Core can be enhanced up to stage 12.

Duo Points

Partner Agreement
You can talk to Friendy&Frieny in Henesys to make a partner agreement.
※ You cannot make a partner agreement between two Maple IDs of the same person.

If your partner deletes their Maple ID or moves all of their characters to another world with the World Leap, the event will no longer be available.
※ The rewards for completed missions can still be claimed, and you can continue to accumulate Hunting Points.
Once you complete a partner agreement, you cannot form another partnership with anyone else.
After completing a partner agreement, you can acquire Hunting Points with all of your Challengers World characters and participate in the Combat Missions.
Hunting Points
You can use the Hunting Points accumulated by your partner to acquire experience based on your character’s level.

You can acquire Hunting Points by defeating monsters within your level range. Your partner will receive 1 Hunting Point for every 1 monster you defeat. You can acquire up to 100,000 Hunting Points per week.
You can acquire Hunting Points until April 15, 2026 at 11:55 PM. You can use Hunting Poitns until April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

※ When using the Selective Arcane/Authentic Symbol Vouchers, you can only acquire Symbols from areas in which you have completed the Arcane River/Grandis story quests.
※ Existing characters who already have an Eternal Flame Ring cannot acquire a duplicate Eternal Flame Ring with the Eternal Flame Ring Voucher.
※ Zero will not receive the Black Weapon Box, Black Secondary Weapon Box, or the 15 Star Time-Limited Fafnir Weapon Box.
※ For Zero characters, they cannot use the Absolabs weapon so they will only receive the Dominator Pendant when they reach level 220.

※ If you are using Arcane Catalyst or Authentic Catalyst to move Symbols, you must first stabilize the Unstable Symbol and then receive the Level 7/10 Arcane Symbols or Level 5 Authentic Symbol from the level achievement awards to enhance them normally.
※ If you World Leap without claiming the level achievement rewards, you will receive rewards based on the world you moved to.
Hyper Burning characters can participate in the Tera Blink, allowing fast leveling up to level 200.
[Back to Overview]
1+1 level ups from level 260 to 270! Grow quickly to level 270 and acquire various growth rewards!
Hyper Burning Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 260~268 character.

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: During the event period, you can designate 1 Burning Beyond character per Maple ID.

After selecting a character on the Character Select window, you can click the ‘Designate Burning Beyond’ button or login and participate in the ‘Burning Beyond’ event in the Event List to designate a Burning Beyond character.
※ Once you have designated the Burning Beyond effect, you cannot cancel it.
Burning Beyond Character Benefits
Burning Beyond characters will level up an additional 1 time every time they level up, from level 260 to level 270.
Burning Beyond characters can receive the following level achievement rewards when they reach certain levels.
※ All level achievement rewards are untradeable.
※ All rewards (except for the permanent Sol Erda Fragments) will expire on June 18, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ The Level 5 Authentic Symbol: Arcus/Odium Vouchers and the Burning Beyond Title Voucher can only be claimed after completing the ‘Another Power, Authentic Force’ quest.
※ You must complete the Arcus and Odium story quests to use the Authentic Symbol: Arcus/Odium Level 5 Vouchers respectively.
※ The Sol Erda/Sol Erda Fragment rewards can only be received after completing the ‘[6th Job] A New Power’ quest and the 6th job advancement.
※ If you delete a Burning Beyond character, you can designate the Burning Beyond effect to another level 260~268 character.
※ Burning Beyond level achievement rewards can only be received 1 time per Maple ID. If you claim a level achievement reward, you cannot claim it again on another character.
[Back to Overview]
The missions and equipment’s growth are also a PLUS! Grow stronger together with the Challenger’s Equipment!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 200 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that was created after the December 18, 2025 maintenance.

details.value: ※ Characters that have already participated in another Item Burning event or Item Burning PLUS event cannot participate.
Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ April 22, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: After completing the ‘Another Power, Arcane Force’ quest, you can select the ‘Item Burning PLUS’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event.
※ The Item Burning PLUS event can only be started on one character per person. It cannot be started again even if you delete and recreate the character that completed the quest.
Challenger’s Equipment

After starting the event, you will instanty receive the Challenger’s Equipment pieces. The Challenger Equipment’s stats will match the job of the character participating in the event. The Challenger’s Equipment consists of a total of 8 equips.

items: Hat
Top
Bot
Gloves
Shoes
Cape
Shoulder
Weapon

details.value: ※ Zero characters will not be given a Challenger’s Weapon.
※ The Challenger’s Equipment provided will expire on April 23, 2026 at 12:00 AM.
Item Burning PLUS Missions
※ For each Mission, you can also complete them by soloing the same boss at a higher difficulty than the one presented in the Mission.
※ You can complete the next Stage’s Boss Mission in advance, even if you have not completed the previous Mission yet.
※ Even if you complete the next Stage’s Mission in advance, you cannot proceed to the next Mission until you complete all previous Missions.
※ You can complete a mission by defeating the boss in Practice Mode.
※ The Stage 5~8 missions will deduct Crests of Challenge when you complete them.
Crests of Challenge
Every week, if you solo certain bosses, you will receive Crests of Challenge.
※ The Crests of Challenge weekly acquisition amount will reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM.

If you have already received Crests of Challenge during the week, if you defeat a boss that gives more Crests than the previously defeated boss, you will only receive the difference in number of Crests of Challenge between those two bosses.
※ The Season Boss: Kai does not reward Crests of Challenge.
[Back to Overview]

Character Creation Guide
When you choose to start the Super Tutorial, the ‘Character Creation Guide’ will begin in the login stage.

You can press the ESC button during the guide to skip it.

sections.title: MapleStory Winter Event [Night of Falling Illusions]

details.value: Illusion Fantasia
You are invited to the vast illusion magic unfolding across Tallahart’s night sky.
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. The ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event provides the ‘Simplified Event Start’ feature.
[Back to Overview]
[Growth Event] Ellanos Chronicle
Your journey with Ellanos, the mysterious being that appeared within the illusions, begins. Help Ellanos grow to acquire experience benefits and powerful skills!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. You can start this event at the same time as the other Night of Falling Illusion related events.
After you start the event, you can select the ‘[Growth Event] Ellanos Chronicle’ event in the Event List to check your progress.
Investigation Missions
Every week, you can complete the investigation missions by defeating 10,000 monsters within your level range.
For every 2,000 monsters you defeat, you can click the ‘Investigate’ button to acquire 800 Illusion Coins. You can acquire up to 4,000 Illusion Coins per week.
You can use the Investigation Pass to complete one investigation you did not complete as of the previous week. 1 Investigation Pass costs 3,000 Maple Points.
※ The <Investigation Mission> participation records are shared between all characters in the Maple ID.
Hunting Event Skill
When you participate in the event, you will automatically acquire the ‘Walking Ellanos I’ hunting event skill.
When you enter a hunting ground with monsters within your level range, the skill will be automatically activated. As you defeat monsters within your level range, you will fill up the gauge.
When the gauge is filled and the skill activates, you will acquire experience then Ellanos will take a walk while attacking nearby enemies.
The‘Walking Ellanos I’ skill will grow based on the number of times you complete the investigation missions. When it grows, the number of attacks and the experience benefit will increase.
※ You can acquire more experience in monster hunting ground maps with level 280 or higher monsters.
※ The <Investigation Missions> are shared between all characters in the Maple ID but Ellanos’ growth stage is different for each character.
※ You must press the ‘Grow’ button on each character that participated in the event to acquire the grown Ellanos skill on that character.
Common Active Skill
When you participate in the event, you will automatically acquire the ‘Ellanos I’ skill. You can see it in your Beginner skill tab.
You can use the ‘Ellanos I’ skill to summon Ellanos on the map. It will attack nearby enemies periodically.
The ‘Ellanos I’ skill will grow based on the number of times you complete the investigation missions. When it grows, its attack range and damage will gradually increase.
※ All Ellanos skills have a duration of 70 seconds and a cooldown of 60 seconds.
※ Ellanos cannot be summoned in the air.
※ Certain skills’ number of hits increasing effects will not be applied, but a final damage boost effect of the same amount will be applied.
Ancient Power
When you reach a certain number of cumulative investigations, you can acquire Ancient Power effects.
※ The Reverbations of Wisdom is an experience acquisition effect applied when entering the <Tallahart: Night of Falling Illusions> map.
※ The ‘Arcane River/Grandis daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional Symbol benefit is applied once per day per character per region.
※ When completing Tenebris area daily quests, only the ‘Arcane River daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional experience benefit is applied.
※ You cannot receive additional rewards for daily quests that were already completed before activating the skill effects.
※ The Ancient Power effects will be applied until March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
[Back to Overview]
[Attendance Check Event] Tallahart Fantasia
Collect traces of illusions and receive gifts prepared by Aoe! With the Memory Traces and Reminiscence Traces you collect, you can enhance the illusion magic and gain stats.
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: ※ The acquired skill’s effects will aply until March 25, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

You can select the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. You can start this event at the same time as the other Night of Falling Illusion related events.
After you start the event, you can select the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Tallahart Fantasia’ event in the Event List to check your progress.
※ The <Tallahart Fantasia> participation records are shared between all characters in the Maple ID.
Collect Illusion Traces
You can open the Tallahart Fantasia event UI through the Event List and click the <Collect> button once per day in the Collect Illusion Traces tab to accumulate the following rewards.

items: 3 3x Experience Coupons (30 Minutes)
5 Memory Traces
5 Reminiscence Traces

details.value: You can claim your desired amount of accumulated 3x Experience Coupons by pressing the ‘Receive’ button in the UI. You can also exchange 15 3x Experience Coupons for 1 4x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes).
You can use the accumulated Memory Traces and Reminiscence Traces in the event UI’s Enhance Illusion Magic tab to enhance the event skill.
You can complete the collection up to 5 times per week. You can complete it up to 60 times over the event period.

You can click the Fantasia Pass <Use> button at the bottom left corner of the UI to use 3,000 Maple Points to complete 1 collection that you did not complete previously. The <Fantasia Pass> can be used up to the number of times you did not complete the collections as of the previous week.
Illusion Traces Collection Rewards
You can acquire the following rewards each time you complete a daily collection. If you complete all 60 collections, you can acquire the ‘Legendary Growth Potion (200~279)’.
※ All reward items can only be put into storage.
※ All reward items can be received until March 18, 2025 at 11:59 PM and will expire on March 19, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ When you use the Ellanosroid Voucher, you will receive the Ellanos Roid (can only be put into storage) and the Lidium Heart (untradeable).
※ The Sol Erda can only by used by characters level 260 or higher that have completed the 6th job advancement. It cannot be used if you hold 20 Sol Erda.
※ The daily Illusion Trace collection records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
※ The daily collection rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
Enhance Illusion Magic
You can open the Tallahart Fantasia event UI through the Event List and go to the Enhance Illusion Magic tab to use your Memory Traces and Reminiscence Traces to enhance the event skill.
You can also click the [Buy] button to buy your desired amount of selected Traces.
※ When the event starts, you can buy 5 ‘Memory Traces’ and ‘Reminiscence Traces’. Every Thursday at 12:00, 5 more will become available for purchase.
※ The available quantity will accumulate over the event period.
Memory Illusion Magic will enhance your character’s stats, and Reminiscence Illusion Magic will enhance your content participation rewards.
You can enhance the skills by using a set number of Memory Traces or Reminiscence Traces, depending on the skill level.
※ The acquired skill can be enhanced until March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM. The skill effects will be maintained until March 25, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
Memory Illusion Magic
Reminiscence Illusion Magic
※ ‘Sol Erda Energy’ will drop when you defeat the reward map’s reward monster if you survived after defeating boss monsters of Suu (Hard) or higher.
※ The ‘increased Monster Collection registration rate’ and ‘additional coins from the Union Weekly Mission’ benefits cannot be activated in Challengers World.
※ The ‘Arcane River/Grandis daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional Symbol benefit is applied once per day per character per region.

※ The ‘Arcane River/Grandis daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional experience benefit is applied once per day per world per region. You can choose if you want to apply the benefit when you complete a daily quest.
※ When completing Tenebris area daily quests, only the ‘Arcane River daily mission rewards’ skill’s additional experience benefit is applied.
※ You cannot receive additional rewards for daily quests that were already completed before activating the skill effects.
※ The ‘additional coins from the Union Weekly Mission’ benefit does not apply to the ‘[Maple Union] PC Room Weekly Dragon Hunting’ mission.
※ The additional Union Coins acquired from the ‘additional coins from the Union Weekly Mission’ benefit are not reflected in related achievements.
[Back to Overview]
[Boss Event] Illusions’ Memories
Defeat powerful boss monsters and acquire Illusions’ Memories!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. You can start this event at the same time as the other Night of Falling Illusion related events.
After you start the event, you can select the ‘[Boss Event] Illusions’ Memories’ event in the Event List to check your progress.
Acquiring Illusions’ Memories
You can acquire Illusions’ Memories by soloing weekly bosses.

If you have already received Illusions’ Memories for the week, and you defeat a boss that gives a higher number of Memories than the previously defeated boss, you will only receive Memories equal to the difference between them.

You can acquire up to 3,000 Dim Illusions’ Memories, 2,000 Bright Illusions’ Memories, and 100 Complete Illusions’ Memories per week per world. They can only be used in the world that you acquired them in.
You can click the ‘Acquisition Rate Per Boss’ in the Illusions’ Memories UI to check how many Illusions’ Memories you get per boss.
※ Daily and monthly bosses are not included.
※ The weekly boss defeat records are reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM.
Boss Defeat Criteria
Your boss defeat will only be recognized if you solo the boss. It will be recognized even if you succeed in Practice Mode.
The boss will be recognized as being cleared when the final phase’s boss monster is defeated. You can then acquire Hideout Tokens.
The amount of Illusions’ Memories acquired from defeating boss monsters is as follows.
[Back to Overview]

Every day, you can defeat 1,000 monsters within your level range on a Kinesis character to complete the KINETIC attendance check and receive rewards. You can complete it up to 10 times over the event period.

You can click the KINETIC Pass <Use> button at the bottom left corner of the UI to use 3,000 Maple Points to complete 1 attendance check that you did not complete previously. The <KINETIC Pass> can be used up to the number of times you did not complete the attendance check as of the previous day.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Beauty Event] KINETIC Beauty Express’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event.
Beauty Extraction

You can login to the Kinesis character you want to extract the Beauty information from and select the ‘Extract beauty information’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can extract that character’s current beauty, as well as all hair, face, and skin Mannequin information stored in the Beauty Room.
To complete the beauty extraction, you must review all of the precautions and designate the default appearance for the character you are extracting the beauty information from.
You will need to pay 30,000 Maple Points to complete the beauty extraction.
※ The default appearance can be selected from the available options when creating a Kinesis character.

※ The beauty extracted character’s appearance, all information stored in the Beauty Room, and Mannequins/slot expansion details will be reset to the default. The changes will be applied to the character that you click the [Import Mannequin] and [Import Appearance] buttons on.
※ When the extraction is complete, it cannot be canceled. Please make sure you are extracting the beauty information from the right character.
Beauty Transfer

After completing the beauty extraction, you can login to the Kinesis you want to apply the beauty information to and select the ‘Apply extracted beauty information’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can view the extracted beauty information and mannequin information.
You can apply the extracted mannequin information or appearance information to the current character by clicking the [Import Mannequin] or [Import Appearance] buttons at the bottom of the UI.
※ Beauty information can only be applied to a character of the same gender as the extracted character.
※ Mannequin and Appearance Imports can only be completed on a single character. Please make sure you are applying the beauty information to the desired character.

※ The appearance and Beauty Room of the character to whom the beauty information is being applied to will be overwritten with the extracted information. All previously saved information will be removed.
[Back to Overview]
Missions for players experiencing winter in Maple World for the first time! Complete various missions with Cassandra and receive gifts!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Characters created after the December 18, 2025 maintenance.

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Winter Survival Missions’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event.
※ The <Winter Survival Missions> participation records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
Step Up Missions

You can complete a total of 9 stages of missions through the ‘Step Up Missions’ section of the UI. When you complete a Step Up Mission, you can receive the reward for that stage and proceed with the next stage’s mission.
※ All Step Up rewards are untradeable and will expire on March 19, 2026 at 2:00 AM. However, the Spirit Pendant will expire 30 days after acquiry.
※ The Step Up mission progress is shared between all newly created characters within the Maple ID. Only newly created characters can receive the rewards.
※ The Step Up mission rewards can only be received 1 time per Maple ID.
※ The Sol Erda can only by used by characters level 260 or higher that have completed the 6th job advancement. It cannot be used if you hold 20 Sol Erda.
※ The Sol Erda Fragments can only by used by characters level 260 or higher that have completed the 6th job advancement.
Weekly Mission
Whenever you defeat a certain number of monsters within your level range, you can click the ‘Receive’ button at the bottom of the UI to acquire weekly mission rewards.
※ This mission will only progress if you defeat monsters within your level range on a newly created character while you are in a party of 1 or are not in a party.
※ The weekly mission rewards can only be received 1 time per Maple ID.
※ The 3x Experience Coupons and VIP Boosters are untradeable, and will expire on March 19, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ The VIP Sauna Entry Tickets can only be put into storage, and will expire on March 19, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ The VIP Sauna Entry Tickets can only be used during the ‘VIP Sauna’ event period. If the event period ends, you cannot receive the effects even if there is remaining Sauna Entry Ticket time.
[Back to Overview]
Cassandra’s support is speeding up! Level up the Momentum Pass and receive rewards!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 280 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Momentum Pass’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event.
※ You can only participate in this event on one character per person.
※ The character and Maple ID participating in this event cannot be changed afterwards.
※ Even if you delete the character that participates in the Momentum Pass event, you cannot participate in the event on another character.
Momentum Pass Levels and Weekly Missions
The Momentum Pass levels range from level 0~10. You can reach the next level by acquiring 720 Momentum Pass Points.
You can acquire Momentum Pass Points by completing weekly missions.
You can acquire up to 2,000 Momentum Pass Points per week.
※ The missions can only be progressed on the character that is participating in the event.
※ The weekly Momentum Pass point acquisition and weekly mission progress are reset every Thursday at midnight.
※ Symbol daily quests, Monster Park, Monster Park Extreme, and Epic Dungeon missions completed before participating in the event are not included in the weekly mission progress.
You can buy Momentum Pass Points based on the amount of Points you did not acquire from the previous week.
※ 100 Momentum Pass Points costs 1,000 Maple Points.
Pass Level Achievement Rewards
If you buy the Prime Momentum Pass, you can claim the Prime Momentum Rewards.
※ All rewards can be claimed during the event period until January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
※ All rewards will expire on January 15, 2026 at 2:00 AM.
※ All rewards except for the VIP Sauna Entry Tickets are untradeable.
※ The VIP Sauna Entry Tickets can only be put into storage.
Prime Momentum Pass
The Prime Momentum Pass will be available for purchase.

items: Sale Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:00 PM
Price: 49,800 NX (cannot be purchased with Maple Points or Mileage)
When you use the ‘Prime Momentum Pass’, you can claim the Prime Momentum rewards.

details.value: ※ The ‘Prime Momentum Pass’ cannot be refunded after purchase.
※ The ‘Prime Momentum Pass’ will expire on January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
※ Regardless of the purchase date, the Prime Pass effects will be applied until January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
※ The ‘Prime Momentum Pass’ can only be purchased 1 time per person.
※ You cannot purchase the ‘Prime Momentum Pass’ if you have no characters participating in the event.
[Back to Overview]
Spend time in the VIP Sauna to acquire a large amount of experience!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: In the Event List’s ‘Use the VIP Sauna’ event, you can use 3,000 Maple Points to charge your VIP Sauna usage time by 1 hour. You can charge it by up to 48 hours per week in this way.
If you use a VIP Sauna Ticket, your VIP Sauna usage time will be charged by 30 minutes.
※ The charged VIP Sauna usage time is shared between all characters within the Maple ID.

While you have remaining VIP Sauna usage time, you can select the ‘Use the VIP Sauna’ event from the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to the Hotel Staff in <Sleepywood: Sleepywood Hotel Lobby> to enter <Sleepywood: VIP Sauna Room>.
While you are inside the <Sleepywood: VIP Sauna Room>, you will automatically acquire experience based on your level every 5 seconds.
※ Characters over level 294 that enter the VIP Sauna Room will receive the same amount of experience as a level 294 character.
※ When the VIP Sauna usage time runs out, you will automatically return to your original location or <Sleepywood: Sleepywood Hotel Lobby>.
※ After the event period ends, you will not be able to acquire experience even if you had remaining VIP Sauna usage time.
※ On Red PC, the VIP Sauna experience acquisition will be decreased by 50%.
You can receive Maple Home furniture items based on your cumulative VIP Sauna charge time.

※ Maple Home requires a level 260 or higher character that has completed ‘The Day After’ story within the world. You can then complete the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’ quest through the lightbulb icon to create a Maple Home.
※ Maple Home is shared between all characters within the world. The furniture acquired from the Voucher can be used by all characters within the Maple ID.
[Back to Overview]
The Mechaberry army has attacked the strawberry farm! Help Spiegelmann stop them and get lots of experience!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 280~299 character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: When you use a ‘Mechaberry Farm Entry Ticket’, you can go to the <Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle Entrance> through the ‘Mechaberry Farm’ event in the Event List.
You can talk to Spiegelmann at the entrance to enter the ‘Strawberry Farm Battle’.
※ You can acquire ‘Mechaberry Farm Entry Tickets’ through the Momentum Pass and the event meso shop.
Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle
In ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’, you will have 30 minutes to defeat the Mechaberry army to restore the farm and acquire experience based on your level.
※ You will automatically exit when you defeat Mechaberry Psi and restore the farm to 100%.
※ You can enter Mechaberry Farm for up to 24 hours from the time you use the Entry Ticket.
※ Any additional experience effects are not applied in ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’, and Multikills will not occur.
If you leave before the farm is restored to 100%, you can freely re-enter Mechaberry Farm until your farm usage time limit ends.
※ If you leave the farm while the Fever is activated, the Fever Gauge will be reset when you re-enter.
※ You can only use another Entry Ticket when the previous farm usage time limit ends or the farm is restored to 100%.
Spiegel Burst
This is a special attacking skill that you can use by pressing the NPC Chat/Harvest key in the ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’.
When you defeat Mechaberry army troops, you will acquire Fever Points. When you acquire 3000 Points, Fever mode will be activated for 10 seconds.
※ While Fever mode is activated, you can use Spiegel Burst without any cooldowns.
[Back to Overview]
A chance to get the name you want! Try using Mister New Name’s New Name Auction!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 10 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: December 24, 2025 at 10:00 AM ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: ※ You can register character names for sale until January 11, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
You can select the ‘New Name Auction’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to Mister New Name in main towns to enter the New Name Auction.
New Name Auction
After entering, you can proceed with the character name auction. The New Name Auction can be used on a per Maple ID basis, and you use Maple Points in the auction.

items: You can only sell or bid on character names on Green PCs.
You can set the sale price for 30,000~59,999,999 Maple Points.
When registering a name for sale, you can choose between 8 hours, 24 hours, and 48 hours for the auction’s duration.
You can only sell 1 character name at a time. You can only be trading up to 10 names at a time, including selling, bidding, and unclaimed completed trades.
In an auction, you can bid on a name with a price higher than a certain amount than the currently registered highest bid.
The minimum bid amount depends on the current highest bid.
The auction will end between 2 minutes before and 2 minutes after the specified auction end time. When it ends, the highest bidder will win the character name.
Completed trade details are stored until May 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM, and will be automatically deleted if the name and payment are not claimed during this period.
After the event ends, you can claim your names and payment through the NPC Mister New Name.

details.value: ※ Character names that violate the name policy are subject to sanctions, and they may be sanctioned when attempting to trade them.
※ Selling character names is only available to characters that have been created at least 90 days ago.
※ Characters who have changed names within 1 week cannot sell their names.
※ After a new name is received through the New Name Auction, that character cannot change its name through Mister New Name for 1 week.
※ Regardless of the time that the character’s name was changed, you can receive names you have won in the New Name Auction or return unsold character names.
※ Reselling character names won during the event is prohibited.
※ Selling and bidding cancellations due to changing your mind are not possible. Character names cannot be restored after a trade has concluded.
[Back to Overview]
Move your names quickly and safely! Try using the Nickname Express!

details.value: You can select the ‘Nickname Express’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate.
※ Characters who have been created within the past 3 months or have changed their names within the past week cannot use the Nickname Express.
Name Extraction

You can login to the character whose name you want to extract and select the ‘Extract name’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can pay 30,000 Maple Points to extract that character’s current name.
※ When the extraction is complete, it cannot be canceled. Please make sure you are extracting the name from the right character.
Name Transfer
You can login to the character you want to apply the name to and select the ‘Apply extracted name’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can apply the extracted name.
Extracted character names can be applied to any character in your Maple ID, regardless of the world.
※ After extracting and transferring a name, you cannot list it for sale on the New Name Auction for 1 week.
[Back to Overview]
[Custom Illustration] The Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations
Michelovinci, the wandering artist who draws illustrations by reading energy. Help him adapt to your energy and receive Illustration Request Tickets!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: A level 270 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2).

items: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 25, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations’ event or ‘‘Wandering Artist That Reads the World’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate. You can also talk to the NPC Michelovinci and complete the corresponding quests to participate.
※ The participation is per Maple ID.
※ The event completion period is different based on the participating character’s level.
The Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations

You can complete the event by participating through the NPC Michelovinci or through the Event List during the event period matching your character’s level. The event participation periods are as follows.

When you complete the event, you will receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket. If you don’t claim it instantly, you can receive it on another level 10 or higher character within the Maple ID through the Event List or the NPC Michelovinci.
The Wandering Artist That Draws the World

You can complete the event by participating through the NPC Michelovinci or through the Event List during the event period matching your character’s level. The event participation periods are as follows.

When you complete the event, you will receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket. If you don’t claim it instantly, you can receive it on another level 10 or higher character within the Maple ID through the Event List or the NPC Michelovinci.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket is an item that lets you request a custom illustration.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket will expire 30 days after being acquired, and can only be put into storage.
※ You can participate in the ‘Wandering Artist That Reads the World’ event even if you don’t participate in the ‘Wandering Artist that Draws Illustrations’ event.
※ If you reach a certain character level during the event period, you can participate in the event period corresponding to your new level.
[Back to Overview]

The wandering artist Michelovinci wants to understand the world by gathering the energy of various colours. Help him experience the diverse world of colours and receive Illustration Request Tickets!

Colourful Energy
You will collect Colourful Energy whenever you defeat monsters within your level range on a character within the Maple ID.
When you have collected 50,000 Colourful Energy, you can complete the quest through the Event List or by talking to the NPC Michelovinci to receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket.

You can complete this quest up to 4 times per week. The completion count will refresh every Thursday at 12:00 Am. If you have completed the quest 4 times in a week, you can start it again after the weekly refresh.
The amount of collected Colourful Energy will not reset even when the quest completion count refreshes.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket is an item that lets you request a custom illustration.
※ The Illustration Request Ticket will expire 30 days after being acquired, and can only be put into storage.
※ The weekly Colourful Energy completions are calculated based on the date that you complete the quest.
