kmsBreakdown.fullText: The first patch of the MapleStory Crown update has been released! The main features include the Kinesis remaster, tons various game improvements and quality of life changes, and Challenge World season 3. This time, there’s an extra Challenge World-exclusive season t, Kai! Sorry for the post being late, this patch came out a week and a half ago but since there were only a few days inbetween the KMST and KMS release, I didn’t have enough time to do a KMST post (as I mentioned before) so I had to translate everything all at once (and there was a lot in these patch notes). Then I was busy playing the actual game and other assorted holiday stuff lol. Wishing everyone a Merry Christmas, happy holidays, and happy new year! Overview Kinesis Remaster Common Quests Skills Beginner 1st Job 2nd Job 3rd Job 4th Job Hyper Skills 5th Job 6th Job V Core Changes HEXA Core Changes Character Settings Change Support Growth Path Reorganization Map Reorganization Authentic Symbol Effect Reorganization Link Skill Expansion Maple Union Reorganization V Matrix Reorganization Buff Manager and Buff Reorganization Soul Collection Reorganization Item Trade UI Reorganization World Meso Unification Voice Chat MapleStory Collection Cards Custom Illustrations Cash Skill Changes Improvements Quests Content Monsters Items Maps UI Security Error Fixes Quests Items NPCs Monsters Maps UI Events Challengers World Season 3 Challengers World New Season Boss: Kai [Boss Clear Event] Kai First Clear Event Challengers World Missions Mystic Seal Challengers Pass Challengers EXP Duo Challengers Partner Hyper Burning MAX Burning Beyond Item Burning Plus Super Tutorial MapleStory Winter Event [Night of Falling Illusions] [Growth Event] Ellanos Chronicle [Attendance Check Event] Tallahart Fantasia [Boss Event] Illusions’ Memories [Event Shop] Illusions’ Memory Archive [Event Shop] Illusion Coin Shop [Event Shop] Meso Shop [Remaster Event] KINETIC [Beauty Event] KINETIC Beauty Express Winter Survival Missions Momentum Pass VIP Sauna Mechaberry Farm New Name Auction Nickname Express Custom Illustration Event [Custom Illustration] The Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations [Custom Illustration] Colourful Energy Little Snowman’s Happiness Sunday Maple Event Improvements Kinesis Remaster Common Psychic Points have been removed. MP has been added. The Hyper Stat for ‘DF/TP/PP Increase’ has been changed to ‘DF/TF Increase’. The character creation UI’s illustration has been changed. The character select UI’s job-exclusive emblem has been changed. The Creed Hair/Cliff Hair have been added. The Kinesis Face has been added. The following items have been added. Preppy King Preppy Queen White Sneakers The skill voices have been changed. [Back to Overview] Quests The ‘People in Need of a Hero’ quests have been streamlined into a single location in Riena Strait. The ‘People in Need of a Hero’ quest pre-requisite condition has been removed from the ‘Yuna’s Concern’ quest. The ‘Weaker, Stronger’/’Nero’s Training Plan 4’ quests have been removed. The ‘Jay’s Secret Folder’ quest has been added. Certain quests’ cutscenes have been improved. Navigation has been added to certain quests. [Back to Overview] Skills Beginner Psychic Attack This skill has been changed into a skill that consumes MP. The maximum number of enemies hit has been increased from 1 to 3. The number of hits has been increased from 1 to 2. The action delay has been decreased by about 17%. The skill effect has been changed. The skill icon has been changed. The skill sound effects have been changed. The feature that charged Psychic Points has been removed. Return The skill effect has been changed. The skill icon has been changed. The skill sound effects have been changed. The action delay has been decreased by about 45%. [Back to Overview] 1st Job Psychic Force[Master Level: 20]Push enemies back with telekinesis. You can use this skill with the down arrow key to push enemies downwards. Certain monsters will resist being pushed. [Level 20]Consumes 10 MP. Deals 110% damage 3 times on up to 5 enemies. ESP Booster[Master Level: 10]Increases your attack speed for a certain period of time.Can be registered in a Skill Sequence. [Level 10]Consumes 20 MP. For 180 seconds, increases attack speed by 2 stages. Psychic Walk[Master Level: 5]Jump once more while in the air to move a certain distance. You can use this skill up to 2 times. Youc an use this skill with the up arrow key to jump upwards. [Level 5]Consumes 5 MP. Jump a certain distance. Defense[Master Level: 10]Surround your body with pure telekinetic power to defend against enemies’ attacks and increase your endurance. [Level 10]20% max HP, 30% max MP, 500 defense, 75% damage taken reduction. Inherent[Master Level: 20]The psychic powers imprinted on your cells enhance your body. [Level 20]20 speed, 20 maximum speed, 20 jump, 15% critical rate. [Back to Overview] 2nd Job Psychic Lift[Master Level: 20]Lift enemies and slam them into a force field of high-density telekinetic power. [Level 20]Consumes 20 MP. Deals 220% damage 3 times on up to 6 enemies. Ultimate: Pressure[Master Level: 20]Powerful telekinetic power distorts space to create a Micro Black Hole.If the Micro Black Hole hits an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage. It will prioritize being created at the location of the boss monster with the highest max HP.Micro Black Hole’s reactivation cooldown is not affected by cooldown reset effects. [Level 20]When Kinesis uses a directly attacking skill (except common skills), there is a 100% chance to activate a Micro Black Hole at the location of an enemy within a certain range.Micro Black Hole: Activate 6 gravitational waves that deal 210% damage 4 times on up to 8 enemies. A single enemy can only be hit by up to 4 attacks.Reactivation cooldown: 6 seconds.Unleash reactivation cooldown: 2 seconds. Psychic Rush[Master Level: 1]Use telekinetic power to push your body and quickly rush forwards. [Level 1]Consumes 100 MP. Rush a certain distance. ESP Mastery[Master Level: 20]Gain mastery over the ESP Limiter. [Level 20]50% ESP Limiter mastery, 40 INT, 30 magic attack. Pure Power[Master Level: 20]Awaken your abilities with the pure energy of telekinetic power. [Level 20]1 attack speed stage, 10% damage, 15% critical rate. Inherent II[Master Level: 13]The psychic powers imprinted on your cells further enhance your body. [Level 13]10% final damage, 50% stance. [Back to Overview] 3rd Job Psychic Crash[Master Level: 20]Instantly lift enemies into the air with telekinetic power then slam them into the ground. [Level 20]Consumes 20 MP. Deals 300% damage 4 times on up to 6 enemies. Ultimate: Opening[Master Level: 20]Maximize the universal law of gravitation to open up the prelude of battle.Inflict a debuff on the enemy with the highest max HP within range. A powerful gravitational field will be formed around the debuffed enemy, pulling in objects and attacking around it. If any of Ultimate: Opening’s attacks (other than the first attack) hit an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage. This skill is not affected by cooldown reset effects. [Level 20]Consumes 200 MP. Deals 260% damage 6 times on 1 enemy, then inflicts a debuff on that enemy for 7 seconds.Objects will be pulled towards the debuffed enemy, activating up to 2 gravitational fields that deal 260% damage 6 times on up to 8 enemies.When the debuff duration ends, it will explode, dealing 390% damage 12 times.If you use Opening while there is an enemy inflicted with Opening, the previous Opening will instantly end and activate the explosion, with additional attacks equal to the number of remaining gravitational field attacks.Cooldown: 30 seconds.Unleash cooldown: 10 seconds. Psychic Move[Master Level: 4]Ride a wave of telekinetic power and walk freely through the sky.You can move in up to 5 directions by combining the left/right/up arrow keys. If you do not input a directional key, you will float in place. Psychic Move is not affected by cooldown reset effects. [Level 4]Consumes 100 MP. Fly for a certain period of time.Cooldown: 2 seconds. Warp[Master Level: 5]Gather and condense vast amounts of telekinetic power to warp space. You can teleport through the warped space. [Level 5]Consumes 55 MP and 1 Condensed Telekinetic Power.Teleport 570px horizontally or 320px vertically.You prepare 1 Condensed Telekinetic Power every 10 seconds, and you can store up to 3. Telekinesis[Master Level: 15]When Kinesis’ directly attacking skills hit an enemy, compressed energy deals an additional attack on enemies.Telekinesis will prioritize attacking the boss monster with the highest max HP. If it hits an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage. [Level 15]When Kinesis’ directly attacking skills (except for common skills) hit an enemy, there is a 50% chance to create 3 Compressed Energy Bullets. Ultimate skills have a 40% chance to create them.Energy Bullet: Deals 110% damage 3 times. Mental Enhancement[Master Level: 20]Clear your mind to gain higher concentration in battle. [Level 20]20 magic attack, 16% damage, 15% final damage. Transcendence[Master Level: 20]Through supernatural powers, transcend your regular body’s abilities. You can acquire a ‘Proof of a Radiant Hero’ by reaching level 285, completing the Carcion story quests, then proceeding with the related quest. You can only acquire the ‘Proof of a Radiant Hero’ once per character. The ‘Proof of a Radiant Hero’ can only be used by characters level 200 or higher that have completed the ‘[5th Job] Another Power, Arcane Force’ quest. The ‘Proof of a Brilliant Hero’ can only be put into storage. The following quests have been added to acquire the ‘Proof of a Brilliant Hero’. [Link Skill] First Step for Unity [Link Skill] Proof of a Brilliant Hero [Back to Overview] Maple Union Reorganization Union ranks will now increase without any additional costs or actions when you reach the matching Union levels. If your Union level increases through things like World Leaps, the Union rank will increase when you log into a character in that world. [Back to Overview] V Matrix Reorganization The V Matrix system has been reorganized. The V Matrix system has been reorganized so that you can acquire V Points through Core Gemstones and use them to enhance your V Cores. You can acquire V Points through Core Gemstones, and you can hold up to 9,999 V Points. You will acquire a certain number of V Points based on the type of Core Gemstone as follows. Item NameV Points AcquiredCore Gemstone1Amazing Core Gemstone2V Skill Core Gemstone2Experience Core Gemstone3Mirror World’s Core Gemstone5Mitra’s Core Gemstone15 ※ The ‘Spider in Mirror’ core can be unlocked by using the ‘Mirror World’s Core Gemstone’ 1 time. Subsequent uses will provide V Points. ※ The ‘Crest of the Solar’ core can be unlocked by using the ‘Mitra’s Core Gemstone’ 1 time. Subsequent uses will provide V Points. V Cores have been reclassified as Job Cores, Enhancement Cores, Common Cores, and Special Cores. Job Core: When activated, you can acquire skills exclusive to your job. They can be enhanced up to level 30. Enhancement Core: When activated, you can enhance 4th job and lower, and Hyper skills. They can be enhanced up to level 60. Common Core: When activated, you can acquire skills common to multiple jobs. They can be enhanced up to level 30. Special Core: When activated, you can activate specific effects when you meet special conditions in combat. You can unlock multiple Special Cores, but only 1 can be equipped at a time. NOTE: If you want to see the amount of required V Points to level up skills, you can check this page on Namu Wiki. Special Cores can be accessed through the button in the top right corner of the V Matrix. They cost 14 V Points to unlock. You can click on an unlocked Special Core to equip it. You can right-click on an unlocked Special Core to extend its duration. The amount of V Points consumed will be based on the duration it is being extended (maximum 48). You can reset your V Point allocation by spending 10m mesos. You can convert 2 V Points into 1 Core Gemstone, which can only be put into storage. The slot enhancement and slot expansion based on character level features have been removed. The following Special Cores have been removed. Comeback I Auto Recovery I Lucky Recovery I Rune-Frenzied Consecutive Strike I Lethal Strike II Rune-Blessed Certain Special Cores’ names have been changed as follows. The Auto Recovery II Core has been changed into the Auto Recovery Core. The Comeback II Core has been changed into the Comeback Core. Existing V Matrix information will be transferred to match the reorganized V Matrix. Existing Core levels will be transferred to V Core growth levels as follows. Job Cores and Skill Cores Equipped Cores will be transferred to match the reorganized V Matrix levels without any separate enhancements. Unequipped Cores will be converted into V Points based on their disassembled value. [V Matrix] Constantly Crafting [V Matrix] Crafting Without Breaks [V Matrix] Cores Don’t Betray You [V Matrix] Disassembling to Combine [V Matrix] Core Cutting Warrior [V Matrix] Shattered [Back to Overview] Buff Manager and Buff Reorganization The Buff Manager system has been added. You can click on the Buff Manager button on the Buff Sequence to open the Buff Manager UI. You can check and buy important buff items through the Buff Manager. You can double-click on an item icon in the Buff Manager to buy it. Even if you don’t currently have a buff item, you can register it in a Sequence through the Buff Manager. Items that can be purchased in the Cash Shop can only be bought using Maple Points through this UI. You can double-click on items that can be purchased in the Maple Auction to instantly go to the Maple Auction with that item already searched for. The Buy Buffs in Bulk feature has been added. You can click the ‘Buy Buffs in Bulk’ button in the Buff Sequence to buy all buffs registered in a Sequence. You can only buy items while clicking on a Sequence, and only the buff items in the clicked Sequence will be bought. ※ Items that can be purchased in the Maple Auction cannot be bought through the Buy Buffs in Bulk feature. The Buff Items tab has been added to the Maple Auction. You can double-click on an icon in the Buff Items tab to instantly search for the selected item. Double-clicking a buff icon will automatically search for the lowest price. The Elixir of Honor has been added. Characters level 200 or higher who have completed the ‘[Collector’s Request] quests can buy the Elixir of Honor from the Collector NPC. [Back to Overview] Soul Collection Reorganization The Soul List feature has been reorganized. You can sort the list by selecting your desired order and conditions using the drop-down box on the left. You can use the Favourites feature to sort your frequently accesed monsters to the top of the list. You can now check the Soul Collection levels for each monster in the list at a glance. You can now view the selected monster on the right side of the UI at the same time as the list. The Detailed Information feature has been reorganized. You can now check the regular and Magnificent Soul Skills’ information without any additional actions. An indicator has been added for the currently equipped Soul Skill. Soul Shard items will now be instantly reflected in the Soul Collection UI when acquired. The Soul Shards held by a character will now be displayed in each monster’s page or the Bulk Craft UI. All Soul Shard items previously held in bags, inventory, and the boss reward storage will be automatically reflected in the Soul Collection UI. ※ All held Soul Shard items will be removed after being reflected in the UI. ※ You can hold up to 99,999 Soul Shards for each monster. ※ The Piggy Bar Soul Shards, Pink Mong Soul Shards, and Premium PC Room Soul Shards can be exchanged for Souls by usign the Soul Shards like before. You can now craft Souls in the Soul Collection UI. You can craft a selected monster’s Soul through the ‘Soul Craft’ button. The ‘Bulk Soul Craft’ feature has been added. The ‘Auto Input’ feature lets you automatically input the Souls you want to craft based on the available space in your bag and inventory. You can reset the inputted Soul quantity. You can check the acquisition rate for each Soul. The Soul Registration feature has been reorganized. You can register monsters’ Souls through the ‘Soul Register’ button or by dragging and dropping them on to the right side of the UI. The ‘Bulk Soul Register’ feature has been added. You can click on unregistered Souls to register them at once. You can use the ‘Auto Select’ feature to select time-limited untradeable regular Souls all at once. Registration results will be displayed in the chat window, up to a maximum of 5. ※ Magnificent Souls will not be be selected by the ‘Auto Select’ feature. You can now extract Souls in the Soul Collection UI. You can now extract permanent regular Soul items to acquire Soul Shards without having to consume any additional items. ※ You can select Souls to extract in groups of 5, and the Soul Shards acquired from disassembly may be different from the extracted Souls. ※ You cannot extracted time-limited Souls, Magnificent Souls, and certain other Souls. ※ You can no longer acquire Soul Disassemblers from Gold Apples. Murmur’s Soul has been added to the Soul Collection. Cygnus’ normal illustration has been updated in the Soul Collection. The Full Menu’s ‘Soul Weapon’ option has been changed to ‘Soul Collection’. A Soul Collection hotkey has been added. The Soul Weapon UI has been changed. You can now open the Soul Weapon UI from the Soul Collection UI. The Soul Weapon UI design has been changed. Soul item tooltips will now display if they are already registered in the Soul Collection or not. The Soul Skill tooltip will now display the Soul Skill usage command. [Back to Overview] Item Trade UI Reorganization The existing ‘Regular Item Trade’ and ‘Cash Item Trade’ features have been unified into one UI that lets you trade any type of item. The ‘Registration’ process has been added. You can place the items you want to send to the other person, press the ‘Register’ button to complete the registration process, then click the ‘Trade’ button to proceed with the trade. The ‘View Character Info’ button has been added. [Back to Overview] World Meso Unification Mesos will now be shared between all characters within the same world. After the update, all mesos held by each character within the world will be combined and unified. The storage’s meso storage feature will be maintained. When you World Leap, you can login to a character in the new world and click the ‘Receive World Leap Mesos’ notification to claim your mesos. If you have remaining mesos to claim, the notification will appear each time you login. The maximum meso hold limit has been changed to 9,999,999,999,999 (~10t mesos). [Back to Overview] Voice Chat The Voice Chat feature has been added that lets you communicate with your party members through voice. You can choose to use Voice Chat or not when creating a party. Parties using Voice Chat can access the Voice Chat settings UI through the party UI. You can adjust microphone sensitivity, microphone and audio volumes through the Voice Chat settings UI. The party leader can start or stop using Voice Chat through the Voice Chat settings UI. The default audio device of the PC you are using MapleStory on will be used as the sound device. When you use the Voice Chat for the first time, there may be delays sometimes in connecting to the sound device. You cannot use or connect to Voice Chat in the following cases. Using a non-default audio device while using multiple PCs at the same time. Chat restriction is applied. Using MapleStory on Mac OS. You can link your Nexon account and Discord account. You can link your Discord account by using the Options UI’s Chat & Invite tab. If you link your Discord account, you can view your Discord friends list in-game. [Back to Overview] MapleStory Collection Cards The <MapleStory Collection Cards> have been released. You can collect cards featuring the stunning appearances of MapleStory classes and enjoy your personal collection in-game. For MapleStory Collection Card sale and product information, please check the separate information page. NOTE: You can see all 152 cards in this YouTube video. Registering Cards You can scan the QR code on the back of a Collection Card using the MapleHands+ app to register the card. ※ You can only register 1 Collection Card of each type. You cannot register duplicate cards of the same type. ※ 1 Collection Card can only be reigstered 1 time. Already registered cards cannot be registered again. ※ Registered Collection Cards are saved per Maple ID. ※ You can only register MapleStory Collection Cards CLASS EDITION until December 31, 2026. Checking In-Game When you register a card, you can start the ‘[Collection Card] Magician Cootie’s Call’ quest. After completing all related quests, you will acquire the ‘Collection Card Binder’ furniture. You can install it in your Maple Home and use it to open the dedicated UI where you can check your Collection Cards. Other players can visit your home and use the ‘Collection Card Binder’ to check your collection. ※ Quest progress is shared between all worlds, and can only be completed once per Maple ID. ※ Maple Home requires a level 260 or higher character that has completed ‘The Day After’ story within the world. You can then complete the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’ quest through the lightbulb icon to create a Maple Home. ※ The ‘Collection Card Binder’ furniture can be used by all characters within the same Maple ID. [Back to Overview] Custom Illustrations Custom illustrations based on your own unique outfits! Save your illustrations and apply them you desire when viewing stories or looking at the character info window! Custom Illustration Introduction The Custom Illustration system uses generative AI to transform your character’s appearance into an illustration in MapleStory’s art style. Custom illustrations will be operated as a beta service after the update. To use custom illustrations, you need an ‘Illustration Request Ticket’ item. For detailed instructions on how to acquire them, please check the ‘Custom Illustration Event’ section. Accounts with a level 270 or higher character will be entered automatically in the pre-request event. You can check the results immediately after logging in during the event period. For more information, please check the ‘Custom Illustration Pre-Request Event’ page. How to Request an Illustration After customizing your character with your desired appearance, you can click the Custom Illustration button in the character info window, use the Illustration Request Ticket, or talk to the Moving Easel NPC to open the Custom Illustration window. If you have an Illustration Request Ticket, you can click the ‘Request an Illustration’ button to start the request. After a certain amount of time has passed after your request, a notification will appear that opens the Custom Illustration UI where you can check your request results. You can select all of the illustrations that you wish to save from the request results and click ‘Finish’ to complete the request. Applying Illustrations You can select and apply one of your saved illustrations from the Custom Illustration window. You can set each illustration’s background colour to either a solid colour or a gradient. The currently applied illustration will appear in the story dialogue windows instead of your character sprite and job illustration. The currently applied illustration will also be displayed in the Custom Illustration window in the Character Info UI. You can change the settings to display this or not when other characters view your character’s info. You can change the custom illustration’s application range through the Custom Illustration UI’s options. Display in Story Dialogue Share with Other Characters View Other Characters’ Illustrations Notes When Requesting Illustrations The following things will not be included in the requested appearance. Weapon and secondary weapon items Effect items, Cash effects, weapon effects Character’s actions, motions, and emotes Character’s mounts and chairs Transformations and Illusion Rings You cannot complete a request while wearing a collaboration item, items that have poor results, or items that may have inappropriate results. Please follow the instructions when requesting. An illustration request’s results can be viewed for about 7 days after requesting. However, if the request is not completed within that period, it will expire and can no longer be saved. Please make sure to save them within the period. If you have an activate illustration request on another character in your account, you cannot proceed with another request on a different character at the same time. For Zero characters, the custom illustration storage slots are separate for Alpha and Beta. The request results can only be saved on the character that submitted the request. In addition, each Alpha and Beta character is assigned a separate custom illustration, so every time the character is Tagged, the corresponding custom illustration will be applied. Custom illustrations will not be applied in the story dialogue windows in certain Zero class stories. For Angelic Buster characters, the illustrations can be applied to both Normal and Dress-Up Mode. The corresponding custom illustration will be applied based on the character’s Mode. If you World Leap a character while a request is in-progress, the request resutls will disappear. Please save the request results before World Leaping. The saved illustrations are stored per character, and if the character is deleted, the saved illustrations will also be deleted. ※ Please understand that the list of items that cannot be included in a request may change in real time. ※ The illustration results are created using generative AI, so the quality and elements of each results may vary. Characters designated as Tera Burning characters will receive the following benefits: +2 levels for each level up, up to level 200 Snail pet (30 days) Level 30 Equipment Box Legendary Secret Box Black Hat Black Cape Black Suit Black Weapon Box Black Secondary Weapon Box Expiring Root Abyss Set Box Eternal Flame Title ※ Hyper Burning and regular characters created in Challengers World cannot claim these rewards. In Challengers World, you can use the Meso Market by talking to the NPC Miss Brainy. In Challengers World, the Maple Auction sale registration and Meso Market usage restriction until 3 days after a character was created has been removed. ※ Characters with active Meso Market transactions cannot proceed with the Challengers World Leap. ※ The Meso Market can be used until the Challengers World growth period ends. (April 16, 2026 before the maintenance) ※ After the growth period ends, you can no longer use the Meso Market. Event Details You can only use one world out of Challengers, Challengers 2, Challengers 3, and Challengers 4, whichever one you first create a character on. Deleting the character will not change the world you can use. You can create up to 5 characters. You can only use the World Leap on characters level 101 or higher. ※ Zero characters can World Leap if they are level 101 or higher and have completed the story quests up to Chapter 2. ※ The Tera Burning effect applied to characters created in Challengers World will not be transferred with the World Leap. When the World Leap period in Challengers World ends, all characters remaining in the world will be deleted along with their items and Cash items. Items in your Cash storage, item storage, or Maple Auction will not be moved when you use the World Leap. The Custom Backgrounds registered in the Custom Backgrounds list will not be moved. In Challengers World, you cannot purchase the following items from the Cash Shop: Character Slot Expansion Coupon 4/8 Slot Storage Expansion Coupon House Wedding Ticket The following features are not available in Challengers World: Transferring Link Skills Maple Union Union Artifact System Monster Collection Character Slot Expansions ※ When the growth period ends, you will no longer be able to use shops, storage, or any content other than the World Leap. Make sure you check the ‘Challengers World Benefits’ tab’s information in the Event List. ※ The Challengers World growth period, World Leap duration and target worlds are subject to change. [Back to Overview] New Season Boss: Kai Kai, the time wanderer who wields the ‘Sequencer’, a sword imbued with the power of time. He uses devastating swordsmanship skills. Prove your qualifications over the true power of time by facing the undisputed champion of another world! The Season Boss, Kai, has been added. This boss can only be challenged in Challengers World. You can only clear this boss 1 time per week per Maple ID. The clear record is reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM. This boss is not included in the weekly boss clear limit. You can acquire more powerful rewards than normal bosses. You will not acquire an Intense Power Crystal when you defeat this boss. ※ Certain rewards can only be used in Challengers World. Participation Requirements Normal Mode: Level 270 or higher Challengers World character. Hard Mode: Level 280 or higher Challengers World character. ※ Zero can participate after completing story quest Chapter 2. Participation Method Silent Protocol You can enter through the NPC Annette, located in Henesys, Nameless Town, Cernium Square, and City of Researchers in Challengers World. You can acquire the following rewards by defeating Kai. Gold Meso Pouch Unstable Time Fragment (can be traded, expires on April 16, 2026 at 2:00 AM) (Hard Mode only) Time’s Eternal Armor Box (untradeable, expires after 7 days) (Hard Mode only) Kai’s Eternal Armor Box (untradeable, expires after 7 days) (Hard Mode only) Kai’s Pitch Black Accessory Box (untradeable, expires after 7 days) Kai’s Basic Sol Erda Fragment Box (untradeable, expires after 7 days) Kai’s Advanced Sol Erda Fragment Box (untradeable, expires after 7 days) (Hard Mode only) ※ When you acquire a Gold Meso Pouch, it will instantly increase your held mesos by 10m. ※ You can exchange 10 Unstable Time Fragments for 1 Eternal Hat, Top, Bottom, or Shoulder. ※ You can acquire 1 Eternal Hat, Top, Bottom, or Shoulder from the Time’s Eternal Armor Box. ※ You can acquire 1 Eternal Shoes, Gloves, or Cape from the Kai’s Eternal Armor Box. ※ You can acquire a certain number of untradeable Sol Erda Fragments based on a set rate from the Kai’s Basic/Advanced Sol Erda Fragment Box. Kai’s Soul Skill has been added. Recall Strike[Master Level: 1]Kai, summoned by the Soul Weapon’s power, deals a powerful sword strike on enemies in front of you.[Activation Command: ↓↓↑↑ + Attack key] [Level 1]Consumes 250 Soul. For 120 seconds, summon Kai that deals 450% damage 4 times on up to 10 enemies.The Soul Weapon summon’s damage is calculated differently than the character’s.Cooldown: 150 seconds. Information Neo Vandalism (Phase 1) Voltage Overdrive (Phase 2) City of Eternal Night (Reward) Level: 270 (Normal)/Hard (280) HP: 126t (Normal)/483t (Hard) Time Limit: 20 minutes Death Count: 5 There are a few main mechanics when fighting Kai. While fighting Kai, the Chrono Gauge (top half of the UI) will fill automatically. However, it will be decreased if you are hit by Kai’s attacks. You can use the Chrono Step skill (bottom half of the UI) with the NPC Chat/Harvest key. When used, you will dash in a direction while avoiding Kai’s attacks for 0.5 seconds. You prepare 1 charge every 5 seconds and can hold up to 3 charges. Above the UI, there will be a timer for the Time Distortion. After 1 minute, Kai will activate the Time Distortion where he uses extremely fast skills. When this happens, you can use the Chrono Break skill with the Tab key to slow down time (the duration is based on how full the Chrono Gauge was), allowing you to dodge the attacks with Chrono Step. In the Time Distortion, successfully parrying an attack with Chrono Step will instantly refund its cooldown. As you dodge attacks in Time Distortion, there will be a score at the top of the screen. It will go up as you dodge attacks but if you die during the Time Distortion, it will freeze until you revive. If you can reach 10,000 points before the Time Distortion ends, then Kai will enter a groggy state and all of your cooldowns will be decreased by 40s. When Kai reaches 50% HP, he will become stronger and his skills will be enhanced. [Back to Overview] [Boss Clear Event] Kai First Clear Event The swordsman using the power of time, Kai! [Back to Overview] Challengers World Missions Become a challenger in Challengers World! Complete Challengers World exclusive missions and acquire rewards! Event Participation Requirements: Characters created (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) in Challengers, Challengers 2, Challengers 3, or Challengers 4 world. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Challengers World’ event in the Event List to start the event. Through the Event List, you can check your Challengers World Missions progress. ※ The <Challengers World Missions> progress records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID. Event Progression You can acquire Challengers Points, Challengers Coins, and Advanced Challengers Coins by completing three types of missions. As you collect Challengers Points, your Tier will increase. You can acquire corresponding rewards every time you reach a new Tier. ※ You can reach master Tier by collecting 65,000 Challengers Points and clearing the ‘Defeat Normal Kai’ mission. ※ You can reach master Tier by collecting 90,000 Challengers Points and clearing the ‘Defeat Hard Kai’ mission. You can use Challengers Coins and Advanced Challengers Coins in the Challengers Shop. ※ Tier rewards and each mission’s rewards can only be received 1 time per Maple ID. Missions Level Missions You can acquire Points and Coins by reaching the level corresponding to each mission. LevelChallengers PointsChallengers  Hunting Mission You can acquire 300 Coins by defeating 1,000 monsters within your level range. The Hunting Mission can be completed 1 time per day per Maple ID, up to 5 times per week. You can click the <Use Pass> button in the Challengers World UI and use 2,000 Maple Points to complete 1 daily Hunting Mission that you did not complete previously. ※ The Hunting Mission will only progress if you defeat monsters within your level range while you are in a party of 1 or are not in a party. ※ The <Hunting Mission Pass> can be used up to the number of uncompleted Hunting Missions from the previous week, as of every Thursday at reset. ※ However, the number of Hunting Mission Passes available during the last week will be equal to the number of uncompleted Hunting Missions from 12:00 AM the day before. Boss Missions You can acquire Points, Challengers Coins, and Advanced Challengers Coins by defeating bosses. Your boss defeat will only be recognized if you solo the boss. It will be recognized even if you succeed in Practice Mode. If you defeat a higher difficulty boss, all lower difficulty bosses will be recognized as having been defeated. ※ All Boss Missions will be recognized as being cleared when the final phase’s boss monster is defeated. You cannot World Leap while you have them. [Back to Overview] Mystic Seal Mystic Seals have appeared in Challengers World! Help Elwin and Lily break the seals to acquire the Seal’s Cores filled with special power! Event Participation Requirements: Level 200 or higher characters created (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) in Challengers, Challengers 2, Challengers 3, or Challengers 4 world. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM. After completing the ‘Another Power, Arcane Force’ quest, you can select the ‘[Challengers] Mystic Seal’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. ※ The ‘Mystic Seal’ event can only be completed on one character at a time. If you have already completed the ‘[Challengers] Mystic Seal’ quest on one character then participate in the event on another character, all event progress will be reset for the character you previously completed it on. Seal Control Rod Every day at midnight, you will automatically be given 3 Seal Control Rods, regardless of if you were logged into the game or not. ※ If you have 17 or more Control Rods but less than 20, you will be given the remaining amount up to the maximum limit of 20. ※ If you have 20 Seal Control Rods, you will not receive any additional Rods. Breaking the Seal You can break the Seal 1 time using 1 Seal Control Rod, or as many times as the total number of Seal Control Rods you have. When you break the Seal, you can acquire one of 5 rarity Seal’s Cores based on a set probability. The Seals that you can break will change based on your Challengers World Tier. The Seal’s Core appearance probability will also change based on this. [Back to Overview] Challengers EXP Duo Your Challengers world and regular world’s characters can grow at the same time! Enjoy the 1+1 experience benefit! Event Participation Requirements: A level 260 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can participate in the Challenger EXP Duo event by purchasing a Ticket for 10,000 NX in regular worlds (cannot be purchased with Maple Points or Mileage). You can use the ticket to designate your current regular world character as the recipient of the experience benefit. When you login to Challengers World, you can check the ‘[Growth Sharing Event] Challengers EXP Duo’ event in the Event List. You can designate the character you are currently logged into in Challengers World as the character that can acquire Duo Points by hunting monsters within your level range. You can use your Duo Points by logging into your previously designated regular world character, and you will acquire experience when you use them. ※ You can only designate level 260 or higher characters. You cannot change your designated characters. ※ You can only purchase a Ticket if you have a level 260 or higher character in Challengers, Challengers 2, Challengers 3, or Challengers 4. ※ You can only purchase Tickets until April 15, 2026 at 11:00 PM. Challengers EXP Duo Ticket You can only purchase 1 Challengers EXP Duo Ticket per week per Maple ID. The available quantity will be refreshed every Thursday at 12:00 AM. The purchased Ticket duration is 7 days. Starting from the time you purchase the Ticket, you can hunt monsters within your level range to acquire Duo Points. You can use your Duo Points for 14 days starting from the time you used the Ticket. ※ However, the Challengers EXP Duo Ticket period and the Duo Point usage period cannot go past April 15, 2025 at 11:59 PM. ※ If the designated Challengers World character is deleted or leaped to a regular world, you cannot make an additional designation. You cannot acquire any more Duo Points by hunting monsters within your level range until the usage period ends. Duo Points When you defeat monsters within your level range on your Challengers World character, you can acquire Duo Points. You can only use them on your character in regular worlds. The amount of Duo Points acquired is based on the number of monsters you have defeated. During the usage period, you can acquire up to 1.5m Duo Points by defeating 645,000 monsters. You can acquire experience by using Duo Points. [Back to Overview] Challengers Partner Fun together! Complete various missions with your Challengers Partner and acquire rewards! Event Participation Requirements: A level 200 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) created in Challengers World. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Challengers Partner’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to Friendy&Frieny in Henesys to start the event. Partner Agreement You can talk to Friendy&Frieny in Henesys to make a partner agreement. ※ You cannot make a partner agreement between two Maple IDs of the same person. ※ You cannot make a partner agreement if the other person already has a partner record. Both characters in the partner agreement must be in Henesys to complete it. Once you form a partnership, it cannot be invalidated until the event ends. If your partner deletes their Maple ID or moves all of their characters to another world with the World Leap, the event will no longer be available. ※ The rewards for completed missions can still be claimed, and you can continue to accumulate Hunting Points. Once you complete a partner agreement, you cannot form another partnership with anyone else. After completing a partner agreement, you can acquire Hunting Points with all of your Challengers World characters and participate in the Combat Missions. Hunting Points You can use the Hunting Points accumulated by your partner to acquire experience based on your character’s level. You can acquire Hunting Points by defeating monsters within your level range. Your partner will receive 1 Hunting Point for every 1 monster you defeat. You can acquire up to 100,000 Hunting Points per week. You can acquire Hunting Points until April 15, 2026 at 11:55 PM. You can use Hunting Poitns until April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM. ※ Hunting Points and partner related information in the event UI are updated periodically, and may not match in real time. Combat Missions Combat Missions are missions where you must defeat bosses with your partner. You must duo the boss. Clears in Practice Mode will also count. Defeating a boss higher than the specified difficulty will also count. Both characters must have remaining Death Count at the time the boss is defeated to complete the mission. ※ All boss missions will be recognized as being cleared when the final phase’s boss monster is defeated. [Back to Overview] Hyper Burning MAX Infinite growth with 1+4 level ups until level 260! Meet the returning Hyper Burning MAX with even more powerful benefits. Hyper Burning Event Participation Requirements: A newly created character during the event period. An existing character level 200~258. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM. During the event period, you can only create 1 Hyper Burning MAX character per Maple ID. When creating a new character, you can designate it as a Hyper Burning MAX character, or you can designate an existing level 200~258 character as a Hyper Burning MAX character. Hyper Burning MAX characters will level up an additional 4 times every time they level up, from level 10 to level 260. ※ If Zero is designated as a Hyper Burning MAX character at creation, they will receive the 1+4 level up benefit from level 100~260. ※ When a character is designated as a Hyper Burning MAX character, the following items are restricted from use until level 260: Extreme Growth Potions, Growth Potions (200~209, 200~219, 200~229). Hyper Burning MAX characters will receive the following growth support rewards through the Hyper Burning MAX UI when they reach certain conditions. Hyper Burning MAX characters created in Challengers World can receive enhanced Challengers World rewards. You can receive the character creation rewards on both newly created Hyper Burning MAX characters and existing characters designated as Hyper Burning. However, if you designate an existing character as Hyper Burning MAX, you will not receive previous level rewards, you will only receive the rewards for the levels you reach after you begin the event. [Back to Overview] Super Tutorial A guide prepared to help players adventuring through Maple World! Event Participation Requirements: All Maple IDs that login during the event period. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM. When you first login during the event period, you can choose to start the ‘Super Tutorial’ in the login stage. If you select ‘I Need It’, you will proceed with the guide, and if you select ‘No Thanks’, you can skip it. ※ You can only choose to start the ‘Super Tutorial’ 1 time per Maple ID. Character Creation Guide When you choose to start the Super Tutorial, the ‘Character Creation Guide’ will begin in the login stage. It will guide you through world select, character creation, and choosing a job. You can press the ESC button during the guide to skip it. Super Tutorial Newly created Hyper Burning MAX characters that chose to start the Super Tutorial will be provided guides at set points in time. Up to level 200, the guide will be provided in the Event List’s ‘Tera Blink’. After level 200, the guide will be provided in the ‘Super Tutorial’. You can stop the Super Tutorial by clicking the Help button in the Event List. If you delete the character and recreate it, the Super Tutorial’s progress will be maintained. However, if you stop the Super Tutorial before deleting, it will not start again. The ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event provides the ‘Simplified Event Start’ feature. [Back to Overview] [Growth Event] Ellanos Chronicle Your journey with Ellanos, the mysterious being that appeared within the illusions, begins. Help Ellanos grow to acquire experience benefits and powerful skills! Event Participation Requirements: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. You can start this event at the same time as the other Night of Falling Illusion related events. After you start the event, you can select the ‘[Growth Event] Ellanos Chronicle’ event in the Event List to check your progress. Investigation Missions Every week, you can complete the investigation missions by defeating 10,000 monsters within your level range. For every 2,000 monsters you defeat, you can click the ‘Investigate’ button to acquire 800 Illusion Coins. You can acquire up to 4,000 Illusion Coins per week. You can use the Investigation Pass to complete one investigation you did not complete as of the previous week. 1 Investigation Pass costs 3,000 Maple Points. ※ The <Investigation Mission> participation records are shared between all characters in the Maple ID. Hunting Event Skill When you participate in the event, you will automatically acquire the ‘Walking Ellanos I’ hunting event skill. When you enter a hunting ground with monsters within your level range, the skill will be automatically activated. As you defeat monsters within your level range, you will fill up the gauge. When the gauge is filled and the skill activates, you will acquire experience then Ellanos will take a walk while attacking nearby enemies. The‘Walking Ellanos I’ skill will grow based on the number of times you complete the investigation missions. When it grows, the number of attacks and the experience benefit will increase. Common Active Skill When you participate in the event, you will automatically acquire the ‘Ellanos I’ skill. You can see it in your Beginner skill tab. You can use the ‘Ellanos I’ skill to summon Ellanos on the map. It will attack nearby enemies periodically. The ‘Ellanos I’ skill will grow based on the number of times you complete the investigation missions. When it grows, its attack range and damage will gradually increase. [Back to Overview] [Boss Event] Illusions’ Memories Defeat powerful boss monsters and acquire Illusions’ Memories! Event Participation Requirements: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2) that has participated in the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ March 18, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Night of Falling Illusions’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. You can start this event at the same time as the other Night of Falling Illusion related events. After you start the event, you can select the ‘[Boss Event] Illusions’ Memories’ event in the Event List to check your progress. Acquiring Illusions’ Memories You can acquire Illusions’ Memories by soloing weekly bosses. If you have already received Illusions’ Memories for the week, and you defeat a boss that gives a higher number of Memories than the previously defeated boss, you will only receive Memories equal to the difference between them. You can acquire up to 3,000 Dim Illusions’ Memories, 2,000 Bright Illusions’ Memories, and 100 Complete Illusions’ Memories per week per world. They can only be used in the world that you acquired them in. You can click the ‘Acquisition Rate Per Boss’ in the Illusions’ Memories UI to check how many Illusions’ Memories you get per boss. ※ Daily and monthly bosses are not included. ※ The weekly boss defeat records are reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM. Boss Defeat Criteria Your boss defeat will only be recognized if you solo the boss. It will be recognized even if you succeed in Practice Mode. The boss will be recognized as being cleared when the final phase’s boss monster is defeated. You can then acquire Hideout Tokens. The amount of Illusions’ Memories acquired from defeating boss monsters is as follows. Event Participation Requirements: All Kinesis characters. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM. [Back to Overview] [Beauty Event] KINETIC Beauty Express Participate in the KINETIC attendance check, filled with pretty rewards! Experience Kinesis’ new look! Event Participation Requirements: [Beauty Extraction]: Kinesis character created before the December 18, 2025 maintenance. [Beauty Transfer]: Kinesis character created after the December 18, 2025 maintenance. ※ Eos/Helios worlds cannot participate in the KINETIC Beauty Express event. ※ You can only participate in the KINETIC Beauty Express event 1 time per Maple ID. Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘[Beauty Event] KINETIC Beauty Express’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start the event. Beauty Extraction You can login to the Kinesis character you want to extract the Beauty information from and select the ‘Extract beauty information’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can extract that character’s current beauty, as well as all hair, face, and skin Mannequin information stored in the Beauty Room. To complete the beauty extraction, you must review all of the precautions and designate the default appearance for the character you are extracting the beauty information from. You will need to pay 30,000 Maple Points to complete the beauty extraction. ※ The default appearance can be selected from the available options when creating a Kinesis character. ※ The beauty extracted character’s appearance, all information stored in the Beauty Room, and Mannequins/slot expansion details will be reset to the default. The changes will be applied to the character that you click the [Import Mannequin] and [Import Appearance] buttons on. ※ When the extraction is complete, it cannot be canceled. Please make sure you are extracting the beauty information from the right character. Beauty Transfer After completing the beauty extraction, you can login to the Kinesis you want to apply the beauty information to and select the ‘Apply extracted beauty information’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can view the extracted beauty information and mannequin information. You can apply the extracted mannequin information or appearance information to the current character by clicking the [Import Mannequin] or [Import Appearance] buttons at the bottom of the UI. ※ Beauty information can only be applied to a character of the same gender as the extracted character. ※ Mannequin and Appearance Imports can only be completed on a single character. Please make sure you are applying the beauty information to the desired character. ※ The appearance and Beauty Room of the character to whom the beauty information is being applied to will be overwritten with the extracted information. [Back to Overview] VIP Sauna Spend time in the VIP Sauna to acquire a large amount of experience! Event Participation Requirements: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ June 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM. In the Event List’s ‘Use the VIP Sauna’ event, you can use 3,000 Maple Points to charge your VIP Sauna usage time by 1 hour. You can charge it by up to 48 hours per week in this way. If you use a VIP Sauna Ticket, your VIP Sauna usage time will be charged by 30 minutes. ※ The charged VIP Sauna usage time is shared between all characters within the Maple ID. While you have remaining VIP Sauna usage time, you can select the ‘Use the VIP Sauna’ event from the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to the Hotel Staff in <Sleepywood: Sleepywood Hotel Lobby> to enter <Sleepywood: VIP Sauna Room>. While you are inside the <Sleepywood: VIP Sauna Room>, you will automatically acquire experience based on your level every 5 seconds. ※ Characters over level 294 that enter the VIP Sauna Room will receive the same amount of experience as a level 294 character. ※ When the VIP Sauna usage time runs out, you will automatically return to your original location or <Sleepywood: Sleepywood Hotel Lobby>. ※ After the event period ends, you will not be able to acquire experience even if you had remaining VIP Sauna usage time. ※ On Red PC, the VIP Sauna experience acquisition will be decreased by 50%. You can receive Maple Home furniture items based on your cumulative VIP Sauna charge time. Cumulative TimeFurniture30 HoursSleepywood Wooden Washstand100 HoursSleepywood Sauna Bath200 HoursSleepywood Wooden Foot Bath500 HoursVIP Sauna Cafe ※ Maple Home requires a level 260 or higher character that has completed ‘The Day After’ story within the world. You can then complete the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’ quest through the lightbulb icon to create a Maple Home. ※ Maple Home is shared between all characters within the world. The furniture acquired from the Voucher can be used by all characters within the Maple ID. [Back to Overview] Mechaberry Farm The Mechaberry army has attacked the strawberry farm! Help Spiegelmann stop them and get lots of experience! Event Participation Requirements: A level 280~299 character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). When you use a ‘Mechaberry Farm Entry Ticket’, you can go to the <Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle Entrance> through the ‘Mechaberry Farm’ event in the Event List. You can talk to Spiegelmann at the entrance to enter the ‘Strawberry Farm Battle’. ※ You can acquire ‘Mechaberry Farm Entry Tickets’ through the Momentum Pass and the event meso shop. Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle In ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’, you will have 30 minutes to defeat the Mechaberry army to restore the farm and acquire experience based on your level. ※ You will automatically exit when you defeat Mechaberry Psi and restore the farm to 100%. ※ You can enter Mechaberry Farm for up to 24 hours from the time you use the Entry Ticket. ※ Any additional experience effects are not applied in ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’, and Multikills will not occur. If you leave before the farm is restored to 100%, you can freely re-enter Mechaberry Farm until your farm usage time limit ends. ※ If you leave the farm while the Fever is activated, the Fever Gauge will be reset when you re-enter. ※ You can only use another Entry Ticket when the previous farm usage time limit ends or the farm is restored to 100%. Spiegel Burst This is a special attacking skill that you can use by pressing the NPC Chat/Harvest key in the ‘Mechaberry Farm: Strawberry Farm Battle’. When you defeat Mechaberry army troops, you will acquire Fever Points. When you acquire 3000 Points, Fever mode will be activated for 10 seconds. ※ While Fever mode is activated, you can use Spiegel Burst without any cooldowns. [Back to Overview] New Name Auction A chance to get the name you want! Try using Mister New Name’s New Name Auction! Event Participation Requirements: A level 10 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). Event Period: December 24, 2025 at 10:00 AM ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM. ※ You can register character names for sale until January 11, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘New Name Auction’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to Mister New Name in main towns to enter the New Name Auction. New Name Auction After entering, you can proceed with the character name auction. The New Name Auction can be used on a per Maple ID basis, and you use Maple Points in the auction. You can only sell or bid on character names on Green PCs. You can set the sale price for 30,000~59,999,999 Maple Points. When registering a name for sale, you can choose between 8 hours, 24 hours, and 48 hours for the auction’s duration. You can only sell 1 character name at a time. You can only be trading up to 10 names at a time, including selling, bidding, and unclaimed completed trades. In an auction, you can bid on a name with a price higher than a certain amount than the currently registered highest bid. The minimum bid amount depends on the current highest bid. The auction will end between 2 minutes before and 2 minutes after the specified auction end time. When it ends, the highest bidder will win the character name. Completed trade details are stored until May 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM, and will be automatically deleted if the name and payment are not claimed during this period. After the event ends, you can claim your names and payment through the NPC Mister New Name. ※ Character names that violate the name policy are subject to sanctions, and they may be sanctioned when attempting to trade them. ※ Selling character names is only available to characters that have been created at least 90 days ago. ※ Characters who have changed names within 1 week cannot sell their names. ※ After a new name is received through the New Name Auction, that character cannot change its name through Mister New Name for 1 week. ※ Regardless of the time that the character’s name was changed, you can receive names you have won in the New Name Auction or return unsold character names. ※ Reselling character names won during the event is prohibited. ※ Selling and bidding cancellations due to changing your mind are not possible. Character names cannot be restored after a trade has concluded. [Back to Overview] Nickname Express Move your names quickly and safely! Try using the Nickname Express! Event Participation Requirements: A level 10 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). Event Period: December 24, 2025 at 10:00 AM ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Nickname Express’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate. ※ Characters who have been created within the past 3 months or have changed their names within the past week cannot use the Nickname Express. Name Extraction You can login to the character whose name you want to extract and select the ‘Extract name’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can pay 30,000 Maple Points to extract that character’s current name. ※ When the extraction is complete, it cannot be canceled. Please make sure you are extracting the name from the right character. Name Transfer You can login to the character you want to apply the name to and select the ‘Apply extracted name’ option in the Event List to open a special UI where you can apply the extracted name. Extracted character names can be applied to any character in your Maple ID, regardless of the world. ※ After extracting and transferring a name, you cannot list it for sale on the New Name Auction for 1 week. [Back to Overview] Custom Illustration Event [Custom Illustration] The Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations Michelovinci, the wandering artist who draws illustrations by reading energy. Help him adapt to your energy and receive Illustration Request Tickets! Event Participation Requirements: A level 270 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). Event Period: December 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 25, 2025 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations’ event or ‘‘Wandering Artist That Reads the World’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate. You can also talk to the NPC Michelovinci and complete the corresponding quests to participate. ※ The participation is per Maple ID. ※ The event completion period is different based on the participating character’s level. The Wandering Artist That Draws Illustrations You can complete the event by participating through the NPC Michelovinci or through the Event List during the event period matching your character’s level. The event participation periods are as follows. Character LevelEvent Participation Period285 or higherDecember 18, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 21, 2025 at 11:59 PM280 ~ 284December 19, 2025 at 12:00 AM ~ December 21, 2025 at 11:59 PM275 ~ 279December 20, 2025 at 12:00 AM ~ December 21, 2025 at 11:59 PM270 ~ 274December 21, 2025 at 12:00 AM ~ December 21, 2025 at 11:59 PM When you complete the event, you will receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket. If you don’t claim it instantly, you can receive it on another level 10 or higher character within the Maple ID through the Event List or the NPC Michelovinci. The Wandering Artist That Draws the World You can complete the event by participating through the NPC Michelovinci or through the Event List during the event period matching your character’s level. The event participation periods are as follows. Character LevelEvent Participation Period285 or higherDecember 22, 2025 at 12:00 AM ~ December 25, 2025 at 11:59 PM280 ~ 284December 23, 2025 at 12:00 AM ~ December 25, 2025 at 11:59 PM275 ~ 279December 24, 2025 at 12:00 AM ~ December 25, 2025 at 11:59 PM270 ~ 274December 25, 2025 at 12:00 AM ~ December 25, 2025 at 11:59 PM When you complete the event, you will receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket. If you don’t claim it instantly, you can receive it on another level 10 or higher character within the Maple ID through the Event List or the NPC Michelovinci. ※ The Illustration Request Ticket is an item that lets you request a custom illustration. ※ The Illustration Request Ticket will expire 30 days after being acquired, and can only be put into storage. ※ You can participate in the ‘Wandering Artist That Reads the World’ event even if you don’t participate in the ‘Wandering Artist that Draws Illustrations’ event. ※ If you reach a certain character level during the event period, you can participate in the event period corresponding to your new level. [Back to Overview] [Custom Illustration] Colourful Energy The wandering artist Michelovinci wants to understand the world by gathering the energy of various colours. Help him experience the diverse world of colours and receive Illustration Request Tickets! Event Participation Requirements: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). Event Period: January 1, 2026 at 10:00 AM ~ January 14, 2026 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Colourful Energy’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate. You can also talk to the NPC Michelovinci and complete the corresponding quests to participate. ※ The participation is per Maple ID. Colourful Energy You will collect Colourful Energy whenever you defeat monsters within your level range on a character within the Maple ID. When you have collected 50,000 Colourful Energy, you can complete the quest through the Event List or by talking to the NPC Michelovinci to receive 1 Illustration Request Ticket. You can complete this quest up to 4 times per week. The completion count will refresh every Thursday at 12:00 Am. If you have completed the quest 4 times in a week, you can start it again after the weekly refresh. The amount of collected Colourful Energy will not reset even when the quest completion count refreshes. ※ The Illustration Request Ticket is an item that lets you request a custom illustration. ※ The Illustration Request Ticket will expire 30 days after being acquired, and can only be put into storage. ※ The weekly Colourful Energy completions are calculated based on the date that you complete the quest. [Back to Overview] Little Snowman’s Happiness Help make the Little Snowman happy! Event Participation Requirements: A level 101 or higher character (or a Zero character that has completed story quest Chapter 2). Event Period: December 25, 2025 at 10:00 AM ~ December 31, 2025 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘Little Snowman’s Happiness’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to participate. Every day, you can collect 10 Clear Snow from monsters within your level range. You can do this up to 3 times over the event period. For each day you complete the daily quest, you can receive the following rewards. Little Snowman’s Santa Stocking Little Santa Hat Little Santa Overall (M) Little Santa Shoes Little Snowman’s Rudolph Stocking Jingle Bell Rudolph Hairpin Little Santa Overall (F) Little Santa Shoes Little Snowman Mask Voucher Xmas Odium During this time, major towns will be decorated for Christmas, including Odium! [Back to Overview] Sunday Maple Event Period: December 21, 2025 December 28, 2025 January 4, 2026 January 11, 2026 On December 21, the following benefits will take place: 3x Treasure Hunter experience Rune respawn and cooldown decreased to 10 minutes Rune experience buff effect +100% Combo Kill experience +300% +250% Monster Park clear experience 2x Sol Erda acquired from hunting On December 28, the following benefits will take place: 3x Treasure Hunter experience 50% discount on Ability reset costs Rune respawn and cooldown decreased to 10 minutes Rune experience buff effect +100% Combo Kill experience +300% +250% Monster Park clear experience 2x Sol Erda acquired from hunting Challengers World Only – Shining Star Force Time 30% discount on Star Force enhancement costs 30% reduction on destruction rate when Star Forcing at 21 stars or lower On January 4, the following benefits will take place: Miracle Time On January 11, the following benefits will take place: When your [Hexa Stat] main stat is level 5 or higher, the main stat’s enhancement rate is increased by 20%. 3x Treasure Hunter experience 50% discount on Ability reset costs 50% discount on Spell Trace enhancement costs +250% Monster Park clear experience 1+1 Star Force enhancements up to 10 stars 5x chance to get Magnificent Souls +100% Monster C ollection monster registration rate Receive 3 Mystery Monster Eggs 3 Elite Monsters summoned at a time Challengers World Only – Shining Star Force Time 30% discount on Star Force enhancement costs 30% reduction on destruction rate when Star Forcing at 21 stars or lower Event Improvements It has been improved so that in ‘Tera Blink;, the mission guides will only be provided for newly created Hyper Burning MAX characters that chose to participate in the ;Super Tutorial;. [Back to Overview]

items.title: 2025 MapleStory Winter Showcase – Crown!
items.summary: The winter showcase for the winter update, Maplestory Crown, took place yesterday! The main features were a new 6th job common skill for bossing, not one,...

kmsBreakdown.summary: The winter showcase for the winter update, Maplestory Crown, took place yesterday! The main features were a new 6th job common skill for bossing, not one, not two, but three new bosses, and the Kinesis remaster!
highlights: The test server also opened up shortly afterwards, but I think this time, I’m going to skip the KMST post since the first official server patch is in a few days so there isn’t much time in-between. This post will just be an overview of what was revealed at the showcase.
Sol Hecate is a summon skill that reacts to your own actions. It’s focused entirely on bossing, compared to the 1st common core Sol Janus which was focused on grinding.
The new boss, Radiant Malefic Star, is related to the new Apostle Ymir that appeared in the Epic Dungeon: Nightmare Paradise (not actually her, but a sort of clone).
This system is designed to help fill the gap between the Genesis and Destiny weapons.
The new boss, Jupiter, is the leader of the Ancient Gods, and is an end-game boss.
This is a new level 295 area that will conclude the Ancient Gods storyline.
