kmsBreakdown.audience: Affects bossing-focused players and progression clears.

sections.title: Overview

details.value: The test server also opened up shortly afterwards, but I think this time, I’m going to skip the KMST post since the first official server patch is in a few days so there isn’t much time in-between. This post will just be an overview of what was revealed at the showcase.

sections.summary: The test server also opened up shortly afterwards, but I think this time, I’m going to skip the KMST post since the first official server patch is in a few days so there isn’t much time in-between. This post will just be an overview of what was revealed at the showcase.

items: Sol Hecate is a summon skill that reacts to your own actions. It’s focused entirely on bossing, compared to the 1st common core Sol Janus which was focused on grinding.

It will gain additional effects as you level it up. Level 1: Sol Hecate: Styx – a 60 second cooldown attack that binds enemies for an additional 4 seconds (stacking with other binds). You can set it to automatically activate when you cast a specific skill. At level 10, this attack gets enhanced. Level 20: Sol Hecate: Charon – a revive skill that allows you to ignore death then gives a 10 second iframe afterwards with a 10 minute cooldown (like Dark Knight’s Reincarnation). Level 30: Sol Hecate: Phlegethon – a 2 minute cooldown burst attack.

Level 1: Sol Hecate: Styx – a 60 second cooldown attack that binds enemies for an additional 4 seconds (stacking with other binds). You can set it to automatically activate when you cast a specific skill. At level 10, this attack gets enhanced.
Level 20: Sol Hecate: Charon – a revive skill that allows you to ignore death then gives a 10 second iframe afterwards with a 10 minute cooldown (like Dark Knight’s Reincarnation).
Level 30: Sol Hecate: Phlegethon – a 2 minute cooldown burst attack.
Since this is the first common skill that deals damage to bosses, the damage and number of hits will be set individually for each job to ensure it is balanced.
The new boss, Radiant Malefic Star, is related to the new Apostle Ymir that appeared in the Epic Dungeon: Nightmare Paradise (not actually her, but a sort of clone).
It is in a new side-area from Arteria, similar to Karotte and Hotel Arcs.
It is a level 280 boss that can be fought in a party of 1~3 players.
You will have to swap between reality and illusion and coordinate with your party members.
It drops the new Brilliant Boss accessory: Entrancing Nightmare (ring). The Brilliant Boss 4-set effect is +20 all stats, +500 HP/MP, +20 attack/magic attack, +5% critical damage.
The Brilliant Boss 4-set effect is +20 all stats, +500 HP/MP, +20 attack/magic attack, +5% critical damage.
Normal Mode is between Extreme Suu and Normal Kaling (recommended ~200m CP).
Hard Mode is between Hard Limbo and Hard Baldrix (recommended ~400m CP).
This system is designed to help fill the gap between the Genesis and Destiny weapons.

You can convert your existing secondary weapon into an Astra secondary weapon (becomes fully untradeable) by collecting Traces of Battle and Erion Fragments. Traces of Battle are collected by defeating bosses (like Traces of Darkness for the Genesis liberation). Erion Fragments can be acquired from boss drops (tradeable) and from Grandis daily quests (untradeable).
Traces of Battle are collected by defeating bosses (like Traces of Darkness for the Genesis liberation).
Erion Fragments can be acquired from boss drops (tradeable) and from Grandis daily quests (untradeable).
You can upgrade the Astra secondary weapon up to 3 stages (maximum 15 -> 20 -> 30 stars).
Your potential will be carried over.
For more specific cases such as shields, MEE’d items, Dual Blade, Zero, it will be applied differently while focusing on fairness and preserving value.
The new boss, Jupiter, is the leader of the Ancient Gods, and is an end-game boss.
It is a level 295 boss that can be fought in a party of 1~3 players.
You must face off with him in 3 forms, varying with how much he has combined with the entity.
It drops the new Brilliant Boss accessory: Original Sin of Pride (face accessory). The Brilliant Boss 5-set effect is +20 all stats, +500 HP/MP, +20 attack/magic attack, +15% boss damage.
The Brilliant Boss 5-set effect is +20 all stats, +500 HP/MP, +20 attack/magic attack, +15% boss damage.
Normal Mode is between Hard Adversary and Hard Limbo (recommended ~400m CP).
Hard Mode is after Extreme Kaling.
This is a new level 295 area that will conclude the Ancient Gods storyline.
It is a secret underground desert where the Ancient God Gob used to craft weapons with a giant furnace called Chronos.
You can get the Grand Authentic Symbol: Geardrock which gives +50% additional experience and +15% drop/meso rate when fully levelled up.

Speeding Up Level 275+ Epic Dungeon experience rewards increased. Monster Park Extreme experience increased for level 275+. New Monster Park areas added (Shangri-La, Arteria, Carcion, Talahart). Monster Park daily entry limits increased (2 free per day, 7 per day per character, 14 per day per world).
Epic Dungeon experience rewards increased.
Monster Park Extreme experience increased for level 275+.
New Monster Park areas added (Shangri-La, Arteria, Carcion, Talahart).
Monster Park daily entry limits increased (2 free per day, 7 per day per character, 14 per day per world).

Link Skills Level 3 Expansion When you reach level 285 on a character, you will acquire the Proof of a Radiant Hero. You can use this item on one of your characters to increase that character’s Link Skill to level 3. If you level up a Link Skill with no/low utility, it will also give an additional damage passive to that character only (e.g. level 3 Mercedes link gives Mercedes an extra 5% damage).
When you reach level 285 on a character, you will acquire the Proof of a Radiant Hero. You can use this item on one of your characters to increase that character’s Link Skill to level 3.
If you level up a Link Skill with no/low utility, it will also give an additional damage passive to that character only (e.g. level 3 Mercedes link gives Mercedes an extra 5% damage).

Level 11 Authentic Symbol Benefits When an Authentic Symbol or Grand Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 20% damage to that area’s boss (e.g. Cernium -> Chosen Seren, Hotel Arcs -> Kalos, and so on). When an Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 10% experience acquired.
When an Authentic Symbol or Grand Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 20% damage to that area’s boss (e.g. Cernium -> Chosen Seren, Hotel Arcs -> Kalos, and so on).
When an Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 10% experience acquired.

Destiny Weapon 2nd Growth The 2nd growth quests are for First Adversary, Limbo, and Baldrix. The 2nd growth will enhance the two Destiny Weapon skills. The 2nd growth will let you enhance the Destiny Weapon up to 25 stars.
The 2nd growth quests are for First Adversary, Limbo, and Baldrix.
The 2nd growth will enhance the two Destiny Weapon skills.
The 2nd growth will let you enhance the Destiny Weapon up to 25 stars.

Challengers World will return with additional changes. Challengers World will only last 4 months. The attendance check mission has been removed (so you don’t feel forced to stay the full duration of the event). The level missions have been divided into separate missions for each level up to level 290 (e.g. level 275, 276, 277 and so on are separate missions now). Challengers World rewards have been changed, with additional 6th job materials but less items like Meister Cubes. Challengers World will have Shining Star Force every 2 weeks.
Challengers World will only last 4 months.
The attendance check mission has been removed (so you don’t feel forced to stay the full duration of the event).
The level missions have been divided into separate missions for each level up to level 290 (e.g. level 275, 276, 277 and so on are separate missions now).
Challengers World rewards have been changed, with additional 6th job materials but less items like Meister Cubes.
Challengers World will have Shining Star Force every 2 weeks.
The new Challengers Partner event lets you pair up with a friend to give each other experience and acquire additional rewards when bossing together.
The new Challengers Duo event lets you share experience to your main world character when you grind on your Challengers World character.

There will be a new seasonal boss, the Time Traveler Kai! This is a Challengers World exclusive boss. It can only be faced solo. It is not included in the weekly 12 boss entry limit. When you fight Kai, you can slow down time and speed up your skill cooldowns in a unique style of battle new to MapleStory. It will drop meso bags, Pitched Boss Box, and Basic Sol Erda Fragment Boxes. Hard Mode will also drop Advanced Sol Erda Fragment Boxes and Ethernal Armor Boxes. Normal Mode is between Hard Jin Hilla and Normal Seren. Hard Mode is between Hard Seren and Easy Kaling.
This is a Challengers World exclusive boss.
It can only be faced solo.
It is not included in the weekly 12 boss entry limit.
When you fight Kai, you can slow down time and speed up your skill cooldowns in a unique style of battle new to MapleStory.
It will drop meso bags, Pitched Boss Box, and Basic Sol Erda Fragment Boxes. Hard Mode will also drop Advanced Sol Erda Fragment Boxes and Ethernal Armor Boxes.
Normal Mode is between Hard Jin Hilla and Normal Seren.
Hard Mode is between Hard Seren and Easy Kaling.
Hyper Burning MAX, Burning Beyond, and Item Burning will return.

Item Burning has been upgraded to Item Burning Plus, where the Item Burning gear can go up to 22 stars! It is only available for newly created characters. The boss missions have been expanded past level 250, and require you to defeat specific bosses as well as collect Challenger Tokens from defeating bosses (like Traces of Darkness for Genesis missions).

The boss missions have been expanded past level 250, and require you to defeat specific bosses as well as collect Challenger Tokens from defeating bosses (like Traces of Darkness for Genesis missions).
The Genesis Pass will not be sold this time.
The winter event is themed after Tallahart, where you can take a glimpse into the memories of Ancient Gods of the past.
It has new rewards such as the Legendary Growth Potion (1 level up when used, up to level 279) and the Leap Growth Potion (1 level up when used, up to level 259).
You can exchange 15 3x Coupons for 1 4x Coupon (not particulary efficient but for those players who end up not using most of their coupons by the end of the event).

The Ellanos Chronicle event features a pet that you will fight with you while grinding. It will grow over the course of the event to fight more and give extra benefits (like the Evernia weekly Power of Time benefits).
The Meso Shop has a new item, the Mechaberry Farm Entry Ticket. This is similar to the Strawberry Farm but it is for level 280+ characters.
The Momentum Pass is for level 280+ characters. It is focused entirely on experience-related rewards such as VIP Sauna, Advanced EXP Vouchers, EXP Coupons, and Mechaberry Farm Entry Tickets.
Kinesis’ concept was already unique so they didn’t change much, it was mainly structural changes that made the remaster necessary.
PP (Psychic Points) have been removed, and the skills have been changed to be regular cooldowns.
There will be special cosmetics for training a Kinesis.
The new character growth support Winter Survival missions will provide step-up mission rewards to new characters (not just Kinesis), similar to the Len release events.
The Kinetic Beauty Express event will let you transfer the appearance of your current Kinesis to a new one.

The Change Circulator is a new item that will change your current Ability lines to new ones based on job changes (e.g. in this patch, Kinesis will receive a Change Circulator that lets you change your current IA to new ones without having to reroll them, based on the current values).
The Nickname Express event will let you transfer IGNs within your account.
Voice Chat System You can chat with your boss party in-game, with Maple ID and Discord integration.
You can chat with your boss party in-game, with Maple ID and Discord integration.

Buff Manager System You can check all of the buffs available in-game, and buy any that you are missing straight from the UI if you have the corresponding currency. If a buff can be purchased from the Auction House, clicking it will open the Auction House with the search term automatically filled in.
You can check all of the buffs available in-game, and buy any that you are missing straight from the UI if you have the corresponding currency.
If a buff can be purchased from the Auction House, clicking it will open the Auction House with the search term automatically filled in.

Buff Item Reorganization Seyram/Alleria/Collectir Elixir items’ expiry dates have been removed and they can now be put into storage. The Level 250/275/300 Chair buffs have been turned into an Elixir item. 30-minute duration weather effects have been added. The Shining Moonlight Potion will now drop from endgame bosses.
Seyram/Alleria/Collectir Elixir items’ expiry dates have been removed and they can now be put into storage.
The Level 250/275/300 Chair buffs have been turned into an Elixir item.
30-minute duration weather effects have been added.
The Shining Moonlight Potion will now drop from endgame bosses.
Soul Collection Reorganization A new UI where you can register, craft, and disassemble Souls all at once. You can check all of your Soul Shards and turn them into Souls in bulk.
A new UI where you can register, craft, and disassemble Souls all at once.
You can check all of your Soul Shards and turn them into Souls in bulk.
World Meso Unification All of your characters within the same world will hold the same mesos, without having to put it into storage to transfer. The maximum meso limit will be increased.
All of your characters within the same world will hold the same mesos, without having to put it into storage to transfer.
The maximum meso limit will be increased.

V Matrix Reorganization A complete reorganization for the V Matrix system, designed for new players. Instead of opening Core Gemstones to get different Cores, you now open Core Gemstones to get V Points that you can use to directly enhance the skills that you want. You don’t need to worry about getting the right skills, crafting the correct trios, etc.
A complete reorganization for the V Matrix system, designed for new players.
Instead of opening Core Gemstones to get different Cores, you now open Core Gemstones to get V Points that you can use to directly enhance the skills that you want.
You don’t need to worry about getting the right skills, crafting the correct trios, etc.

Gender Change Coupon You can change your character’s gender. The Free Style Coupon allowed players to wear any equipment but there’s certain parts of the game like some skill effects and voiceovers that are directly based on the character’s gender.
You can change your character’s gender.
The Free Style Coupon allowed players to wear any equipment but there’s certain parts of the game like some skill effects and voiceovers that are directly based on the character’s gender.
Gameplay Reorganization Hyper Stat preset change cost removed. 6th job advancement quest difficulty alleviated. Union rank up cost removed.
Hyper Stat preset change cost removed.
6th job advancement quest difficulty alleviated.
Union rank up cost removed.
Guild Castle, which is already in overseas content, will come to KMS. It will have some changes to make it more suited to this server.
The community aspect of guilds was a bit lacking so they wanted to add something like this.
There are 6 rooms and you can hang out with your guild members, get special cosmetics, show off your Star Forcing on the stage, and play minigames.
There will also be some overall guild improvements. The regular guild skills will be leveled up automatically. Guild’s Blessing will be changed into a passive. The Guild BBS will be reorganized.
The regular guild skills will be leveled up automatically.
Guild’s Blessing will be changed into a passive.
The Guild BBS will be reorganized.
New physical merchandise where you can open packs of collection cards (this set is based on the different jobs).
You can scan a QR code on the back of each card to add it to your collection in-game to show off in your home and get various cosmetic rewards.
You can generate custom illustrations for your character through AI, to be used in quest dialogue windows.
You can also add it to your character info window.
It’s going to be a beta test period.
Maple Island, the MapleStory theme park, will be opening at Lotte World in Seoul in April 2026.
There will be rides, food, photo zones, and exclusive merchandise designed around MapleStory.
In addition, the entire Jamsil neighbourhood, including Lotte World Tower and Lotte World Mall will be themed to MapleStory.

sections.summary: They ended the showcase with a special video showing their appreciation to players for enjoying Maplestory for the past year.

details.value: The test server also opened up shortly afterwards, but I think this time, I’m going to skip the KMST post since the first official server patch is in a few days so there isn’t much time in-between. This post will just be an overview of what was revealed at the showcase.

items: Sol Hecate is a summon skill that reacts to your own actions. It’s focused entirely on bossing, compared to the 1st common core Sol Janus which was focused on grinding.

It will gain additional effects as you level it up. Level 1: Sol Hecate: Styx – a 60 second cooldown attack that binds enemies for an additional 4 seconds (stacking with other binds). You can set it to automatically activate when you cast a specific skill. At level 10, this attack gets enhanced. Level 20: Sol Hecate: Charon – a revive skill that allows you to ignore death then gives a 10 second iframe afterwards with a 10 minute cooldown (like Dark Knight’s Reincarnation). Level 30: Sol Hecate: Phlegethon – a 2 minute cooldown burst attack.

Level 1: Sol Hecate: Styx – a 60 second cooldown attack that binds enemies for an additional 4 seconds (stacking with other binds). You can set it to automatically activate when you cast a specific skill. At level 10, this attack gets enhanced.
Level 20: Sol Hecate: Charon – a revive skill that allows you to ignore death then gives a 10 second iframe afterwards with a 10 minute cooldown (like Dark Knight’s Reincarnation).
Level 30: Sol Hecate: Phlegethon – a 2 minute cooldown burst attack.
Since this is the first common skill that deals damage to bosses, the damage and number of hits will be set individually for each job to ensure it is balanced.

Speeding Up Level 275+ Epic Dungeon experience rewards increased. Monster Park Extreme experience increased for level 275+. New Monster Park areas added (Shangri-La, Arteria, Carcion, Talahart). Monster Park daily entry limits increased (2 free per day, 7 per day per character, 14 per day per world).
Epic Dungeon experience rewards increased.
Monster Park Extreme experience increased for level 275+.
New Monster Park areas added (Shangri-La, Arteria, Carcion, Talahart).
Monster Park daily entry limits increased (2 free per day, 7 per day per character, 14 per day per world).

Link Skills Level 3 Expansion When you reach level 285 on a character, you will acquire the Proof of a Radiant Hero. You can use this item on one of your characters to increase that character’s Link Skill to level 3. If you level up a Link Skill with no/low utility, it will also give an additional damage passive to that character only (e.g. level 3 Mercedes link gives Mercedes an extra 5% damage).
When you reach level 285 on a character, you will acquire the Proof of a Radiant Hero. You can use this item on one of your characters to increase that character’s Link Skill to level 3.
If you level up a Link Skill with no/low utility, it will also give an additional damage passive to that character only (e.g. level 3 Mercedes link gives Mercedes an extra 5% damage).

Level 11 Authentic Symbol Benefits When an Authentic Symbol or Grand Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 20% damage to that area’s boss (e.g. Cernium -> Chosen Seren, Hotel Arcs -> Kalos, and so on). When an Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 10% experience acquired.
When an Authentic Symbol or Grand Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 20% damage to that area’s boss (e.g. Cernium -> Chosen Seren, Hotel Arcs -> Kalos, and so on).
When an Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 10% experience acquired.

Destiny Weapon 2nd Growth The 2nd growth quests are for First Adversary, Limbo, and Baldrix. The 2nd growth will enhance the two Destiny Weapon skills. The 2nd growth will let you enhance the Destiny Weapon up to 25 stars.
The 2nd growth quests are for First Adversary, Limbo, and Baldrix.
The 2nd growth will enhance the two Destiny Weapon skills.
The 2nd growth will let you enhance the Destiny Weapon up to 25 stars.

Challengers World will return with additional changes. Challengers World will only last 4 months. The attendance check mission has been removed (so you don’t feel forced to stay the full duration of the event). The level missions have been divided into separate missions for each level up to level 290 (e.g. level 275, 276, 277 and so on are separate missions now). Challengers World rewards have been changed, with additional 6th job materials but less items like Meister Cubes. Challengers World will have Shining Star Force every 2 weeks.

The level missions have been divided into separate missions for each level up to level 290 (e.g. level 275, 276, 277 and so on are separate missions now).
Challengers World rewards have been changed, with additional 6th job materials but less items like Meister Cubes.
Challengers World will have Shining Star Force every 2 weeks.
The new Challengers Partner event lets you pair up with a friend to give each other experience and acquire additional rewards when bossing together.
The new Challengers Duo event lets you share experience to your main world character when you grind on your Challengers World character.

There will be a new seasonal boss, the Time Traveler Kai! This is a Challengers World exclusive boss. It can only be faced solo. It is not included in the weekly 12 boss entry limit. When you fight Kai, you can slow down time and speed up your skill cooldowns in a unique style of battle new to MapleStory. It will drop meso bags, Pitched Boss Box, and Basic Sol Erda Fragment Boxes. Hard Mode will also drop Advanced Sol Erda Fragment Boxes and Ethernal Armor Boxes. Normal Mode is between Hard Jin Hilla and Normal Seren. Hard Mode is between Hard Seren and Easy Kaling.

It can only be faced solo.
It is not included in the weekly 12 boss entry limit.
When you fight Kai, you can slow down time and speed up your skill cooldowns in a unique style of battle new to MapleStory.

Normal Mode is between Hard Jin Hilla and Normal Seren.
Hard Mode is between Hard Seren and Easy Kaling.
Hyper Burning MAX, Burning Beyond, and Item Burning will return.

Item Burning has been upgraded to Item Burning Plus, where the Item Burning gear can go up to 22 stars! It is only available for newly created characters. The boss missions have been expanded past level 250, and require you to defeat specific bosses as well as collect Challenger Tokens from defeating bosses (like Traces of Darkness for Genesis missions).

The boss missions have been expanded past level 250, and require you to defeat specific bosses as well as collect Challenger Tokens from defeating bosses (like Traces of Darkness for Genesis missions).
The Genesis Pass will not be sold this time.
The winter event is themed after Tallahart, where you can take a glimpse into the memories of Ancient Gods of the past.
It has new rewards such as the Legendary Growth Potion (1 level up when used, up to level 279) and the Leap Growth Potion (1 level up when used, up to level 259).
You can exchange 15 3x Coupons for 1 4x Coupon (not particulary efficient but for those players who end up not using most of their coupons by the end of the event).

The Ellanos Chronicle event features a pet that you will fight with you while grinding. It will grow over the course of the event to fight more and give extra benefits (like the Evernia weekly Power of Time benefits).
The Meso Shop has a new item, the Mechaberry Farm Entry Ticket. This is similar to the Strawberry Farm but it is for level 280+ characters.
The Momentum Pass is for level 280+ characters. It is focused entirely on experience-related rewards such as VIP Sauna, Advanced EXP Vouchers, EXP Coupons, and Mechaberry Farm Entry Tickets.
Kinesis’ concept was already unique so they didn’t change much, it was mainly structural changes that made the remaster necessary.
PP (Psychic Points) have been removed, and the skills have been changed to be regular cooldowns.
There will be special cosmetics for training a Kinesis.
The new character growth support Winter Survival missions will provide step-up mission rewards to new characters (not just Kinesis), similar to the Len release events.
The Kinetic Beauty Express event will let you transfer the appearance of your current Kinesis to a new one.

The Change Circulator is a new item that will change your current Ability lines to new ones based on job changes (e.g. in this patch, Kinesis will receive a Change Circulator that lets you change your current IA to new ones without having to reroll them, based on the current values).
The Nickname Express event will let you transfer IGNs within your account.
Voice Chat System You can chat with your boss party in-game, with Maple ID and Discord integration.
You can chat with your boss party in-game, with Maple ID and Discord integration.

Buff Manager System You can check all of the buffs available in-game, and buy any that you are missing straight from the UI if you have the corresponding currency. If a buff can be purchased from the Auction House, clicking it will open the Auction House with the search term automatically filled in.

Buff Item Reorganization Seyram/Alleria/Collectir Elixir items’ expiry dates have been removed and they can now be put into storage. The Level 250/275/300 Chair buffs have been turned into an Elixir item. 30-minute duration weather effects have been added. The Shining Moonlight Potion will now drop from endgame bosses.

Soul Collection Reorganization A new UI where you can register, craft, and disassemble Souls all at once. You can check all of your Soul Shards and turn them into Souls in bulk.
A new UI where you can register, craft, and disassemble Souls all at once.
You can check all of your Soul Shards and turn them into Souls in bulk.
World Meso Unification All of your characters within the same world will hold the same mesos, without having to put it into storage to transfer. The maximum meso limit will be increased.
All of your characters within the same world will hold the same mesos, without having to put it into storage to transfer.
The maximum meso limit will be increased.

V Matrix Reorganization A complete reorganization for the V Matrix system, designed for new players. Instead of opening Core Gemstones to get different Cores, you now open Core Gemstones to get V Points that you can use to directly enhance the skills that you want. You don’t need to worry about getting the right skills, crafting the correct trios, etc.

Gender Change Coupon You can change your character’s gender. The Free Style Coupon allowed players to wear any equipment but there’s certain parts of the game like some skill effects and voiceovers that are directly based on the character’s gender.

Gameplay Reorganization Hyper Stat preset change cost removed. 6th job advancement quest difficulty alleviated. Union rank up cost removed.

Guild Castle, which is already in overseas content, will come to KMS. It will have some changes to make it more suited to this server.
The community aspect of guilds was a bit lacking so they wanted to add something like this.
There are 6 rooms and you can hang out with your guild members, get special cosmetics, show off your Star Forcing on the stage, and play minigames.
There will also be some overall guild improvements. The regular guild skills will be leveled up automatically. Guild’s Blessing will be changed into a passive. The Guild BBS will be reorganized.

kmsBreakdown.fullText: The winter showcase for the winter update, Maplestory Crown, took place yesterday! The main features were a new 6th job common skill for bossing, not one, not two, but three new bosses, and the Kinesis remaster! The test server also opened up shortly afterwards, but I think this time, I’m going to skip the KMST post since the first official server patch is in a few days so there isn’t much time in-between. This post will just be an overview of what was revealed at the showcase. 2nd Common Core: Sol Hecate Sol Hecate is a summon skill that reacts to your own actions. It’s focused entirely on bossing, compared to the 1st common core Sol Janus which was focused on grinding. It will gain additional effects as you level it up. Level 1: Sol Hecate: Styx – a 60 second cooldown attack that binds enemies for an additional 4 seconds (stacking with other binds). You can set it to automatically activate when you cast a specific skill. At level 10, this attack gets enhanced. Level 20: Sol Hecate: Charon – a revive skill that allows you to ignore death then gives a 10 second iframe afterwards with a 10 minute cooldown (like Dark Knight’s Reincarnation). Level 30: Sol Hecate: Phlegethon – a 2 minute cooldown burst attack. Since this is the first common skill that deals damage to bosses, the damage and number of hits will be set individually for each job to ensure it is balanced. New Boss: Radiant Malefic Star The new boss, Radiant Malefic Star, is related to the new Apostle Ymir that appeared in the Epic Dungeon: Nightmare Paradise (not actually her, but a sort of clone). It is in a new side-area from Arteria, similar to Karotte and Hotel Arcs. It is a level 280 boss that can be fought in a party of 1~3 players. You will have to swap between reality and illusion and coordinate with your party members. It drops the new Brilliant Boss accessory: Entrancing Nightmare (ring). The Brilliant Boss 4-set effect is +20 all stats, +500 HP/MP, +20 attack/magic attack, +5% critical damage. Normal Mode is between Extreme Suu and Normal Kaling (recommended ~200m CP). Hard Mode is between Hard Limbo and Hard Baldrix (recommended ~400m CP). Astra Secondary Weapon This system is designed to help fill the gap between the Genesis and Destiny weapons. You can convert your existing secondary weapon into an Astra secondary weapon (becomes fully untradeable) by collecting Traces of Battle and Erion Fragments. Traces of Battle are collected by defeating bosses (like Traces of Darkness for the Genesis liberation). Erion Fragments can be acquired from boss drops (tradeable) and from Grandis daily quests (untradeable). You can upgrade the Astra secondary weapon up to 3 stages (maximum 15 -> 20 -> 30 stars). Your potential will be carried over. For more specific cases such as shields, MEE’d items, Dual Blade, Zero, it will be applied differently while focusing on fairness and preserving value. New Boss: Jupiter The new boss, Jupiter, is the leader of the Ancient Gods, and is an end-game boss. It is a level 295 boss that can be fought in a party of 1~3 players. You must face off with him in 3 forms, varying with how much he has combined with the entity. It drops the new Brilliant Boss accessory: Original Sin of Pride (face accessory). The Brilliant Boss 5-set effect is +20 all stats, +500 HP/MP, +20 attack/magic attack, +15% boss damage. Normal Mode is between Hard Adversary and Hard Limbo (recommended ~400m CP). Hard Mode is after Extreme Kaling. New Area: Geardrock This is a new level 295 area that will conclude the Ancient Gods storyline. It is a secret underground desert where the Ancient God Gob used to craft weapons with a giant furnace called Chronos. You can get the Grand Authentic Symbol: Geardrock which gives +50% additional experience and +15% drop/meso rate when fully levelled up. System Reorganizations Speeding Up Level 275+ Epic Dungeon experience rewards increased. Monster Park Extreme experience increased for level 275+. New Monster Park areas added (Shangri-La, Arteria, Carcion, Talahart). Monster Park daily entry limits increased (2 free per day, 7 per day per character, 14 per day per world). Link Skills Level 3 Expansion When you reach level 285 on a character, you will acquire the Proof of a Radiant Hero. You can use this item on one of your characters to increase that character’s Link Skill to level 3. If you level up a Link Skill with no/low utility, it will also give an additional damage passive to that character only (e.g. level 3 Mercedes link gives Mercedes an extra 5% damage). Level 11 Authentic Symbol Benefits When an Authentic Symbol or Grand Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 20% damage to that area’s boss (e.g. Cernium -> Chosen Seren, Hotel Arcs -> Kalos, and so on). When an Authentic Symbol reaches level 11, it will give an additional 10% experience acquired. Destiny Weapon 2nd Growth The 2nd growth quests are for First Adversary, Limbo, and Baldrix. The 2nd growth will enhance the two Destiny Weapon skills. The 2nd growth will let you enhance the Destiny Weapon up to 25 stars. Challengers World Season 3 Challengers World will return with additional changes. Challengers World will only last 4 months. The attendance check mission has been removed (so you don’t feel forced to stay the full duration of the event). The level missions have been divided into separate missions for each level up to level 290 (e.g. level 275, 276, 277 and so on are separate missions now). Challengers World rewards have been changed, with additional 6th job materials but less items like Meister Cubes. Challengers World will have Shining Star Force every 2 weeks. The new Challengers Partner event lets you pair up with a friend to give each other experience and acquire additional rewards when bossing together. The new Challengers Duo event lets you share experience to your main world character when you grind on your Challengers World character. There will be a new seasonal boss, the Time Traveler Kai! This is a Challengers World exclusive boss. It can only be faced solo. It is not included in the weekly 12 boss entry limit. When you fight Kai, you can slow down time and speed up your skill cooldowns in a unique style of battle new to MapleStory. It will drop meso bags, Pitched Boss Box, and Basic Sol Erda Fragment Boxes. Hard Mode will also drop Advanced Sol Erda Fragment Boxes and Ethernal Armor Boxes. Normal Mode is between Hard Jin Hilla and Normal Seren. Hard Mode is between Hard Seren and Easy Kaling. Winter Events Hyper Burning MAX, Burning Beyond, and Item Burning will return. Item Burning has been upgraded to Item Burning Plus, where the Item Burning gear can go up to 22 stars! It is only available for newly created characters. This is similar to the Strawberry Farm but it is for level 280+ characters. The Momentum Pass is for level 280+ characters. It is focused entirely on experience-related rewards such as VIP Sauna, Advanced EXP Vouchers, EXP Coupons, and Mechaberry Farm Entry Tickets. The Nickname Express event will let you transfer IGNs within your account. Crown Improvements Voice Chat System You can chat with your boss party in-game, with Maple ID and Discord integration. If a buff can be purchased from the Auction House, clicking it will open the Auction House with the search term automatically filled in. Buff Item Reorganization Seyram/Alleria/Collectir Elixir items’ expiry dates have been removed and they can now be put into storage. The Level 250/275/300 Chair buffs have been turned into an Elixir item. 30-minute duration weather effects have been added. The Shining Moonlight Potion will now drop from endgame bosses. Soul Collection Reorganization A new UI where you can register, craft, and disassemble Souls all at once. You can check all of your Soul Shards and turn them into Souls in bulk. You don’t need to worry about getting the right skills, crafting the correct trios, etc. Gender Change Coupon You can change your character’s gender. The Free Style Coupon allowed players to wear any equipment but there’s certain parts of the game like some skill effects and voiceovers that are directly based on the character’s gender. Gameplay Reorganization Hyper Stat preset change cost removed. 6th job advancement quest difficulty alleviated. Union rank up cost removed. Guild Castle Guild Castle, which is already in overseas content, will come to KMS. It will have some changes to make it more suited to this server. The community aspect of guilds was a bit lacking so they wanted to add something like this. There are 6 rooms and you can hang out with your guild members, get special cosmetics, show off your Star Forcing on the stage, and play minigames. There will also be some overall guild improvements. The regular guild skills will be leveled up automatically. Guild’s Blessing will be changed into a passive. The Guild BBS will be reorganized. MapleStory Collection Cards New physical merchandise where you can open packs of collection cards (this set is based on the different jobs). You can scan a QR code on the back of each card to add it to your collection in-game to show off in your home and get various cosmetic rewards. AI Custom Illustrations You can generate custom illustrations for your character through AI, to be used in quest dialogue windows. You can also add it to your character info window. It’s going to be a beta test period. Maple Island Maple Island, the MapleStory theme park, will be opening at Lotte World in Seoul in April 2026. There will be rides, food, photo zones, and exclusive merchandise designed around MapleStory. In addition, the entire Jamsil neighbourhood, including Lotte World Tower and Lotte World Mall will be themed to MapleStory. Road Map December 18: Kinesis Remaster Seasonal Boss – Kai Crown Improvements Level 275+ Speed Up Level 3 Link Skills Level 11 Authentic Symbol Benefits Challengers World Season 3 & Challengers EXP Duo & Challengers Partner (~April 15) Item Burning Plus (~April 22) Hyper Burning MAX & Burning Beyond (~June 17) Night of Illusions Event Winter Survival Mission Event January 15 New Common Core – Sol Hecate New Boss – Radiant Malefic Star Astra Secondary Weapon February 12 New Boss – Jupiter Destiny Weapon – 2nd Growth New Guild Content – Guild Castle New Area – Geardrock March-May?! 23rd Anniversary Maple Attack with Lotte The Crown showcase gifts can be claimed until December 31 at 11:59 PM. CROWN Medal Voucher CROWN Damage Skin (Unit) CROWN Poster 2 4x Experience Coupons (30 Minutes) 2 Selective Mannequin/Slot Expansion Vouchers 4 Selective Max Slot Expansion Coupons 3 Selective Sol Erda/Sol Erda Fragment Vouchers 10 VIP Boosters 10 Maximum Growth Potions (must be used by December 17 at 11:59 PM) They ended the showcase with a special video showing their appreciation to players for enjoying Maplestory for the past year.

items.title: KMS ver. 1.2.409 – MapleStory X One Punch Man!
items.summary: The newest live server patch features the second anime collaboration, MapleStory X One Punch Man! Almost exactly one year after Demon Slayer, this event fe...

kmsBreakdown.summary: The newest live server patch features the second anime collaboration, MapleStory X One Punch Man! Almost exactly one year after Demon Slayer, this event features a limited-time job, Saitama, as well as various events and cosmetics. The patch also includes some more skill balancing and QoL changes.
highlights: The winter showcase Crown is coming up on December 13! Looking forward to seeing what the winter update will bring 🙂
Foggy Forest Training Centre
The Foggy Forest Training Centre entry conditions and entry limit have been removed.
When you enter the Foggy Forest Training Centre, all skill cooldowns (except for certain skills) will be reset, and charge-type skills/job gauges/Soul Weapon’s Souls will be fully charged.
The effects of cooldown reset and charged skills will be removed.
When you enter the Foggy Forest Training Centre, all applied buff effects will be removed. However, the following buff effects will not be removed.

details.value: Foggy Forest Training Centre
The Foggy Forest Training Centre entry conditions and entry limit have been removed.
When you enter the Foggy Forest Training Centre, all skill cooldowns (except for certain skills) will be reset, and charge-type skills/job gauges/Soul Weapon’s Souls will be fully charged.

items: The effects of cooldown reset and charged skills will be removed.
When you exit, the cooldowns will be restored to their pre-entry values, and charged charge-type skills/job gauges/Soul Weapon’s Souls will be reset.

details.value: When you enter the Foggy Forest Training Centre, all applied buff effects will be removed. However, the following buff effects will not be removed.

HEXA Matrix
The HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll has been added.

items: When used, your HEXA Matrix skill cores, mastery cores, and enhancement cores will be reset. Then, the Sol Erda and Sol Erda Fragments based on the enhancement levels will be extracted into Consumable items.
Common Cores will not be reset or extracted.
The extracted Sol Erda and Sol Erda Fragments will be untradeable. While you hold these items, you cannot Open Job Advance.
You can acquire the HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll through the Maple Admin NPC until December 3, 2025 at 11:59 PM, 1 time per character. The item will expire on December 4, 2025 at 2:00 AM.

details.value: Developer Notes
We received a lot of feedback from players about the drastic changes in the utility of certain HEXA cores after the last test world update.
To address this issue, we have created the HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll, which allows players to redistribute the resources they have invested in their HEXA cores (except common cores).
Going forward, if the utility of HEXA cores change, we will provide this scroll to all players to let them adapt to the skill changes.
In addition, we will fundamentally improve our work processes to further enhance the consistency of skill value and structure changes.
We sincerely apologize for not being able to provide a stable service.
[Back to Overview]

details.value: A feature has been added to confirm purchases when buying equipment that is priced excessively high compared to its assessed value, to prevent equipment purchase errors.

items: The value of an equip is determined with reference to the item’s Combat Power and transaction information over a certain period of time.
If there is insufficient information available to determine the value, the notification will not appear.

This feature is initially limited to level 150 armour (Highness, Eagle Eye, Trixter), Absolabs armour, Arcane Shade armour, Ethernal armour, Absolabs weapons, Arcane Shade weapons, Dawn Boss set, Lose Control Machine Mark, Magic Eyepatch, Commander Force Earrings, Source of Suffering, Dreamy Belt, Endless Terror, certain Boss Accessory set, and certain Special Skill Rings. The applicable equipment can change in the future.

sections.title: [Winter Pre-Registration] Winter Countdown

details.value: A countdown for the upcoming winter has begun. Participate in the countdown to receive a variety of gifts and powerful skills!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2).

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 31, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Winter Countdown’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event. You can check your event participation records and acquired reward details through the Event List.
Countdown

Once per day, you can click the <Participate> button in the Countdown UI to complete the countdown and accumulate rewards based on the number of days you have participated. You can complete the countdown up to 15 times during the event period.

You can click the <Use> button at the top-right of the UI to use the <Winter Pass> to complete countdowns you did not complete before. You can use it up to the number of missed attendances as of the previous day, and it requires 3,000 Maple Points per use.
※ The countdown participation records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
Countdown Gifts
For every day you complete the countdown, you can instantly acquire the following rewards based on the number of participations.
※ All gifts can only be put into storage.
※ The Sol Erda can only be used by level 260 or higher characters that have completed the 6th job advancement. You cannot use it if you have 20 Sol Erda.
※ The Advanced EXP Vouchers can only be used by level 260 or higher characters.
※ All VIP Sauna usage time charged before December 17, 2025 at 11:59 will disappear after December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
Winter Gifts
For every day you complete the countdown, you can acquire the following rewards after the December 18 maintenance based on the number of participations.
※ All gifts can only be put into storage.
※ The Sol Erda can only be used by level 260 or higher characters that have completed the 6th job advancement. You cannot use it if you have 20 Sol Erda.
Winter Power-Up Skill
When you complete the countdown a certain number of times, you can acquire the following stats.
※ The acquired stats will stack with acquired stats from other events.
※ You can acquire the Winter Power-Up Skill normally even if you use the Winter Pass.
Special Mission
Every week, you can complete the Special Mission by defeating 10,000 monsters within your level range.
For every 2,000 monsters you defeat, you can fill the Special Power 1 time by clicking the <Fill> button. You can fill up to 5 times a week, and up to 15 times until December 12, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

Whenever you fill up to the 4th Special Power each week, you will accumulate 1 3x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes). Whenever you fill the 5th Special Power each week, you will accumulate 1 4x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes).
※ All experience coupons can only be put into storage.
※ The Special Mission can be completed until December 12, 2025 at 11:59 PM. The experience coupons can be received until December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
Special Gift
Whenever all players fill the Special Power, the Special Power Gauge will rise. Every time the Special Power reaches 100%, the number of Special Gifts (Maximum Growth Potion) will increase by 1.
※ The special gifts can be claimed until December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM. The special gifts will expire on December 18, 2025 at 2:00 AM.
※ All Winter Countdown gifts, including the special gifts, can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: A countdown for the upcoming winter has begun. Participate in the countdown to receive a variety of gifts and powerful skills!

details.value: Monster Park Staff Lounge
Monster Park’s monsters have escaped! Help Spiegella capture the monsters and receive various rewards!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[One Punch Man] Hero from Another World’ event.

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event. You can check your event participation records and acquired reward details through the Event List.
※ The <Monster Park Turmoil> participation records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
※ <Monster Park Turmoil>’s rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
Daily Monster Capture

You can open the Monster Park Turmoil UI through the Event List and click the <Capture Monsters> button once per day to participate. You can complete the daily monster capture up to 5 times per week, and up to 15 times over the event period.
You can acquire the following rewards based on the number of times you have completed the daily monster capture.
※ If you complete the daily monster capture 15 times, you can acquire the Saitama’s House Theme Voucher.
※ All rewards can only be put into storage, and can be claimed until December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
※ The Sol Erda can only be used by level 260 or higher characters that have completed the 6th job advancement. You cannot use it if you have 20 Sol Erda.
※ The Android Voucher includes a Lidium Heart (permanent, untradeable). The acquired Android is permanent and can only be put into storage.
Weekly Monster Exploration
You can complete the <Weekly Monster Exploration> up to 3 times per week by defeating monsters within your level range. You can complete it up to 9 times over the event period.
After defeating 2,000 monsters within your level range, you can press the <Weekly Monster Exploration> button at the top right of the Monster Park Turmoil UI to acquire 1,500 Hero Coins.
You can collect Hero Coins and exchange them for rewards in the [Hero Coin Shop].
※ The Weekly Monster Exploration can only be completed when you defeat monsters within your level range while you are in a party of 1 or are not in a party.
※ <Monster Park Turmoil> participation records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
※ The number of monsters within your level range defeated will not increase while in the cross-world boss content <Dimensional Battlefield>.
[Back to Overview]

sections.title: [Punch King] Elder Centipede Punch King

details.value: Participate in the Elder Centipede Punch King and acquire Punch Coins!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 200 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have completed the 5th job advancement and participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event.

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Punch King] Elder Centipede Punch King’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event.
After completing the quest, you can participate through the Event List to go to the ‘Path to the Elder Centipede Punch King (Waiting Map)’.
You can talk to Spiegella to enter the preparation space and practice, prepare, and challenge the Punch King.
※ Some buff effects will be removed upon entering.
You can attack the Punch King monster for 2 minutes to acquire points.
※ If you leave early, the acquired points will be reset.
※ You cannot use Ability presets while challenging the Punch King.
※ You cannot use HEXA skill Common Cores while challenging the Punch King.
The monster will appear in a total of 5 stages, with the level, defense, and HP increasing wih each stage.
The more damage you deal to the monster, the more points you can acquire, up to a maximum of 5,100 points.
※ You cannot participate in the Elder Centipede Punch King on a Red PC.
※ You cannot charge the Soul Gauge inside the Punch King.
※ Sayram’s Elixir, Alleria’s Elixir, and Collector’s Elixir cannot be used while challenging the Punch King. They can be used in the entry preparation map.

When the time limit ends or you have acquired all 5,100 points, you will be moved to the ‘Elder Centipede Punch King Exit (Exit Map)’. You can talk to Spiegella to acquire Punch Coins. (This can be done once per week per world).
※ If you try again in the same world and achive a higher score, you will receive additional Punch Coins equal to the difference between your previous score and the new score.
※ You can acquire 3,000 Basic Punch Coins, 2,000 Intermediate Punch Coins, and 100 Advanced Punch Coins per week per world. They can only be used in the world where you acquired them.
※ The number of acquired Punch Coins is shared between all characters within the world.
※ The weekly Punch King challenge records will be reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM.
Cumulative Participation Reward
The number of participations will be counted 1 time per week per world. It will be accumulated when you participate in the Punch King and acquire Punch Coins.
※ The cumulative participation reward can be received until December 17 at 11:59 PM.
[Back to Overview]

sections.title: [Hunting Event] Heroes’ Arrival

details.value: Train with the heroes and get lots of experience!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event.

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Hunting Event] Heroes’ Arrival’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event.

When you enter a hunting ground with monsters within your level range, the ‘Heroes’ Arrival Preparation’ skill will be automatically activated. As you defeat monsters within your level range, you will fill up the gauge.

When you defeat 250 monsters within your level range, the gauge will be filled and ‘Heroes’ Arrival’ will be activated. You will acquire experience then Genos, Tatsumaki of Terror, or King will appear in a set order to attack nearby enemies.
※ If you use all 30 skill activations per day per character, the skill will be deactivated.

※ You can deactivate the skill by right-clicking the skill icon in the skill window. If the skill is deactivated, it will remain deactivated until midnight or until you right-click the skill to activate it again. If you disconnect and reconnect, the deactivated skill will be reactivated.

※ The skill will only activate in maps with monsters within your level range. It will not activate in maps where there is a level 4 Rune debuff or other special maps (Mirror World, story quest maps, etc.).
※ The skill is affected by experience increasing effects and the death penalty experience reduction effect.
※ When you acquire experience from the skill, the Rune experience buff will be applied even if you do not currently have a Rune released.
※ Experience acquired through the skill can only level you up 1 time.
※ Monsters defeated by the skill will not accumulate the 250 monsters required for the next skill activation.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: Train with the heroes and get lots of experience!

sections.title: [Minigame] Virtual Combat System

details.value: Experience Genos’ combat in the virtual combat system!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Minigame] Virtual Combat System’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to the Shubot NPC at the <monster Park Office> to start this event.
You can talk to Shubot to enter the <Virtual Combat System Interior> and challenge the virtual combat system.
※ All buff effects will be removed upon entering.
※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Virtual Combat System
Virtual Combat System

items: You can play alone with a time limit of 30 minutes.
You will have 3 skills by default. You can acquire additional skills by clearing missions.
The game will end if you can defeat the Deep Sea King within the time limit.

details.value: ※ During the game, you can click on a skill icon then input your desired key to change the hotkey at any time.
※ The changed hotkeys are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
System Enhancements

items: You can use Simulation Points to acquire specific skills or level up specific systems.
Each system can go up to level 5. The Simulation Points required to level up a system are the same for all levels.

details.value: Combat Missions
You can complete combat missions to acquire Simulation Points used to level up systems. Combat missions are unlocked whenever you have completed the previous week’s missions and certain dates pass.
Rewards
Every time you clear a supply support mission, you can acquire rewards in Special Worlds and regular worlds.

items: Supply Support Special World Rewards
Supply Support Regular World Rewards

details.value: ※ The system completion is increased as the systems are leveled up.
※ The Special World Supply Support Box is untradeable.
※ The Regular World Supply Support Box can only be put into storage. The items acquired from using it can only be put into storage and will expire in 7 days.
Every time you complete a special mission, you can acquire rewards in regular worlds.
※ The Virtual Combat System Furniture Box can only be used in worlds where you have completed the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’.
If you complete all of the special missions, you can acquire an additional reward.
※ The Demon Cyborg medal acquired from using the voucher is untradeable and permanent.
※ You cannot use the Mysterious Medal Anvil on the Demon Cyborg medal.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: Experience Genos’ combat in the virtual combat system!

details.value: World Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 18, 2024 before the maintenance.

details.value: World Usage Instructions
On the World Select screen, you can choose a Special World, login, and click the Create Character button to create a limited-time character.
※ You can only use the world that you first create a limited-time character in, Special or Special 2. Even if you delete the character, you will not be able to use the other world.
※ You cannot create any job characters other than the event job. You can only create 1 character.
Special World Environment

items: Special World is a limited-time event world, and all records of the world will disappear when the event period ends.
You cannot trade with other characters. You cannot use things like the storage, trading, couriers, Maple Auction, or Meso Market. You cannot acquire items dropped by other characters.
You cannot use the Cash Shop and cannot receive gifts.
You cannot settle accumulated Mileage.
You cannot receive Daily Gift rewards.
The Mu Lung Dojo Mastery section rankings will not have rankings per job.
You cannot use certain chairs or ridings.
You cannot receive Maple Guide rewards in Special World.
You cannot complete achievements in Special World.
You cannot use the Dimensional Mirror in Special World.
You cannot participate in events that are running in regular worlds in Special World.
You cannot complete the 5th job advancement, and cannot use Core Gemstones.
You cannot complete the 6th job advancement, and you cannot enter Cernium (Before) or higher areas.
Core Gemstones do not drop in Special World.
Certain achievements or weekly quests that give Core Gemstones in Arcane River cannot be completed.
The Rune of Destruction will not appear in Special World.
In addition, the usage of certain content or systems is restricted.

details.value: Slime Meso Shop
In Special World, you can click the ‘Take a Look at the Slime Meso Shop’ event in the Event List to use the ‘Slime Meso Shop’.

items: Power Elixir (1k mesos)
Special Medal of Honor (1m mesos)
Black Rebirth Flame (5m mesos)
100% Epic Potential Scroll (1m mesos)
100% Special Additional Potential Scroll (2m mesos)
100% Karma Additional Epic Potential Scroll (3m mesos)
Spell Trace (1k mesos)
Arcane Shade Weapon Box (10m mesos)
Arcane Shade Armor Box (10m mesos)

details.value: Special World Benefits

items: The meso acquisition rate is increased to 10x as much.
Until level 250, you will be provided a skill that increases experience acquisition rate by 1,000%. After level 250, it will be changed to 100%.

Level 200 or higher characters can receive an Upholding Justice Booster 1 time per day through the Event List’s ‘[Special World] Upholding Justice Booster’ quest. It can only be used on the day that it is received.

After reaching level 200, if you start the ‘To Arcane River!’ quest, the Arcane River area quests will be automatically completed, and you can use the Maple Guide to quick travel and acquire level 1 Symbols.

details.value: ※ The ‘To Arcane River!’ quest can only be completed by characters participating in the ‘[One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal’ event.

items: The Maple Guide’s recommended hunting ground maps and all maps with level 60 or higher monsters will be changed into maps that allow up to 4 players to have their own instanced monsters.
All hunting ground maps (except for theme dungeons) have different rules than regular worlds, allowing for more monsters to be summoned.
You can defeat more monsters at once than in regular worlds, and you can get a variety of types of multi kills.

details.value: Saitama Job Skills

items: When your Saitama character reaches certain levels, you can acquire new skills automatically.
Saitama characters do not have job advancements and do not require SP to acquire skills.
Saitama characters can wear Pirate class equipment.
Saitama characters can only use Knuckles.

sections.title: [One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal

details.value: Fill out the adventure journal with your various adventures! Enjoy the adventure and receive rewards!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Special World: All Saitama characters.
Regular Worlds: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event.
※ The event must first be started in a Special World. After that, you can participate in the event on regular worlds.
Mission Rewards
After participating in the event, you can acquire various rewards by completing Exploration Missions, Action Missions, and Boss Missions on a Saitama character.
The rewards can only be claimed before the event ends on December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
Regular world rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
※ If you delete and recreate your Saitama character, the mission progress and Special World’s reward claim status will be reset.
※ Even if you delete and recreate your Saitama character, the regular worlds’ reward claim status will not be reset.
※ After claiming a regular world reward, you cannot claim it again even if you re-complete the mission.
Exploration Missions

There are a total of 12 exploration missions, which can be completed by visiting specific areas on a Saitama character. After completing a mission, you can receive the corresponding rewards in the Adventure Journal UI.
※ After reaching level 200, you can move to the Arcane River area through the ‘To the Arcane River!’ quest in the Event List.

items: Special World Exploration Mission Rewards

details.value: ※ The Exploration Mission Box I~VIII are untradeable and will expire on December 18, 2025 at 2:00 AM.
※ The Boss Accessory Box can only be put into storage, and will expire on December 18, 2025 at 2:00 AM.

items: Regular Worlds Exploration Mission Rewards

details.value: ※ The regular world rewards can only be put into storage.
※ The regular world rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
※ The ‘A Guy Who’s a Hero for Fun’ Title Voucher gives a title that is permanent and untradeable.
※ The ‘A Guy Who’s a Hero for Fun’ Title gives +20 all stats, +1000 HP/MP, +10 attack/magic attack, and +10% boss damage.
※ The ‘Maple World’s Hero’ Medal Voucher gives a medal that is permanent and untradeable.
※ You cannot use Mysterious Medal Anvils on the ‘Maple World’s Hero’ medal.
Action Missions

There are a total of 10 action missions, which can be completed by doing certain actions on a Saitama character. After completing a mission, you can receive the corresponding rewards in the Adventure Journal UI.

items: Special World Action Mission Rewards
Regular World Action Mission Rewards

details.value: ※ The regular world rewards can only be put into storage.
※ The regular world rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
※ The Action Mission Furniture Box can only be used in worlds where you have completed the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’.
Boss Missions

There are a total of 5 boss missions, which can be completed by defeating certain bosses on a Saitama character. After completing a mission, you can receive the corresponding rewards in the Adventure Journal UI.
※ The boss missions can be completed in Practice Mode as well.
※ The boss missions will be considered as completed when you defeat the final phase’s boss monster.

items: Special World Boss Mission Rewards

details.value: ※ The Boss Mission Box I~III are untradeable and will expire on December 18, 2025 at 2:00 AM.

items: Regular World Boss Mission Rewards

details.value: ※ The regular world rewards can only be put into storage.
※ The regular world rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
※ The Boss Mission Furniture Box can only be used in worlds where you have completed the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’.
※ The Finish Attack Effect will not be applied to certain boss monsters.

HEXA Matrix
The HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll has been added.

items: When used, your HEXA Matrix skill cores, mastery cores, and enhancement cores will be reset. Then, the Sol Erda and Sol Erda Fragments based on the enhancement levels will be extracted into Consumable items.
Common Cores will not be reset or extracted.
The extracted Sol Erda and Sol Erda Fragments will be untradeable. While you hold these items, you cannot Open Job Advance.
You can acquire the HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll through the Maple Admin NPC until December 3, 2025 at 11:59 PM, 1 time per character. The item will expire on December 4, 2025 at 2:00 AM.

details.value: Developer Notes
We received a lot of feedback from players about the drastic changes in the utility of certain HEXA cores after the last test world update.
To address this issue, we have created the HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll, which allows players to redistribute the resources they have invested in their HEXA cores (except common cores).
Going forward, if the utility of HEXA cores change, we will provide this scroll to all players to let them adapt to the skill changes.
In addition, we will fundamentally improve our work processes to further enhance the consistency of skill value and structure changes.
We sincerely apologize for not being able to provide a stable service.

A feature has been added to confirm purchases when buying equipment that is priced excessively high compared to its assessed value, to prevent equipment purchase errors.

items: The value of an equip is determined with reference to the item’s Combat Power and transaction information over a certain period of time.
If there is insufficient information available to determine the value, the notification will not appear.

This feature is initially limited to level 150 armour (Highness, Eagle Eye, Trixter), Absolabs armour, Arcane Shade armour, Ethernal armour, Absolabs weapons, Arcane Shade weapons, Dawn Boss set, Lose Control Machine Mark, Magic Eyepatch, Commander Force Earrings, Source of Suffering, Dreamy Belt, Endless Terror, certain Boss Accessory set, and certain Special Skill Rings. The applicable equipment can change in the future.

details.value: [Back to Overview]

Maple Home furniture rewards have been added to the VIP Sauna cumulative charge time rewards.

You can now rewatch the Resistance jobs’ story in Maple Chronicle: Book of Beginnings.
