details.value: [Back to Overview]
A countdown for the upcoming winter has begun. Participate in the countdown to receive a variety of gifts and powerful skills!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2).

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 31, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Winter Countdown’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event. You can check your event participation records and acquired reward details through the Event List.
Countdown

Once per day, you can click the <Participate> button in the Countdown UI to complete the countdown and accumulate rewards based on the number of days you have participated. You can complete the countdown up to 15 times during the event period.

You can click the <Use> button at the top-right of the UI to use the <Winter Pass> to complete countdowns you did not complete before. You can use it up to the number of missed attendances as of the previous day, and it requires 3,000 Maple Points per use.
※ The countdown participation records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
Countdown Gifts
For every day you complete the countdown, you can instantly acquire the following rewards based on the number of participations.
※ All gifts can only be put into storage.
※ The Sol Erda can only be used by level 260 or higher characters that have completed the 6th job advancement. You cannot use it if you have 20 Sol Erda.
※ The Advanced EXP Vouchers can only be used by level 260 or higher characters.
※ All VIP Sauna usage time charged before December 17, 2025 at 11:59 will disappear after December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
Winter Gifts
For every day you complete the countdown, you can acquire the following rewards after the December 18 maintenance based on the number of participations.
※ All gifts can only be put into storage.
※ The Sol Erda can only be used by level 260 or higher characters that have completed the 6th job advancement. You cannot use it if you have 20 Sol Erda.
Winter Power-Up Skill
When you complete the countdown a certain number of times, you can acquire the following stats.
※ The acquired stats will stack with acquired stats from other events.
※ You can acquire the Winter Power-Up Skill normally even if you use the Winter Pass.
Special Mission
Every week, you can complete the Special Mission by defeating 10,000 monsters within your level range.
For every 2,000 monsters you defeat, you can fill the Special Power 1 time by clicking the <Fill> button. You can fill up to 5 times a week, and up to 15 times until December 12, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

Whenever you fill up to the 4th Special Power each week, you will accumulate 1 3x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes). Whenever you fill the 5th Special Power each week, you will accumulate 1 4x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes).
※ All experience coupons can only be put into storage.
※ The Special Mission can be completed until December 12, 2025 at 11:59 PM. The experience coupons can be received until December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
Special Gift
Whenever all players fill the Special Power, the Special Power Gauge will rise. Every time the Special Power reaches 100%, the number of Special Gifts (Maximum Growth Potion) will increase by 1.
※ The special gifts can be claimed until December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM. The special gifts will expire on December 18, 2025 at 2:00 AM.
※ All Winter Countdown gifts, including the special gifts, can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
[Back to Overview]
Monster Park Staff Lounge
Monster Park’s monsters have escaped! Help Spiegella capture the monsters and receive various rewards!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[One Punch Man] Hero from Another World’ event.

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event. You can check your event participation records and acquired reward details through the Event List.
※ The <Monster Park Turmoil> participation records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
※ <Monster Park Turmoil>’s rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
Daily Monster Capture

You can open the Monster Park Turmoil UI through the Event List and click the <Capture Monsters> button once per day to participate. You can complete the daily monster capture up to 5 times per week, and up to 15 times over the event period.
You can acquire the following rewards based on the number of times you have completed the daily monster capture.
※ If you complete the daily monster capture 15 times, you can acquire the Saitama’s House Theme Voucher.
※ All rewards can only be put into storage, and can be claimed until December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
※ The Sol Erda can only be used by level 260 or higher characters that have completed the 6th job advancement. You cannot use it if you have 20 Sol Erda.
※ The Android Voucher includes a Lidium Heart (permanent, untradeable). The acquired Android is permanent and can only be put into storage.
Weekly Monster Exploration
You can complete the <Weekly Monster Exploration> up to 3 times per week by defeating monsters within your level range. You can complete it up to 9 times over the event period.
After defeating 2,000 monsters within your level range, you can press the <Weekly Monster Exploration> button at the top right of the Monster Park Turmoil UI to acquire 1,500 Hero Coins.
You can collect Hero Coins and exchange them for rewards in the [Hero Coin Shop].
※ The Weekly Monster Exploration can only be completed when you defeat monsters within your level range while you are in a party of 1 or are not in a party.
※ <Monster Park Turmoil> participation records are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
※ The number of monsters within your level range defeated will not increase while in the cross-world boss content <Dimensional Battlefield>.
[Back to Overview]
Participate in the Elder Centipede Punch King and acquire Punch Coins!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 200 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have completed the 5th job advancement and participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event.

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Punch King] Elder Centipede Punch King’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event.
After completing the quest, you can participate through the Event List to go to the ‘Path to the Elder Centipede Punch King (Waiting Map)’.
You can talk to Spiegella to enter the preparation space and practice, prepare, and challenge the Punch King.
※ Some buff effects will be removed upon entering.
You can attack the Punch King monster for 2 minutes to acquire points.
※ If you leave early, the acquired points will be reset.
※ You cannot use Ability presets while challenging the Punch King.
※ You cannot use HEXA skill Common Cores while challenging the Punch King.
The monster will appear in a total of 5 stages, with the level, defense, and HP increasing wih each stage.
The more damage you deal to the monster, the more points you can acquire, up to a maximum of 5,100 points.
※ You cannot participate in the Elder Centipede Punch King on a Red PC.
※ You cannot charge the Soul Gauge inside the Punch King.
※ Sayram’s Elixir, Alleria’s Elixir, and Collector’s Elixir cannot be used while challenging the Punch King. They can be used in the entry preparation map.

When the time limit ends or you have acquired all 5,100 points, you will be moved to the ‘Elder Centipede Punch King Exit (Exit Map)’. You can talk to Spiegella to acquire Punch Coins. (This can be done once per week per world).
※ If you try again in the same world and achive a higher score, you will receive additional Punch Coins equal to the difference between your previous score and the new score.
※ You can acquire 3,000 Basic Punch Coins, 2,000 Intermediate Punch Coins, and 100 Advanced Punch Coins per week per world. They can only be used in the world where you acquired them.
※ The number of acquired Punch Coins is shared between all characters within the world.
※ The weekly Punch King challenge records will be reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM.
Cumulative Participation Reward
The number of participations will be counted 1 time per week per world. It will be accumulated when you participate in the Punch King and acquire Punch Coins.
※ The cumulative participation reward can be received until December 17 at 11:59 PM.
[Back to Overview]
Train with the heroes and get lots of experience!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event.

details.value: ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Hunting Event] Heroes’ Arrival’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event.

When you enter a hunting ground with monsters within your level range, the ‘Heroes’ Arrival Preparation’ skill will be automatically activated. As you defeat monsters within your level range, you will fill up the gauge.

When you defeat 250 monsters within your level range, the gauge will be filled and ‘Heroes’ Arrival’ will be activated. You will acquire experience then Genos, Tatsumaki of Terror, or King will appear in a set order to attack nearby enemies.
※ If you use all 30 skill activations per day per character, the skill will be deactivated.

※ You can deactivate the skill by right-clicking the skill icon in the skill window. If the skill is deactivated, it will remain deactivated until midnight or until you right-click the skill to activate it again. If you disconnect and reconnect, the deactivated skill will be reactivated.

※ The skill will only activate in maps with monsters within your level range. It will not activate in maps where there is a level 4 Rune debuff or other special maps (Mirror World, story quest maps, etc.).
※ The skill is affected by experience increasing effects and the death penalty experience reduction effect.
※ When you acquire experience from the skill, the Rune experience buff will be applied even if you do not currently have a Rune released.
※ Experience acquired through the skill can only level you up 1 time.
※ Monsters defeated by the skill will not accumulate the 250 monsters required for the next skill activation.
[Back to Overview]
Experience Genos’ combat in the virtual combat system!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Minigame] Virtual Combat System’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button or talk to the Shubot NPC at the <monster Park Office> to start this event.
You can talk to Shubot to enter the <Virtual Combat System Interior> and challenge the virtual combat system.
※ All buff effects will be removed upon entering.
※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds.
Virtual Combat System
Virtual Combat System

items: You can play alone with a time limit of 30 minutes.
You will have 3 skills by default. You can acquire additional skills by clearing missions.
The game will end if you can defeat the Deep Sea King within the time limit.

details.value: ※ During the game, you can click on a skill icon then input your desired key to change the hotkey at any time.
※ The changed hotkeys are shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
System Enhancements

items: You can use Simulation Points to acquire specific skills or level up specific systems.
Each system can go up to level 5. The Simulation Points required to level up a system are the same for all levels.

details.value: Combat Missions
You can complete combat missions to acquire Simulation Points used to level up systems. Combat missions are unlocked whenever you have completed the previous week’s missions and certain dates pass.
Rewards
Every time you clear a supply support mission, you can acquire rewards in Special Worlds and regular worlds.

items: Supply Support Special World Rewards
Supply Support Regular World Rewards

details.value: ※ The system completion is increased as the systems are leveled up.
※ The Special World Supply Support Box is untradeable.
※ The Regular World Supply Support Box can only be put into storage. The items acquired from using it can only be put into storage and will expire in 7 days.
Every time you complete a special mission, you can acquire rewards in regular worlds.
※ The Virtual Combat System Furniture Box can only be used in worlds where you have completed the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’.
If you complete all of the special missions, you can acquire an additional reward.
※ The Demon Cyborg medal acquired from using the voucher is untradeable and permanent.
※ You cannot use the Mysterious Medal Anvil on the Demon Cyborg medal.
[Back to Overview]
World Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 18, 2024 before the maintenance.

details.value: World Usage Instructions
On the World Select screen, you can choose a Special World, login, and click the Create Character button to create a limited-time character.
※ You can only use the world that you first create a limited-time character in, Special or Special 2. Even if you delete the character, you will not be able to use the other world.
※ You cannot create any job characters other than the event job. You can only create 1 character.
Special World Environment

items: Special World is a limited-time event world, and all records of the world will disappear when the event period ends.
You cannot trade with other characters. You cannot use things like the storage, trading, couriers, Maple Auction, or Meso Market. You cannot acquire items dropped by other characters.
You cannot use the Cash Shop and cannot receive gifts.
You cannot settle accumulated Mileage.
You cannot receive Daily Gift rewards.
The Mu Lung Dojo Mastery section rankings will not have rankings per job.
You cannot use certain chairs or ridings.
You cannot receive Maple Guide rewards in Special World.
You cannot complete achievements in Special World.
You cannot use the Dimensional Mirror in Special World.
You cannot participate in events that are running in regular worlds in Special World.
You cannot complete the 5th job advancement, and cannot use Core Gemstones.
You cannot complete the 6th job advancement, and you cannot enter Cernium (Before) or higher areas.
Core Gemstones do not drop in Special World.
Certain achievements or weekly quests that give Core Gemstones in Arcane River cannot be completed.
The Rune of Destruction will not appear in Special World.
In addition, the usage of certain content or systems is restricted.

details.value: Slime Meso Shop
In Special World, you can click the ‘Take a Look at the Slime Meso Shop’ event in the Event List to use the ‘Slime Meso Shop’.

items: Power Elixir (1k mesos)
Special Medal of Honor (1m mesos)
Black Rebirth Flame (5m mesos)
100% Epic Potential Scroll (1m mesos)
100% Special Additional Potential Scroll (2m mesos)
100% Karma Additional Epic Potential Scroll (3m mesos)
Spell Trace (1k mesos)
Arcane Shade Weapon Box (10m mesos)
Arcane Shade Armor Box (10m mesos)
Fairy Heart (200m mesos)
100% Karma Special Heart Attack Scroll (5m mesos)

details.value: Special World Benefits

items: The meso acquisition rate is increased to 10x as much.
Until level 250, you will be provided a skill that increases experience acquisition rate by 1,000%. After level 250, it will be changed to 100%.

Level 200 or higher characters can receive an Upholding Justice Booster 1 time per day through the Event List’s ‘[Special World] Upholding Justice Booster’ quest. It can only be used on the day that it is received.

After reaching level 200, if you start the ‘To Arcane River!’ quest, the Arcane River area quests will be automatically completed, and you can use the Maple Guide to quick travel and acquire level 1 Symbols.

details.value: ※ The ‘To Arcane River!’ quest can only be completed by characters participating in the ‘[One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal’ event.

items: The Maple Guide’s recommended hunting ground maps and all maps with level 60 or higher monsters will be changed into maps that allow up to 4 players to have their own instanced monsters.
All hunting ground maps (except for theme dungeons) have different rules than regular worlds, allowing for more monsters to be summoned.
You can defeat more monsters at once than in regular worlds, and you can get a variety of types of multi kills.

※ The event must first be started in a Special World. After that, you can participate in the event on regular worlds.
Mission Rewards
After participating in the event, you can acquire various rewards by completing Exploration Missions, Action Missions, and Boss Missions on a Saitama character.
The rewards can only be claimed before the event ends on December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
Regular world rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID.
※ If you delete and recreate your Saitama character, the mission progress and Special World’s reward claim status will be reset.
※ Even if you delete and recreate your Saitama character, the regular worlds’ reward claim status will not be reset.
※ After claiming a regular world reward, you cannot claim it again even if you re-complete the mission.
Exploration Missions

There are a total of 12 exploration missions, which can be completed by visiting specific areas on a Saitama character. After completing a mission, you can receive the corresponding rewards in the Adventure Journal UI.
※ After reaching level 200, you can move to the Arcane River area through the ‘To the Arcane River!’ quest in the Event List.

sections.title: [Event Shop] Elder Centipede Punch King Coin Shop

details.value: Participate in the Elder Centipede Punch King and exchange the Punch Coins you acquire for various items!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event.

details.value: Event Period:

items: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can use the Elder Centipede Punch King Coin Shop by talking to Raku in the <Monster Park Office>.
The purchase quantity limits are applied per Maple ID.
Basic Punch Coins

items: Selective VIP Buff Voucher (10 coins) [unlimited]
3x Experience Coupon (30 Minutes) (100 coins) [limit of 7 per week]
Karma Eternal Rebirth Flame (50 coins) [limit of 100]
Special Medal of Honor (100 coins) [limit of 120]
Chaos Circulator (500 coins) [limit of 5]
Black Circulator (1000 coins) [limit of 5]
Selective Symbol Voucher (100 coins) [limit of 100]

details.value: Intermediate Punch Coins

items: Karma Black Cube (120 coins) [limit of 3 per week]
Karma White Additional Cube (240 coins) [limit of 3 per week]
Karma Selective Premium Pet Equipment Scroll (400 coins) [limit of 20]
Karma 100% Incredible Chaos Scroll of Goodness (20 coins) [limit of 40]
100% Ark Innocent Scroll (20 coins) [limit of 10]
Karma Black Rebirth Flame (20 coins) [limit of 250]
Karma Selective Premium Accessory Scroll (400 coins) [limit of 20]

details.value: Advanced Punch Coins

items: Karma Abyss Rebirth Flame (1 coin) [limit of 300]
Sol Erda (10 coins) [limit of 10]
Mu Gong Soul Shard (10 coins) [limit of 10]
Karma Black Cube (2 coins) [limit of 7 per week]
Karma White Additional Cube (3 coins) [limit of 7 per week]

details.value: ※ If you use the Selective VIP Buff Voucher, you can choose between the VIP Buff (Stats) and VIP Buff (Experience).
※ The selected VIP Buff can only be put into storage, and will expire after 1 day.
※ The Sol Erda can only by used by characters level 260 or higher that have completed the 6th job advancement. It cannot be used if you hold 20 Sol Erda.

※ If you use the Selective Karma Premium Pet Equipment Scroll Voucher, you can choose between the 100% Karma Premium Pet Equipment Attack Scroll and 100% Karma Premium Pet Equipment Magic Attack Scroll.
※ The selected Karma Premium Pet Equipment Scroll can only be put into storage, and will expire after 7 days.
※ If you use the Selective Karma Premium Accessory Scroll Voucher, you can choose between the 100% Karma Premium Accessory Attack Scroll and 100% Karma Premium Accessory Magic Attack Scroll.
※ The selected Karma Premium Accessory Scroll can only be put into storage, and will expire after 7 days.

※ If you use the Selective Symbol Voucher, you can choose between 5 Selective Arcane Symbol Vouchers or 2 Selective Authentic Symbol Vouchers. The items can only be put into storage and will expire after 14 days.

details.value: [Back to Overview]
The NPC Wisp’s appearance has been changed.
[Back to Overview]
Alleviated an issue in boss content where the bind resistance time indicator remained even after it ended based on network conditions.
[Back to Overview]
The VIP Sauna Usage Time Charge UI now lets you input the number you want to recharge and press the Enter key to charge time.
A system message will now be displayed if you input a sequence key outside of boss content.
Certain custom backgrounds’ animation features will now be displayed in the Equipment UI.

When you enter the New Name Auction, separate notification messages will now be displayed in situations where you are trade-banned and when you are temporarily trade-banned due to a change in IP address.
The confirmation window’s design when attempting Star Force and Scroll enhancements in the Unified Enhancement UI has been changed.
When placing a Cube Chair in a Bag UI, it can now be placed in the same way as when placing it in the Inventory UI’s Set-Up tab.
[Back to Overview]

items: Fixed an issue where if you had the Shinsoo International School Badge in a preset during the ‘[FriendStory] Continuing Days’ quest, you would not receive the item.
You will now receive the Resistance’s Statement item when the ‘[Alliance] When a Decision Must Be Made’ quest cutscene ends.
Fixed an issue with the ‘[Alliance] When a Decision Must Be Made’ quest where Sigmund’s illustration was displayed awkwardly.
Fixed an issue with the ‘[Resistance] Kindergarten Teacher’s Request’ quest where certain dialogue was missing.
Fixed an issue in Book of Arcane River: Labyrinth of Suffering CHapter 1 where Mir’s illustrations were displayed incorrectly.
Fixed an issue with the ‘[Destiny Weapon] Destiny Weapon Reissue’ quest where sometimes it could not be started properly.

Fixed an issue where the NPC Asili’s name was displayed incorrectly.

Enhancing Spiegelmann’s Ordinary Necklace and Spiegelmann’s Brilliant Necklace will no longer affect the ‘[Spell Traces] Clean, Clear, Success!’ and ‘[Spell Traces] Make it Innocent’ achievement conditions.

kmsBreakdown.fullText: The newest live server patch features the second anime collaboration, MapleStory X One Punch Man! Almost exactly one year after Demon Slayer, this event features a limited-time job, Saitama, as well as various events and cosmetics. The patch also includes some more skill balancing and QoL changes. The winter showcase Crown is coming up on December 13! Looking forward to seeing what the winter update will bring 🙂 Overview Foggy Forest Training Centre Skill Changes Common Archmage (F/P) Archmage (I/L) Marksman Bowmaster Shadower Adventurer Pirate Viper Captain Cannon Shooter Flame Wizard Night Walker Striker Mikhail Evan Luminous Mercedes Phantom Battle Mage Wild Hunter Demon Slayer Demon Avenger Kain Zero Angelic Buster Illium Khali Len Lara Hoyoung HEXA Matrix Cash Improvements Quests World Archive Items NPCs Monsters UI Maple Auction Events Content Error Fixes Quests Items NPCs Monsters Maps UI Achievements Events [Winter Pre-Registration] Winter Countdown [Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil [Punch King] Elder Centipede Punch King [Hunting Event] Heroes’ Arrival [Minigame] Virtual Combat System Special World [One Punch Man] New Job Saitama Experience Event [One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal [Event Shop] Hero Coin Shop [Event Shop] Elder Centipede Punch King Coin Shop [Event Shop] Meso Shop Sunday Maple Foggy Forest Training Centre The Foggy Forest Training Centre entry conditions and entry limit have been removed. When you enter the Foggy Forest Training Centre, all skill cooldowns (except for certain skills) will be reset, and charge-type skills/job gauges/Soul Weapon’s Souls will be fully charged. The effects of cooldown reset and charged skills will be removed. When you exit, the cooldowns will be restored to their pre-entry values, and charged charge-type skills/job gauges/Soul Weapon’s Souls will be reset. When you enter the Foggy Forest Training Centre, all applied buff effects will be removed. However, the following buff effects will not be removed. Consume/Cash item effects On/Off skills Summon skills that have no cooldown and are maintained when changing maps Noblesse guild skills Weapon Tempering/Accessory Enhancement Symbol of Honour Chair buff effect Champion’s Protection A ‘Reset Cooldowns’ feature has been added to the Foggy Forest Training Center settings UI. All skill cooldowns (except for certain skills) will be reset, and charge-type skills/job gauges/Soul Weapon’s Souls will be fully charged. The following skills will not have their buff effects removed or their cooldowns reset when you enter the Foggy Forest Training Centre. Paladin’s Combat Orders Common Pirate’s Lucky Dice Viper’s Time Leap Luminous’ Crossroad of Destiny Ark’s Contact Caravan 5th Job Common Decent Sharp Eyes 5th Job Common Decent Hyper Body 5th Job Common Decent Combat Orders 5th Job Common Hero Freud’s Wisdom (5 or less stacks) Skills registered in Pet Buff slots [Back to Overview] Skill Changes Common The list of skills that have their cooldowns reset when entering Sharenian’s Underground Culvert and Punch King content has been changed to be the same as the list of skills that have their cooldowns reset when entering boss battle maps. Fixed an issue where certain skill effects would be displayed in cutscenes after entering Suu (Normal/Hard/Extreme). The changed skills are as follows. Archmage (I/L) – Parabolic Volt Adele – Order, Infinite, Order VI Fixed an issue in Champion Raid: Dragon Island where if you used a skill then switched to another character, certain skills’ buff icons would not disappear. The changed skills are as follows. Archmage (I/L) – Frost Arc Pathfinder – Obsidian Barrier Night Lord – Purge Area Shadower – Smokescreen Luminous – Liberation Orb Battle Mage – Shelter Wild Hunter – Trap Seeder, Trap Seeder VI Cadena – Chain Arts: Maelstrom Zero – Time Distortion, Shadow Flash Lara – Eruption: Sunrise Will, Arbor Away, Eruption: Sunrise Well VI Certain skills can now be registered in the Skill Alarm. The notification will be displayed based on the perparation time. The changed skills are as follows. Hero – Flash Slash Paladin – Mighty Mjolnir Pathfinder – Cardinal Transition, Cardinal Transition VI Viper – Furious Charge Cannon Shooter – Mini Cannonball, Mini Cannonball VI, Rolling Cannon Rainbow VI, Big Huge Gigantic Cannonball Wind Breaker – Howling Gale Kain – Scattering Shot, Shaft Break, Falling Dust, Scattering Shot VI, Shaft Break VI, Falling Dust VI Len – Plum Blossom Sword 3rd Form: Keen Blade, Plum Blossom Sword 3rd Form: Keen Blade VI Lara – Mountain Seeds, Dragon Vein Traces Fixed an issue where certain skills’ buff icons would be displayed when entering or exiting boss battle maps. The changed skills are as follows. Pathfinder – Obsidian Barrier Night Lord – Purge Area Luminous – Libration Orb Zero – Time Distortion, Shadow Flash Lara – Eruption: Heaving River, Eruption: Whirlwind, Eruption: Sunrise Well, Arbor Away, Eruption: Heaving River VI, Eruption: Whirlwind VI, Eruption: Sunrise Well VI Pirate Flag This skill can now be used while in the air. Blink Fixed an issue where sometimes the cooldown would not be applied if used after using a transformation potion. [Back to Overview] Archmage (F/P) Flame Haze The skill description has been changed. [Back to Overview] Archmage (I/L) Parabolic Volt Alleviated an issue where the client would sometimes freeze when Parabolic Volt was cast in a map with lots of enemies. [Back to Overview] Marksman Archer Mastery The skill description has been changed. [Back to Overview] Bowmaster Archer Mastery The skill description has been changed. [Back to Overview] Shadower Sonic Blow The skill description has been changed. Authentic Darkness Fixed an issue where sometimes the coins would not track enemies. [Back to Overview] Adventurer Pirate Certain skills’ skill descriptions have been changed. Somersault Kick Double Fire [Back to Overview] Viper Certain skills’ skill descriptions have been changed. Shock Wave Sea Serpent Burst Sea Serpent Enhancement I Serpent Assault Sea Serpent Burst II Sea Serpent Enrage Serpent Assault Enrage Turning Kick Screw Punch Fist Enrage Hook Bomber Sea Serpent VI Time Leap The time during which you cannot receive the skill effects again has been decreased from 120 seconds to 100 seconds. Sea Serpent Enhancement II This skill now passively increases final damage by 10%. Sea Serpent Enrage The Serpent Mark’s final damage boost has been decreased from 20% to 10%. Sea Serpent VI The Serpent Mark’s final damage boost has been decreased from 20% to 10%. Haymaker The straight’s damage has been decreased from 6615% to 5740%. The x-kick’s damage has been decreased from 6615% to 6090%. [Back to Overview] Captain Bullet Smash Captain’s Dignity will now activate when the bullet hits an enemy. Continual Aiming Captain’s Dignity will now activate when the bullet hits an enemy. Battleship Bomber Fixed an issue where this skill would be displayed as Crew Commandership when registered in the Buff Favourites. Battleship Bomber VI Fixed an issue where this skill would be displayed as Crew Commandership when registered in the Buff Favourites. [Back to Overview] Cannon Shooter Rolling Cannon Rainbow VI Fixed an issue where sometimes this skill could be cast without a prepared Communication Network. [Back to Overview] Flame Wizard Orbital Flame VI Fixed an issue where if you used Enhanced Orbital Flame VI, sometimes the giant flame would not be created. [Back to Overview] Night Walker Darkness Omen Fixed an issue where the buff icon would remain even after the bat swarm disappeared when resummoned. Shadow Shift The shadow will now disappear when all of the location swap counts are used up. Fixed an issue where the location swap count was refreshed upon dying. Darkness Omen VI Fixed an issue where the buff icon would remain even after the bat swarm disappeared when resummoned. [Back to Overview] Striker Ascension Fixed an issue where the hit effect looked awkward to other characters. [Back to Overview] Mikhail Soul Jump Fixed an issue where this skill could not be used upwards in certain maps. Royal Guard The counterattack action delay has been decreased by about 10%. Royal Guard VI The counterattack action delay has been decreased by about 10%. [Back to Overview] Evan Return! This skill can no longer be used during Circle of Mana’s 1st attack. A delay has been added when used consecutively. Critical Magic The critical damage boost has been decreased from 20% to 17%. Circle of Mana IV The point at which Circle of Mana’s 2nd attack can be linked to Return! has been decreased by about 66%. The 1st attack’s damage has been decreased from 290% to 273%. The 2nd attack’s damage has been decreased from 330% to 298%. Dragon Fury The magic attack boost has been decreased from 30% to 25%. High Dragon Potential The boss damage boost has been decreased from 20% to 19%. Elemental Blast The skill description has been changed. Spiral of Mana The damage has been decreased from 161% to 144%. Circle of Mana VI The point at which Circle of Mana’s 2nd attack can be linked to Return! has been decreased by about 66%. The 1st attack’s damage has been decreased from 494% to 446%. The 2nd attack’s damage has been decreased from 557% to 502%. Circle of Thunder VI The damage has been decreased from 730% to 657%. Circle of Earth VI The damage has been decreased from 730% to 657%. Circle of Wind VI The damage has been decreased from 730% to 657%. Union Drive The magic attack’s damage has been increased from 7148% to 7336%. The resonance shockwave’s damage has been increased from 7782% to 7987%. [Back to Overview] Luminous Fixed an issue where the Orb effect was displayed incorrectly to other characters. Fixed an issue where the number of magic spheres creatable by Liberation Orb was displayed incorrectly when reviving in a hunting ground map. [Back to Overview] Mercedes Potential Power The skill description has been changed. Ignis Roar The final damage boost when using linked skills has been decreased from 5% to 4%. The final damage boost has been decreased from 25% to 20%. Elvish Blessing The final damage boost has been increased from 5% to 6%. Elemental Ghost The afterimage’s final damage ratio has been decreased from 50% to 45%. The afterimage’s final damage ratio applied by Ishtar’s Ring and Irkalla’s Breath has been decreased from 24% to 22%. The afterimage’s final damage ratio when the HEXA enhancement core is activated has been decreased from 70% to 65%. The afterimage’s final damage ratio applied by Ishtar’s Ring and Irkalla’s Breath when the HEXA enhancement core is activated has been decreased from 35% to 33%. Ishtar’s Ring VI The Mark of Ishtar will now be applied on enemies hit by directly attacking skills (except Elemental Spirit). Unfading Glory The Spirit King’s manifestation’s damage has been decreased from 3300% to 2700%. The Spirit King’s manifestation’s enhanced attack’s damage has been decreased from 2160% to 1800%. Fixed an issue where sometimes the Spirit King’s manifestation effect looked awkward to other characters. Elemental Spirit The damage has been increased from 7910% to 8190%. [Back to Overview] Phantom Steal Skill Fixed an issue where stolen Pathfinder’s Cardinal Blast’s master level was displayed as level 1. La Morte Carte The skill description has been changed. [Back to Overview] Battle Mage Abyssal Lightning The skill description has been changed. [Back to Overview] Wild Hunter Jaguar Riding Fixed an issue where sometimes the skill would not be maintained after reviving. Fixed an issue where the skill would not be maintained after being hit by certain attacks. Predator’s Leap Fixed an issue where if you used this skill on an enemy that was rushing or teleporting, you would sometimes moved out of the map. Nature’s Wrath Fixed an issue where the skill description related to attack speed increase was not displayed. Final Attack The skill sound effect’s volume has been increased. White Heat Rush Fixed an issue where moving diagonally downwards on the ground was not working properly. Fixed an issue where you could not instantly change directions immediately after using this skill diagonally while on the Jaguar. Trap Seeder Fixed an issue where the skill sound effect would be played to other characters when the support unit disappeared. Wild Vulcan: Apex The skill voice output rate has been changed when the additional grenades are fired. Fixed an issue where Asili’s actions were awkward when moving while casting this skill. Advanced Final Attack The skill sound effect’s volume has been increased. Command: Predator’s Eye A feature to turn the inverted cutscene on/off has been added. The inverted cutscene effect has been adjusted to prevent it from being excessively bright when used on dark maps. The skill sound effect’s volume when cast has been increased. Wild Vulcan: Over Drive Fixed an issue where the skill could be cast while hanging on a rope or ladder. Primal Bloom A feature to turn the colour cutscene and territory of the wilderness effects on/off has been added. Linked Impact This skill will no longer consume arrows when used. Wild Vulcan: Apex VI The skill sound effects’ volume when holding the keydown and an enemy is hit has been increased. The skill voice output rate has been changed when the additional grenades are fired. Fixed an issue where Asili’s actions were awkward when moving while casting this skill. Final Attack VI The skill sound effect’s volume has been increased. Trap Seeder VI Fixed an issue where the skill sound effect would be played to other characters when the support unit disappeared. Fixed an issue in boss content where if the ‘display my silhouette’ feature was active, the silhouettes would look awkward when using certain silhouette types. Fixed an issue in Champion Raid: Dragon Island where if you switched to another character while using Savage Leap, the character looked awkward. Fixed an issue in Union Raid where certain skills used by Wild Hunters placed as attackers looked awkward. The changed skills are as follows. Wild Vulcan: Shatterline Wild Vulcan: Apex [Back to Overview] Demon Slayer Concentration The final damage boost has been increased from 30% to 31%. Demon Awakening Fixed an issue where after casting this skill, Cerberus would not be activated automatically for a certain period of time. The maximum number of Demon’s Authority uses has been increased from 10 to 15. Enhanced Demon Slash 1st and 2st hit’s damage has been decreased from 1248% to 830%. Enhanced Demon Slash 3rd hit’s damage has been decreased from 1398% to 930%. Enhanced Demon Slash 4th hit’s damage has been decreased from 1596% to 1065%. Demon Bane The damage during the keydown has been increased from 525% to 665%. The damage when the keydown ends has been increased from 1250% to 1555%. Demon Slash VI Demonic Sphere will now be activated when using Demon Slash or Demon Impact. Amethystine Intrusion The damage has been decreased from 10640% to 10325%. [Back to Overview] Demon Avenger Revenant The thorns of rage’s damage has been decreased from 2150% to 850%. Rageborne Daredevil The rage burst’s damage has been increased from 6510% to 6615%. The red destruction’s damage has been increased from 6650% to 6720%. [Back to Overview] Kain Annihilation The skill effect has been changed. [Back to Overview] Zero Fixed an issue where certain skill effects would remain if you left a party during Paladin’s Parashock Guard effect. Fixed an issue where Wind Cutter’s vortex afterimages would sometimes not move forward during Transcendent. Fixed an issue where if you registered Joint Attack in the Skill Alarm then exited a boss battle map, sometimes the alert would appear 2 times. [Back to Overview] Angelic Buster Mascot Familiar Information regarding the critical status effect immunity has been added. [Back to Overview] Illium Deus This skill is no longer affected by summon duration increasing effects. Deus can now only hit a single enemy up to 4 times. The satellites can now only hit a single enemy up to 25 times. Fixed an issue where the satellites would attack even after the duration ended. The satellite’s maximum number of attacks has been decreased from 40 to 25. The damage has been increased from 1000% to 1580%. The satellite’s damage has been increased from 240% to 430%. Crystal Gate Fixed an issue in Azmoth Canyon where if you installed Crystal Gate then entered an Azmoth Annihilation Battle or Azmoth’s Visitor stage, the cooldown would not be decreased. The feature where you acquired a magic attack boost buff when nearby the Crystal Gates has been removed. This skill now passively increases magic attack by 55. The bombardments will now activate during Crystal Gate’s duration. When the HEXA enhancement core is activated, it now increases the magic attack boost by 30. Deus VI This skill is no longer affected by summon duration increasing effects. Deus can now only hit a single enemy up to 4 times. The satellites can now only hit a single enemy up to 75 times. Fixed an issue where the satellites would attack even after the duration ended. The satellite’s maximum number of attacks has been decreased from 40 to 25. The damage has been increased from 1460% to 2050%. The satellite’s damage has been increased from 278% to 545%. Excidium The shockwave’s damage has been decreased from 6973% to 6650%. The explosion’s damage has been decreased from 7105% to 7000%. [Back to Overview] Khali Intuition The final damage boost has been decreased from 30% to 25%. Redemption The final damage boost has been decreased from 40% to 35%. Void Burst The continous strike’s damage has been increased from 1900% to 2000%. The slash’s damage has been increased from 2000% to 2100%. Arts: Astra The giant chakram’s damage has been increased from 950% to 1000%. The damage when it disappears has been increased from 1000% to 1100%. Void Awake The dash’s damage has been increased from 5250% to 5600%. The transcendent chakri’s damage has been increased from 5460% to 5950%. [Back to Overview] Len Sky Splitting Azure Dragon Sword Falling Plum Blossom Petals, Heavenly Rain, Humanity Desolation Fixed an issue where sometimes the sword storm was not created when Falling Petals was used at the edge of the map. Even if the enemy the sword storm was created on is not hit by the sword storm, when Roaring Sky hits the enemy, it will now activate additional strikes based on the number of remaining hits. [Back to Overview] Lara Dragon Vein Eruption VI When this skill is activated in the HEXA Matrix, the Dragon Vein’s element order will be maintained. Eruption: Heaving River VI Fixed an issue where casting this skill for the first time after being activated in the HEXA Matrix would cast Eruption: Heaving River. Eruption: Whirlwind VI Fixed an issue where casting this skill for the first time after being activated in the HEXA Matrix would cast Eruption: Whirlwind. Eruption: Sunrise Well VI Fixed an issue where casting this skill for the first time after being activated in the HEXA Matrix would cast Eruption: Sunrise Well. [Back to Overview] Hoyoung Earth: Ground-Shattering Wave A Custom Command Mode has been added where you can link to Ground-Shattering Wave: True by tapping the forward arrow key twice. The skill description has been changed. Heaven: Iron Fan Gale A Custom Command Mode has been added where you can link to Iron Fan Gale: True by tapping the forward arrow key twice. The skill description has been changed. Earth: Stone Tremor The skill description has been changed. Heaven: Consuming Flames The skill description has been changed. Talisman: Warp Gate This skill no longer consumes Talisman Energy when cast. This skill now consumes MP when cast. You can now open the Warp Gate during the teleport cooldown. The teleport cooldown has been decreased from 5 seconds to 2 seconds. The Warp Gate reinstall cooldown has been decreased from 5 seconds to 1 second. Sage: Tai Yu Clone This skill can now be used while in the air. Earth: Stone Tremor VI The skill description has been changed. Heaven: Iron Fan Gale VI A Custom Command Mode has been added where you can link to Iron Fan Gale: True by tapping the forward arrow key twice. The skill description has been changed. Earth: Ground-Shattering Wave VI A Custom Command Mode has been added where you can link to Ground-Shattering Wave: True by tapping the forward arrow key twice. The skill description has been changed. [Back to Overview] HEXA Matrix The HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll has been added. When used, your HEXA Matrix skill cores, mastery cores, and enhancement cores will be reset. Then, the Sol Erda and Sol Erda Fragments based on the enhancement levels will be extracted into Consumable items. Common Cores will not be reset or extracted. The extracted Sol Erda and Sol Erda Fragments will be untradeable. While you hold these items, you cannot Open Job Advance. You can acquire the HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll through the Maple Admin NPC until December 3, 2025 at 11:59 PM, 1 time per character. The item will expire on December 4, 2025 at 2:00 AM. Developer Notes We received a lot of feedback from players about the drastic changes in the utility of certain HEXA cores after the last test world update. To address this issue, we have created the HEXA Matrix Reset Scroll, which allows players to redistribute the resources they have invested in their HEXA cores (except common cores). Going forward, if the utility of HEXA cores change, we will provide this scroll to all players to let them adapt to the skill changes. In addition, we will fundamentally improve our work processes to further enhance the consistency of skill value and structure changes. We sincerely apologize for not being able to provide a stable service. [Back to Overview] Cash MapleStory x Animation One Punch Man items will be sold. Sale Duration: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM. Sale Items: Grand Collection Mystic Collection Special Luna Crystal The Grand Collection can be used to acquire 1 item based on a set rate. You can see the rates here, and you can see the full item visuals here. The Mystic Collection can be used to acquire 1 item based on a set rate. You can see the rates here, and you can see the full item visuals here. The Special Luna Crystal works the same as the regular Luna Crystal, but has a different item pool, including the new Luna Petite Hero set: Petite Saitama, Petite Genos, and Petite Tatsumaki. You can see the rates here and here. During the Special Luna Crystal sale period, the Luna Petite Hero set pets’ equipment will be sold. Petite Saitama’s Cape Petite Genos’ Incineration Cannon Petite Tatsumaki’s Psychokinesis During the sale period, if you equip all 3 Luna Petite Hero set pets, you will receive the Hero Association Headquarters Hallway Chair. Wisp’s Wonderberry Usage Reorganization Wisp’s Wonderberries can now be used directly in the Cash Shop. You can right-click a Wisp’s Wonderberry in your Cash storage or Cash inventory to use it. An option has been added to allow you to open 5 Wisp’s Wonderberries at once. A new animation for using Wisp’s Wonderberries has been added. ※ When you use Wisp’s Wonderberries from the Cash storage, items purchased first will be used first. When you use Wisp’s Wonderberries from the inventory, the items at the top left will be used first. Beauty Coupon Sale Method Changes Hair and Face Coupons will now be sold as unified Coupons. The Face Accessory Emote Synthesis Coupon will be sold. Sale Duration: Always Price: 3900 NX, cannot use Mileage, can be traded 1 time if purchased with NX The Face Accessory Emote Synthesis Coupon lets you combine a decorative face accessory with an emote face accessory to make the decorative face accessory do that emote by default. The emote face accessory used will disappear after synthesis. When changing a pet’s name with the Pet Name Tag item, you can now use a name of up to 7 Korean characters or 14 english characters. [Back to Overview] Improvements Quests Leben Mine quests’ dialogue and cutscenes have been changed and some quests have been added. [Leben Mine] Breaking In?! When placing a Cube Chair in a Bag UI, it can now be placed in the same way as when placing it in the Inventory UI’s Set-Up tab. [Back to Overview] Maple Auction A feature has been added to confirm purchases when buying equipment that is priced excessively high compared to its assessed value, to prevent equipment purchase errors. The value of an equip is determined with reference to the item’s Combat Power and transaction information over a certain period of time. If there is insufficient information available to determine the value, the notification will not appear. This feature is initially limited to level 150 armour (Highness, Eagle Eye, Trixter), Absolabs armour, Arcane Shade armour, Ethernal armour, Absolabs weapons, Arcane Shade weapons, Dawn Boss set, Lose Control Machine Mark, Magic Eyepatch, Commander Force Earrings, Source of Suffering, Dreamy Belt, Endless Terror, certain Boss Accessory set, and certain Special Skill Rings. The applicable equipment can change in the future. [Back to Overview] Events The Event List has been improved so you can check Events/Coin Shops/Cash events in separate tabs. [Back to Overview] [Punch King] Elder Centipede Punch King Participate in the Elder Centipede Punch King and acquire Punch Coins! Event Participation Requirements: Level 200 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have completed the 5th job advancement and participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event. ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds. Event Period: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘[Punch King] Elder Centipede Punch King’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event. After completing the quest, you can participate through the Event List to go to the ‘Path to the Elder Centipede Punch King (Waiting Map)’. You can talk to Spiegella to enter the preparation space and practice, prepare, and challenge the Punch King. ※ Some buff effects will be removed upon entering. You can attack the Punch King monster for 2 minutes to acquire points. ※ If you leave early, the acquired points will be reset. ※ You cannot use Ability presets while challenging the Punch King. ※ You cannot use HEXA skill Common Cores while challenging the Punch King. The monster will appear in a total of 5 stages, with the level, defense, and HP increasing wih each stage. The more damage you deal to the monster, the more points you can acquire, up to a maximum of 5,100 points. ※ You cannot participate in the Elder Centipede Punch King on a Red PC. ※ You cannot charge the Soul Gauge inside the Punch King. ※ Sayram’s Elixir, Alleria’s Elixir, and Collector’s Elixir cannot be used while challenging the Punch King. You can talk to Spiegella to acquire Punch Coins. (This can be done once per week per world). ※ If you try again in the same world and achive a higher score, you will receive additional Punch Coins equal to the difference between your previous score and the new score. ※ You can acquire 3,000 Basic Punch Coins, 2,000 Intermediate Punch Coins, and 100 Advanced Punch Coins per week per world. They can only be used in the world where you acquired them. ※ The number of acquired Punch Coins is shared between all characters within the world. ※ The weekly Punch King challenge records will be reset every Thursday at 12:00 AM. [Back to Overview] [Hunting Event] Heroes’ Arrival Train with the heroes and get lots of experience! Event Participation Requirements: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2) that have participated in the ‘[Attendance Check Event] Monster Park Turmoil’ event. ※ You cannot participate in Special Worlds. Event Period: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘[Hunting Event] Heroes’ Arrival’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event. When you enter a hunting ground with monsters within your level range, the ‘Heroes’ Arrival Preparation’ skill will be automatically activated. As you defeat monsters within your level range, you will fill up the gauge. When you defeat 250 monsters within your level range, the gauge will be filled and ‘Heroes’ Arrival’ will be activated. You will acquire experience then Genos, Tatsumaki of Terror, or King will appear in a set order to attack nearby enemies. ※ If you use all 30 skill activations per day per character, the skill will be deactivated. ※ You can deactivate the skill by right-clicking the skill icon in the skill window. If the skill is deactivated, it will remain deactivated until midnight or until you right-click the skill to activate it again. If you disconnect and reconnect, the deactivated skill will be reactivated. ※ The skill will only activate in maps with monsters within your level range. It will not activate in maps where there is a level 4 Rune debuff or other special maps (Mirror World, story quest maps, etc.). ※ The skill is affected by experience increasing effects and the death penalty experience reduction effect. ※ When you acquire experience from the skill, the Rune experience buff will be applied even if you do not currently have a Rune released. ※ Experience acquired through the skill can only level you up 1 time. ※ Monsters defeated by the skill will not accumulate the 250 monsters required for the next skill activation. [Back to Overview] Special World World Period: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 18, 2024 before the maintenance. World Usage Instructions On the World Select screen, you can choose a Special World, login, and click the Create Character button to create a limited-time character. ※ You can only use the world that you first create a limited-time character in, Special or Special 2. Even if you delete the character, you will not be able to use the other world. ※ You cannot create any job characters other than the event job. You can only create 1 character. Special World Environment Special World is a limited-time event world, and all records of the world will disappear when the event period ends. You cannot trade with other characters. You cannot use things like the storage, trading, couriers, Maple Auction, or Meso Market. You cannot acquire items dropped by other characters. You cannot use the Cash Shop and cannot receive gifts. You cannot settle accumulated Mileage. You cannot receive Daily Gift rewards. The Mu Lung Dojo Mastery section rankings will not have rankings per job. You cannot use certain chairs or ridings. You cannot receive Maple Guide rewards in Special World. You cannot complete achievements in Special World. You cannot use the Dimensional Mirror in Special World. You cannot participate in events that are running in regular worlds in Special World. You cannot complete the 5th job advancement, and cannot use Core Gemstones. You cannot complete the 6th job advancement, and you cannot enter Cernium (Before) or higher areas. Core Gemstones do not drop in Special World. Certain achievements or weekly quests that give Core Gemstones in Arcane River cannot be completed. The Rune of Destruction will not appear in Special World. In addition, the usage of certain content or systems is restricted. Slime Meso Shop In Special World, you can click the ‘Take a Look at the Slime Meso Shop’ event in the Event List to use the ‘Slime Meso Shop’. Power Elixir (1k mesos) Special Medal of Honor (1m mesos) Black Rebirth Flame (5m mesos) 100% Epic Potential Scroll (1m mesos) 100% Special Additional Potential Scroll (2m mesos) 100% Karma Additional Epic Potential Scroll (3m mesos) Spell Trace (1k mesos) Arcane Shade Weapon Box (10m mesos) Arcane Shade Armor Box (10m mesos) Fairy Heart (200m mesos) 100% Karma Special Heart Attack Scroll (5m mesos) Special World Benefits The meso acquisition rate is increased to 10x as much. Until level 250, you will be provided a skill that increases experience acquisition rate by 1,000%. After level 250, it will be changed to 100%. Level 200 or higher characters can receive an Upholding Justice Booster 1 time per day through the Event List’s ‘[Special World] Upholding Justice Booster’ quest. It can only be used on the day that it is received. After reaching level 200, if you start the ‘To Arcane River!’ quest, the Arcane River area quests will be automatically completed, and you can use the Maple Guide to quick travel and acquire level 1 Symbols. ※ The ‘To Arcane River!’ quest can only be completed by characters participating in the ‘[One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal’ event. The Maple Guide’s recommended hunting ground maps and all maps with level 60 or higher monsters will be changed into maps that allow up to 4 players to have their own instanced monsters. All hunting ground maps (except for theme dungeons) have different rules than regular worlds, allowing for more monsters to be summoned. You can defeat more monsters at once than in regular worlds, and you can get a variety of types of multi kills. Type of Multi KillNumber of Monsters DefeatedMulti KillDefeat 3~99 monsters at the same time.Super KillDefeat 100~149 monsters at the same time.Hyper KillDefeat 150 or more monsters at the same time. [Back to Overview] [One Punch Man] New Job Saitama Experience Event Experience the new job Saitama and receive various gifts! Saitama Job Scenario Quests When you reach certain levels on a Saitaima character, you can complete scenario quests. LevelQuestUpon Creation[One Punch Man] Mysterious World100[One Punch Man] Mysterious Disagreement150[One Punch Man] Mysterious Meeting200[One Punch Man] Mysterious Letter235[One Punch Man] Mysterious People Saitama Job Skills When your Saitama character reaches certain levels, you can acquire new skills automatically. Saitama characters do not have job advancements and do not require SP to acquire skills. Saitama characters can wear Pirate class equipment. Saitama characters can only use Knuckles. LevelSkill NameModeSkill DescriptionUpon CreationUltimate HeroPassiveAll attacking skills used directly by Saitama bind enemies.Another World’s EnergyPassiveVarious phenomena appear due to the otherworldly energy.10Health Training IPassiveBasic health training.2 Stage JumpActiveJump forward once more while jumping.You can also use the skill with the up arrow key to jump upwards.Normal PunchActiveAttack enemies in front of you with a normal punch.30RunActiveRun forward quickly. You can use this skill with the arrow keys to move freely in 8 directions.60Incineration CannonActiveGenos appears and fires the Incineration Cannon forwards. If it hits an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage.80Health Training IIPassiveEnhance your basic health through continuous training.100Consecutive Normal PunchesActiveAttack enemies in front of you with consecutive normal punches from one hand. You cannot be knocked back by any enemy attacks or inflicted with critical status effects while using this skill.Another World’s HeroPassiveIncreases all of your stats by a certain percentage.110Hero’s WillActiveFocus your mind to remove status effects.After using this skill, you are immune to status effects for 3 seconds.However, this does not apply to certain status effects.Hero’s Will can be used while using other skills.120Health Training IIIPassiveFurther improve your health through in-depth training.130Standing High JumpActiveJump very high into the air.140Killer Move: Serious Series – Serious Side HopsActiveSaitama runs back and forth so quickly that afterimages appear.You are invincible during Killer Move: Serious Series – Serious Side Hops.150Health Training IVPassiveEnhance your health to the limit through high-intensity training.160Hell StormActiveFubuki of Hell appears and unleashes a storm that attacks the boss monster with the highest HP within range.If Hell Storm hits an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage.180PsychokinesisActiveTatsumaki of Terror appears and uses her psychokinesis to throw debris at enemies.This skill prioritizes attacking the enemy with the highest HP within range. If this skill hits an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage.190King EngineActiveKing appears and the King Engine starts ringing.Enemies around King feel fear and take damage.If this skill hits an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage.200Health Training VPassiveReach the ultimate completion of health.220Killer Move: Serious Series – Serious PunchActiveSaitama unleashes his Killer Move: Serious Series – Serious Punch.If this skill hits an enemy using Damage Reflect, you will not take damage. [Back to Overview] [One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal Fill out the adventure journal with your various adventures! Enjoy the adventure and receive rewards! Event Participation Requirements: Special World: All Saitama characters. Regular Worlds: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2). Event Period: November 20, 2025 after the maintenance ~ December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM. You can select the ‘[One Punch Man] Hero’s Adventure Journal’ event in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event. ※ The event must first be started in a Special World. After that, you can participate in the event on regular worlds. Mission Rewards After participating in the event, you can acquire various rewards by completing Exploration Missions, Action Missions, and Boss Missions on a Saitama character. The rewards can only be claimed before the event ends on December 17, 2025 at 11:59 PM. Regular world rewards can only be claimed 1 time per Maple ID. ※ If you delete and recreate your Saitama character, the mission progress and Special World’s reward claim status will be reset. ※ Even if you delete and recreate your Saitama character, the regular worlds’ reward claim status will not be reset. ※ After claiming a regular world reward, you cannot claim it again even if you re-complete the mission. Exploration Missions There are a total of 12 exploration missions, which can be completed by visiting specific areas on a Saitama character. After completing a mission, you can receive the corresponding rewards in the Adventure Journal UI. Mission NumberMission Details1Arrive in Maple World on a Saitama character.2Arrive in Nameless Town on a Saitama character.3Arrive in Subway Shelter on a Saitama character.4Arrive in Chew Chew Village on a Saitama character.5Arrive in Yum Yum Village on a Saitama character.6Arrive in Lacheln Street on a Saitama character.7Arrive in the Spirit Tree on a Saitama character.8Arrive in Trueffet Square on a Saitama character.9Arrive in Base Camp on a Saitama character.10Arrive in Peaceful Submarine on a Saitama character.11Arrive in White Spear 3 on a Saitama character.12Arrive in Labyrinth of Suffering Core on a Saitama character. ※ After reaching level 200, you can move to the Arcane River area through the ‘To the Arcane River!’ quest in the Event List. Magic Attack Scroll. ※ The selected Pet Equipment Scroll can only be put into storage, and will expire after 7 days. ※ Spiegella’s Golden Strawberry Farm Entry Ticket Can only be used by characters level 101~259, or Zero characters level 259 or lower that have completed the story quest Chapter 2. Characters that have used the Entry Ticket can select the Spiegella’s Golden Strawberry Farm event in the Event List and press the Participate button to move to <Spiegella’s Golden Strawberry Farm: Golden Strawberry Farm Entrance>. (When you enter, all buffs applied to the character will be removed.) In <Spiegella’s Golden Strawberry Farm: Golden Strawberry Farm>, you will have 15 minutes to defeat 1000 Golden Strawberries and acquire experience. You will have up to 24 hours to enter the Farm starting from the time you use the Entry Ticket. You can only use the next Entry Ticket when the Farm usage time limit has ended or all remaining Golden Strawberry monsters have been defeated. ※ The Sol Erda can only by used by characters level 260 or higher that have completed the 6th job advancement. It cannot be used if you hold 20 Sol Erda. items.title: KMS ver. 1.2.408 – Wild Hunter Remaster & World Archive!
items.summary: The official server has been updated with the Wild Hunter remaster, as well as skill changes to other jobs, and the new World Archive system! Like I mentio...

kmsBreakdown.summary: The official server has been updated with the Wild Hunter remaster, as well as skill changes to other jobs, and the new World Archive system!
highlights: Like I mentioned before, this post was late because I was in LA for MapleCon last week. I think everyone knows how it went lol, kinda crazy how bad it was considering how much more expensive tickets were this year. Hopefully, Nexon can learn from their (many) mistakes and improve next time…?
Wild Hunter Remaster Skills Beginner 1st Job 2nd Job 3rd Job 4th Job Hyper Skills 5th Job 6th Job V Core Changes HEXA Core Changes Story Commemorative Gifts
The Character Creation UI’s illustration has been changed.
Capture This skill has been removed.

Wild Vulcan: Proto[Master Level: 20][Crossbow Skill] Use an improved prototype of a crossbow. The fired arrows pierce through enemies. [Level 20]Consumes 10 MP. Deals 130% damage 3 times on up to 5 enemies.

Jaguar Riding[Master Level: 1]By communicating with Asili, you can ride them in combat. While riding, your speed and Stance rate are increased. If you are not riding Asili, you cannot use skills other than movement skills. [Level 1]Consumes 20 MP. Ride Asili.While riding, increases speed by 40 and Stance rate by 50%.Cooldown: 1 second.

items: Wild Vulcan: Proto[Master Level: 20][Crossbow Skill] Use an improved prototype of a crossbow. The fired arrows pierce through enemies. [Level 20]Consumes 10 MP. Deals 130% damage 3 times on up to 5 enemies.
[Level 20]Consumes 10 MP. Deals 130% damage 3 times on up to 5 enemies.

Jaguar Riding[Master Level: 1]By communicating with Asili, you can ride them in combat. While riding, your speed and Stance rate are increased. If you are not riding Asili, you cannot use skills other than movement skills. [Level 1]Consumes 20 MP. Ride Asili.While riding, increases speed by 40 and Stance rate by 50%.Cooldown: 1 second.
[Level 1]Consumes 20 MP. Ride Asili.While riding, increases speed by 40 and Stance rate by 50%.Cooldown: 1 second.

Savage Leap[Master Level: 5]You can jump once more while jumping to move a short distance. You can use this skill up to 2 times. You can use this skill with the up arrow key to move upwards. [Level 5]Consumes 10 MP. Jump a certain distance.
[Level 5]Consumes 10 MP. Jump a certain distance.

Predator’s Leap[Master Level: 5]Asili marks the nearest enemy with the Mark of Prey. You can use the skill again to teleport to the marked enemy and pounce on them. After teleporting, Predator’s Leap: Running Start will be activated using the power from pouncing on the enemy.If you use this skill with the down arrow key, you can change the enemy marked with the Mark of Prey.In addition, permanently increases speed and jump. [Level 5]Consumes 10 MP. Mark the nearest enemy within a certain range with the Mark of Prey for 600 seconds.If you use the skill again, teleport to the prey’s location.Change mark cooldown: 0.5 seconds.[Passive Effect: 20 speed, 20 jump]

[Level 5]Consumes 10 MP. Mark the nearest enemy within a certain range with the Mark of Prey for 600 seconds.If you use the skill again, teleport to the prey’s location.Change mark cooldown: 0.5 seconds.[Passive Effect: 20 speed, 20 jump]

sections.title: Commemorative Gifts

details.value: Receive Wild Hunter remaster commemorative gifts!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: All Wild Hunter characters created before October 23, 2025 at 12:00 AM.

details.value: Event Period:

items: October 23, 2025 after the maintenance ~ November 19, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can talk to Maple Admin through the Quick Move or in Henesys/other major towns and click the ‘Wild Hunter Remaster Commemorative Gifts’ option. They can be received 1 time per Maple ID.
[Back to Overview]
Skill Changes
Note: All 5th job skill changes are listed for level 25, not level 30. (Again, not sure why Nexon does this in 2025 but it is what it is)

World Archive
A new expedition has begun in the Dimensional Library. Help Thales investigate monsters and NPCs around the world to complete the encyclopedia.
The <World Archive> has been added.

items: The World Archive is an account-based collection system, collected on a per-Maple ID basis.
You can add information on Maple World’s monsters and NPCs to the encyclopedia. Defeating monsters or talking to NPCs will automatically register their information in the World Archive.

details.value: ※ Grandis and Arcane River areas will be added in a future update.
How to Use the System

You can begin the World Archive by accepting the ‘[Dimensional Library] World Archive Project 1, 2, 3’ quest. When you complete the related quests, you will be able to access the World Archive UI through the full menu.
※ Characters level 100 or higher that have completed the ‘[Dimensional Library] Please Visit the Dimensional Library’ quest can do this through the NPC Librarian Thales.
※ The quest progress is shared between all worlds, and you can only complete it 1 time per Maple ID.
You can check your encyclopedia collection status and search for each area’s monsters and NPC information through the World Archive UI.

items: World Select Screen You can select from Maple World, Grandis, Arcane River, or the Appendix. Clicking each button will take you to the corresponding world’s region select screen.
You can select from Maple World, Grandis, Arcane River, or the Appendix.
Clicking each button will take you to the corresponding world’s region select screen.

Region Select Screen A list of regions within the selected world will be displayed. You can check each region’s collection progress. The filter feature lets you search by ‘All’, ‘Incomplete’, or ‘Completed’ status. You can search by region name or collection record name. Clicking each region button will take you to the region’s detailed collection screen.
A list of regions within the selected world will be displayed. You can check each region’s collection progress.
The filter feature lets you search by ‘All’, ‘Incomplete’, or ‘Completed’ status. You can search by region name or collection record name.
Clicking each region button will take you to the region’s detailed collection screen.
Detailed Region Collection Screen You can use the Tab key and arrow keys to switch between the Category and Collection information.
You can use the Tab key and arrow keys to switch between the Category and Collection information.

items: Monsters: Registered upon defeating. In parties, you must deal damage at least 1 time for it to be registered. ※ They will not be registered in Practice Mode.

NPCs: Registered upon clicking or interacting with the NPC Chat/Harvest key. Certain NPCs offer special hidden research information through additional interactions.
Registered upon clicking or interacting with the NPC Chat/Harvest key. Certain NPCs offer special hidden research information through additional interactions.

details.value: You can click the notification displayed when you register something in the collection to immediately check the collected information.
World Archive Rewards
When you collect a certain number of collection records, you can acquire the following rewards based on the cumulative number of registered records.
※ The rewards can only be received 1 time per Maple ID, regardless of world.

items: This will be unlocked automatically when you unlock the <World Archive>.

sections.title: Enhancement

details.value: The Potential Stamp system has been removed.

items: All items that have potential or additional potential granted to them (except for certain cases with fixed potential or additional potential) will now have 3 lines by default.
Existing items with 2 lines of potential or additional potential will become 3 lines when they are reset.
When you use Potential Stamps, you will now acquire Power Elixirs based on the success rate (100% success rate will give 100 Power Elixirs).
Potential Stamp items will no longer drop from Elite Monsters.
Potential Stamp items can no longer be acquired from the ‘Rare Treasure Boxes’ dropped by Elite Bosses.
Potential Stamp items can no longer be acquired from various Exploration Boxes.
Potential Stamp items can no longer be acquired by trading in various Cube Fragments.
Silver Additional Potential Stamps can no longer be acquired from Gold Apples.
Gold Potential Stamps have been removed from the Union Coin Shop.
Gold Potential Stamps and Special Additional Potential Stamps have been removed from the Hideout Coin Shop and Challengers Shop.

details.value: Some changes have been made to the Enhancement UI.

items: When the Enhancement UI is opened, it will now open in the location where it was previously closed.
When the Enhancement UI is opened, it will no longer adjust the locations and status of the Equip UI and Inventory UI.
The left tab size has been decreased.
The held mesos display method has been abbreviated. You can hover over the heading area to check more accurately.
The Star Catcher and destruction prevention options selection method when Star Force enhancing have been changed from a checkbox to a switch.
When a scroll that randomly increases values succeeds, the increased values will now be displayed temporarily during the enhancement success cutscene.
The default display option for bonus stat values has been changed to disable the detailed information.
When resetting bonus stats, potential, or additional potential, you can now preview the results at the start of the enhancement success cutscene.
A cube-only inventory has been added when resetting potential and additional potential.
The notification formats when resetting potential and additional potential have been unified.
The ‘Special Skill Ring Polishing Level Exchange’ title has been changed to ‘Ring Polishing Level Exchange’.

Events

sections.title: [Remaster Event] SAVAGE

details.value: Cassandra has arrived after hearing the news about the Wild Hunter remaster! Participate in the SAVAGE attendance check and receive gifts!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: All Wild Hunter characters.

details.value: Event Period:

items: October 23, 2025 after the maintenance ~ November 19, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘[Remaster Event] SAVAGE’ in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event.
Once per day, you can defeat 1,000 monsters within your level range on a Wild Hunter character to complete the SAVAGE attendance check and receive rewards.
The SAVAGE attendance check can be completed up to 10 times over the event period.

You can press the <Use> button in the top right corver of the SAVAGE UI to use the <SAVAGE Pass> which completes a SAVAGE check-in that you did not complete previously. It costs 3,000 Maple Points per 1 Pass.
※ The participation record is shared between all characters within the Maple ID.
※ The monsters defeated record is shared between all characters within the Maple ID, and is reset every day at midnight.
※ This event will only progress when a Wild Hunter character that is in a party of 1 or not in a party defeats monsters with their level range.
※ The number of monsters defeated will not increase in the Cross World Boss Content <Dimensional Battlefield>.
SAVAGE Base Reward
During the event period, you can receive a Hyper Burning Booster from the SAVAGE UI.
※ This can only be received by Wild Hunter characters level 258 or lower. You cannot receive if it the Hyper Burning effect is already being applied.
※ The Hyper Burning Booster can be used until November 20, 2025 at 2:00 AM. The applied effects will expire on December 18, 2025 at 2:00 AM.
SAVAGE Attendance Check Rewards
※ The growth/enhancement rewards can only be claimed on a level 260 or higher Wild Hunter character. The decoration rewards can be claimed on all characters.
※ During the event period, you can also buy Petite Asili and Petite Asili’s equipment in the Cash Shop.
[Back to Overview]

sections.summary: Cassandra has arrived after hearing the news about the Wild Hunter remaster! Participate in the SAVAGE attendance check and receive gifts!

sections.title: Camila’s Autumn Coloured Store

details.value: Camila has returned with pretty outfits for autumn. Fill Camila’s store with autumn colours and receive pretty gifts!
Event Participation Requirements:

items: Level 101 or higher characters (Zero characters that have completed Chapter 2).

details.value: Event Period:

items: October 23, 2025 after the maintenance ~ November 19, 2025 at 11:59 PM.

details.value: You can select the ‘Camila’s Autumn Coloured Store’ in the Event List and click the ‘Participate’ button to start this event.
Weekly Mission
Every time you defeat 2,000 monsters within your level range, you can click the ‘Fill’ button in the UI to fill the store with autumn colours and accumulate the following rewards.
※ The monsters defeated record is shared between all characters within the Maple ID, and is reset every day at midnight.
※ This event will only progress when a character that is in a party of 1 or not in a party defeats monsters with their level range.
※ The number of monsters defeated will not increase in the Cross World Boss Content <Dimensional Battlefield>.
You can defeat up to 10,000 monsters within your level range per week. If you defeat all 10,000 monsters, you will also accumulate that week’s bonus rewards.
You can claim the accumulated VIP Boosters and VIP Sauna Entry Tickets during the event period by clicking the ‘Receive’ button in the UI.
※ The VIP Booster and VIP Sauna Entry Ticket accumulation and claim status are shared between all characters within the Maple ID. The claimed items can only be put into storage.
※ VIP Sauna Entry Tickets can only be used during the ‘VIP Sauna’ event period. After the event period ends, the effects will no longer apply even if you have remaining Sauna Entry Ticket time.
※ If you have claimed the weekly bonus rewards 3 times or more, you can click the ‘Receive’ button that appears on the right side of the UI to acquire the ‘Autumn Coloured Display Case’.
※ The Autumn Coloured Display Case can be claimed after creating a Maple Home. Upon claiming it, the furniture will be instantly added to your Maple Home.

※ Maple Home requires a level 260 or higher character that has completed ‘The Day After’ story within the world. You can then complete the ‘[Maple Home] Spiegelmann’s Super Gift’ quest through the lightbulb icon to create a Maple Home.
※ Maple Home is shared between all characters within the world. The furniture acquired from the Voucher can be used by all characters within the Maple ID.
Autumn Flower Bookmarks
You can use your accumulated Autumn Flower Bookmarks by clicking the ‘Open Store’ button in the UI or through the ‘Trendy Store’, ‘Steady Store’, and ‘Accessory Store’ located in Henesys.
You can also accumulate additional Autumn Flower Bookmarks by buying Autumn Flower Bookmark Vouchers for 100m mesos each through the ‘Buy’ button in the UI.
※ You can buy up to 4,000 Autumn Flower Bookmark Vouchers per Maple ID. They are untradeable.
※ Unused Autumn Flower Bookmark Vouchers can be resold for 100m mesos each through the Shop UI.
